name: Timothy, Legacy House GOP Memberships
subject: We cherished every moment of our time together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Dearest Peter, this is Timothy, and I am the Legacy Membership Director at House GOP.
TRUE patriots like you don't come around often.
A member of my staff brought your file to my desk, so I wanted to reach out personally and express my true and abiding appreciation for all that you've done for our country and for House GOP over the years.
Truthfully, it was bittersweet to see that a House GOP member with your distinguished record was planning to cancel your support going forward.
We cherished every moment of our time with you. But, as the saying goes, all good things must come to an end.
[In case you’ve changed your mind and you’d like to continue supporting House GOP, please consider using this form.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/8-qMueGy4vQFE3xS2bdxFXKMSGBhnNiLMp4QV6N9gut61pbZK1MVFOuQ8j8x54mNaFN04cVbnXm7WCiOavnVWPphvSdNm_ymZqiIwJw2V2Yg4FMErB6O9Zq5AYzqy52NYPH91N7XfYeJPYJtOgOUoYnfzvxizmsSYX8AA7fmO4Zjf34FbkkFjxBe0svbTprcbPNoShhgs17HMsuhF6GmJLWSNZMT1RaPEXV3t8iuxeBfPzYcKNxG6deHvC2AfgaEKziRxpAKbs3_Lwi4jIvyhK_KnyOR-etoLvypuPVCYh5u3O1ScdVFUQmBauOP1sJ5C2igIImPVlXQ2cq5LTu2bc9Df6oAIA1k1uSQJ-yiRaw27XEGpCtrAOPXcNnwAodv82FSULMN65cKX_koFf9-oJUvcZvhd5i0vhmv1LOkBUBhAS2E0xzKTvwx-qG6ACoZvZeQmR740MRGh0uUonUpr4aiSJpxwGYn_TouDXjeyVLTHXEnt3X2OQnghqMSK8F7P4Xr6ppJFmoZAErA7SQrovB4MUrz1JrmlSvKpBaAjraFYEk3tXFwscfNfKYQUAoun6OTtFbJu9degfhhrvBgrGM8rIWoLM4RDMM94HgsuuT32R9WRfwXFi-HhqpyU7M8eUlJT_yuHJ-OdC3S90ihBGb3rlweRM2cCA7SLrFBmVXE_yp9eFPVO2rA2-s0wvL-exiUewfZ9LOGTOWV9nLjBZxfvgoduJmqqWWWo-U-w5_xtbrhxxeppelzMo48G_aFXiEkIIdhJ42OA08jRxCecXteMsa0-lfw5GPXkX0Wwf5SJ5pqP3_p1LFzpgOTpUYVCYf55bS-oomcDPXnKqT4vQ6bk07DfXo_BIL5DOZDOaLU/Qz6tYGRb1wTkT0VQX1QX2z1aTKwjxKca/14)[RENEW NOW

P.S. Pardon me for getting emotional, but I truly can't express my gratitude for everything that you've done for us. **
**At a time in American history where the radical left has made it their mission to DESTROY our country, our Constitution, our culture, and everything that we hold near and dear, your support sustained us and carried us through.**
**We won a massive victory last year thanks to your unwavering support, but I shudder at the thought of what we 'll do without a legendary patriot like you on our team.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Stefanik vs. Hochul
body:
I’m running for Governor

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**Friend, I’m in.**
I’ve just announced my campaign for Governor of New York.

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The tide is turning in the Empire State and the numbers show that voters are ready for a change:

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**That’s right.****Recent polling shows me LEADING the worst Governor in America Kathy Hochul, and I am just getting started.**
Fellow patriot, the stakes couldn’t be higher... AOC, Zohran Mamdani, and Kathy Hochul are going to destroy New York **[if we don’t stand and fight to stop them together](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Patriot, that’s where you come in.** I am humbly asking for your Day One Endorsement.

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I have a reputation in D.C. for winning hard races, from flipping a deep blue Obama district Republican in my very first campaign, to ousting Liz Cheney from GOP Leadership, I have never backed down from the tough fights that truly matter.
So, I’m asking you to stand with me for one more tough fight.
**_[Please join my campaign with your Day One Endorsement today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

_In Liberty,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bviO/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker

name: Kim (personal)
subject: Republicans don't know how to govern
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We're just a few hours away from our November mid-month deadline. Peter,

We're just a few hours away from our November mid-month deadline. So, I'm reaching out to share why it's important we hit our fundraising goal by midnight.

Republicans have made it clear they have no interest in governing. **In the past 18 weeks alone, Republicans in the House have only shown up to work 20 days!**

I first ran for Congress because my representative wasn't listening to the concerns of his constituents. I ran a campaign that focused on the concerns of the people in WA-08, offering real solutions so we could make actual progress. And because of it, we flipped this seat blue for the first time in history.

But now, just like my old conservative representative, Republicans in the House today are choosing to fight for their party, billionaires, and the wishes of Donald Trump over the interests of the people who elected them to office in the first place. **They are proving they are unfit for office, and that their obstruction will never stop.**

That's why we must retake the House majority to put a stop to the radical Republican agenda and get back to helping people in Washington State and across the country.

Momentum is on our side, Peter. All across the country, Democrats had some incredible wins in this month's election. Now, we have to keep it going, all the way to next November and beyond.

Will you donate $5 or whatever you can before midnight to help reach our mid-month fundraising goal?

You can chip in using this personal link here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-nov-25 &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119367324/582833332/1491818712?refcode=em25_251115_mm3_fndd_gq_act___KSP_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251115_mm3_fndd_gq_act___KSP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3d556bab-83c2-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDU1NmJhYi04M2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PSMxXP59Q5fJslIrLvNlmhYgVj_7F0a7et55yWyj5yE=)

clean_body: We're just a few hours away from our November mid-month deadline. Peter, We're just a few hours away from our November mid-month deadline. So, I'm reaching out to share why it's important we hit our fundraising goal by midnight. Republicans have made it clear they have no interest in governing. In the past 18 weeks alone, Republicans in the House have only shown up to work 20 days! I first ran for Congress because my representative wasn't listening to the concerns of his constituents. I ran a campaign that focused on the concerns of the people in WA-08, offering real solutions so we could make actual progress. And because of it, we flipped this seat blue for the first time in history. But now, just like my old conservative representative, Republicans in the House today are choosing to fight for their party, billionaires, and the wishes of Donald Trump over the interests of the people who elected them to office in the first place. They are proving they are unfit for office, and that their obstruction will never stop. That's why we must retake the House majority to put a stop to the radical Republican agenda and get back to helping people in Washington State and across the country. Momentum is on our side, Peter. All across the country, Democrats had some incredible wins in this month's election. Now, we have to keep it going, all the way to next November and beyond. Will you donate $5 or whatever you can before midnight to help reach our mid-month fundraising goal? You can chip in using this personal link here: = Thank you, Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Michael B. (personal account)
subject: Working late tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
I need your help to get this team across the finish line tonight.
| | |
---
Hi friend. It's Michael Bennet. Sorry to bother you so late tonight. I'll keep this brief.
With our mid-month deadline tonight at 11:59 p.m., my campaign team is putting in the overtime as well to close the 4.4% gap left to our $30,000 goal.
Now I know it doesn't sound like that big of a deal. But unless** you and at least 268 other supporters see this email and [give $5 or more by midnight _,_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119367977/582852006/43140476?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1068-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWQwOGM0MS04OGMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kN2i5fMM6-Pr07jFbHCM-vzQJIJmcnxK1eBHxsoepB4=) ** my finance director says we will not make it in time.
**Every donation will make a difference – so will you rush $5, or anything you can now, to get us across the finish line?**

Peter,
We only have a few hours left to hit our $20,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and we need your help to close the gap before the clock runs out.
I’m running for governor because I believe we can make California work better for everyone. From lowering the cost of living to expanding access to health care, I’m ready to take on the biggest challenges facing families across our state.
The stakes in this race couldn’t be higher. We have built amazing momentum so far, but we need to reach this goal before midnight to keep our campaign strong.

Peter ,
After an exhausting year of Donald Trump’s chaos-presidency, here’s the top wish on our holiday list:
Donald Trump losing a congressional seat he should be winning in a cakewalk!
In Tennessee’s once deep-red 7th District – a district he carried by twenty-two points just last year – the outcome is suddenly a toss-up. Voters are fed up with rising costs, and they’re starting to ask why the man blocking the release of the Epstein files is so desperate to keep them buried.
Our mission is simple: flip this seat blue and hand Donald Trump a public humiliation he absolutely does not expect.
If you’re with us, help us surge resources into TN-07 right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11152025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11152025]
Let’s make the chaos catch up to him.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Asking for your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Deb here.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5718%2E400544%2EKOGcSx)
Hello, Deb Haaland here.
My campaign is approaching an important mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, so I wanted to send you a quick note to ask you for your help.
I’m ready to fight for our home as the next Governor of New Mexico, but I can’t do it without you. I’m so proud to be running a grassroots campaign powered by your support, and I hope I can count on you once more before midnight.
With New Mexico’s governorship tending to flip parties every eight years, the already crowded Republican field shows they’re coming for this seat right on schedule. Before long, conservative super PACs and right-wing megadonors will start pouring millions into our state to try to buy a path to victory and take this state backwards.
That’s why I need your help.
**If you’re able, can you pitch in to help us cross the finish line? My team tells me we’re just $7,500 short, and your donation could be the one that puts us over the top. You can use the link below to make your donation:
**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_nov_mid-month_goal](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251115_2_mm.YSyHVz&amount=5&refcode=em20251115-5718&t=2&akid=5718%2E400544%2EKOGcSx)**
Thank you.
Be fierce,
Deb Haaland
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251115-2&t=3&refcode2=5718_400544_KOGcSx&akid=5718%2E400544%2EKOGcSx)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=4&akid=5718%2E400544%2EKOGcSx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=5&akid=5718%2E400544%2EKOGcSx)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

If you’re able, can you pitch in to help us cross the finish line? My team tells me we’re just $7,500 short, and your donation could be the one that puts us over the top. You can use the link below to make your donation: Thank you. Be fierce, Deb Haaland

body:

| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251115_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21873%2E878179%2EIi1uND) **Millions of Americans rely on the USPS for bills, Social Security checks, medication, mail-in ballots, and more — _but Trump doesn’t care._**

We can’t let him PRIVATIZE and DESTROY it — but we NEED your help!

[**As a top grassroots Democrat, will you sign our petition to stand with the USPS? We need 150 signatures from your state today! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251115_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21873%2E878179%2EIi1uND) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH YOUR LOCAL USPS OFFICE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251115_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21873%2E878179%2EIi1uND)
---

**FACT #2:** The USPS recently confirmed that more than 10,000+ postal workers will be laid off — _**your local post office could be next!**_

**FACT #3:** This is Trump’s latest attack on YOUR right to vote — he’s going after the USPS and mail-in ballots because he wants to RIG the 2026 election!

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is why I keep asking, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
You can make the difference.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97710?refcode=em20251115-9719&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9719%2E614464%2ENa5rVs)
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing my home, Peter.
Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So **[when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee, it’s because your contribution](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97710?refcode=em20251115-9719&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9719%2E614464%2ENa5rVs)** could make the difference between victory and defeat.
**Republicans see me as the top challenger to their Senate majority.** They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win. That means national attention will be on us.
I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you.
Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead.
**[I am asking you to contribute $15 or another amount that fits in your budget today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97710?refcode=em20251115-9719&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9719%2E614464%2ENa5rVs)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97711?refcode=em20251115-9719&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9719%2E614464%2ENa5rVs) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97711?refcode=em20251115-9719&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9719%2E614464%2ENa5rVs) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97710?refcode=em20251115-9719&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9719%2E614464%2ENa5rVs)
---
I deeply appreciate all your support,
Roy Cooper

clean_body: Peter, Don Jr. here I wanted to personally reach out and thank you for taking the time to complete my father's new census. Your commitment to our cause is what drives us forward, and we're grateful for your support. We reviewed your questionnaire, and we noticed you left Question 5 blank. I know it was an honest oversight, but I want to make sure your voice is fully heard. That's why I'm asking if you could review and re-submit your responses by 11:59PM tonight. You're one of our most valued allies in the fight to protect fair elections, and your input is crucial to our success. By taking a minute to revisit your census, you'll be helping us build a stronger, more just America. Thank you again for standing with us, Peter. You're making a real difference. | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

subject: Before midnight tonight:
body:

$7. That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to the DNC before midnight. $7 because it’s up to us to build on Democrats’ momentum from the 2025 elections. $7 because we need to expand the infrastructure that allowed us to win big in 2025 to every state in the country. $7 because if we can win back Congress next year, we’ll put a major check on Trump’s power and prevent more damage and destruction. $7 because in just a few weeks, we will be required to report what we’ve raised this month — and a big number will show Republicans that we’re just getting started, and that we’re coming for their majority in the midterms. name: Tom Leonard
subject: A Complete Insult to Every Parent in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Leonard for Governor
body:
| | | Peter, What we just witnessed wasn’t a mistake.

_It wasn’t a slip-up._

**It was a TOTAL, COMPLETE INSULT to every parent in this country.**

At the Michigan Department of Education hearing, an “expert” and _I’m using that word VERY loosely_ — said parents don’t know what’s best for their own children.

---
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/jsF3S0OlvlPBmroz6IDySJFMNspAx_E5bEYTeczvOONQ1FLsZXKX7LZPuGKfPKJdaxrZ3v__gDm2x131_wGfr6aeFXw3U7tVRTmckvCZ55cXhfPiLvkCxi_LIvClBpEFvR273C-fCawOYG1kBWauTB0KViPSud_hxbbxdvaJ67lasj1-QW7YjtzltyniAD92JmnNjrUbEPp7qJw-t5kC7YwR1wbFA4VFanvvWaCtzUY-D-HKA0qbl0K5ZCJXDiUFiHGhCl1DL9fm-neIfq9ANgh4d6GVmXx1hgojNndRsgK0mon25zn32Z-3PuIIr0SoGv-wGgHFFCYyfz23Ah6eqBHmZtQEQqqCOFWjGX9UZN7DyoHQ0Ubc_X6WdfNe8x4L9MeXN7nq8NQAkXEIvwq6J19CHYegn57DkQtfuIT-2_cFfK8oQhXIoDgfpajnpNEUTnKiiY9TLULoVQRgC-_d1IyH8-Kt4nYU0kXAHF8TA9PD-ZhIDAuNS8-U3b7qyJlvqeVXpzYn5zE_QwQu1ANvSi7OMnMj_dXwOyDwtpesvWfygPtjv1_PirqGnO5Btz0va5Dtq6fgaiZngnskVgK3Vqv9qwoB5lvVThgcNzr1iF7JrZuAZ8jVx6_0XrVmNVq4omL5FRySg43nEWw_b5n9OV-ln_PrnqqTiUzxnUM8fAQK-_Vpaxq5SxvWgqp2DTefveiORwIUAwGgsL_opUNP3ipWPofg4pXI5ur-2g7-bFF-CHhcq9gU2umc8smhC9isCe90kUNWZn3oFNujiEq831jq2L07H82AXBwBT8BYqrV3/D6ejnWeV9xNOyUG-T8RUAMZ5SlIb6iH0/14)

| | _It’s unbelievable._ _It’s disgraceful._ **And it should make every parent furious.** Tom Leonard here. As a father of three, I am **FIRED UP.** I am __**DONE**__ watching the Radical Left try to sneak their twisted ideologies into our classrooms — rewriting history, brainwashing our kids, attacking parents and grandparents like _**you and I don’t get a say.**_
---
[ **JOIN TOM LEONARD IN THE FIGHT FOR PARENTAL CHOICE** ](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/PDh5PylXZMdL5vqVaGHhJjpOtzFVfGQYcncPIK9Y2wdLG8jumZ3eFolGysB_a_NKUDa4ItdhpKpUn7cOD2MBLoQ1p1Os5q7Q-iBOUOKmiiUDX5METH-gwteXMRfr-5JBnPTQ4OICVWxa0k4ItVHqreF4H1X1c82zVYD6j6nosZihWOWDXAfqgwXQrLRuTdviok1Yf8pmzUi3GNX2iubyAXAuUo7h4-WRpppIDdH_OYzxrVBAdpMbldTepu3zdRvWBZMGsD9VUebTu4rx9ZBxI_tgUJ4qELDDZkWd3SxAdjmoCu3s-MmiXhJ4bKOgSogN2LWv0AD_mXywaaMAjwt2TuHbAVGnIyPVPeHfGZ32DSb7QP_dsIXYxTTikNgfdH8wZo7sCVMqKdIWM_-W3VPsi2Osz1o4H8frNteuIs-ePSSv28gYMMAZXBJG_UbhKbpuKSvrN1G0Zd-Mc7-m5scyfwjsg2-SLqGCudtHsjl1wIIiKbtMRg8yU4z82HDM1-1fjyQG26JzvUCivdGRoibOju5j71Tbz0qaav01bfqDMKIiL-ySpzHwFBe8Qv1N0ifH8PYBuuGP9rE80vmw_Hn5yCf0s2GGgjHlPolsoG4DSkJ2DtUZ-vz5fpglIufgUeWR5ikx0s1Q1z-jOx1UoPE2tTQXhkVKVTWiVlJwi516SEwmLBKpvG5V119mcOKCy378xuv8nE54C0XhszTNqlm71ep5MAiCw7CxjAhPljZyhQCFU43x53nm1U_iSsAXIAQ24gU6R8pO1NKdm0aE7zVektsZwTeOes9Vk-IvkgKnUWjA/21ayydt3NiwE4wi5Z8ySlGkNtOKlQuIT/14)

If there’s one thing I’ve learned since running for Republican Governor of Michigan, it’s that radical left administrators, school boards, and bureaucrats __**HATE**__ when parents get involved in their child’s education. **So If you’re ready to push back against the chaos...** **If you’re determined to take back our schools and put parents at the center of their children’s education...** **I’m looking for America-First fighters ready to stand their ground and face the Radical Left head-on to defend the sacred right of parental choice.** The moment to fight back is**NOW.** These leftist education bureaucrats are actively poisoning the minds of our youth and pushing a political agenda that will destroy our country. _Unlike them, I’m not backed by powerful institutions or special-interest groups trying to control the narrative._ This movement is powered by parents and grandparents like you who are willing to step up and fight $5, $10, $15 at a time. Every year the Indoor Environmental Healthcare and Hospitality Association (IEHA) puts on the Housekeeper Olympics in Las Vegas, where hotel housekeepers compete in events like bed-making races, vacuum relays, mop-bucket sprints -- and they even cheerleading routines.

# **[Mamdani's election reignites Staten Island's bid to secede from New York](http://trk.libertyledger._kSNNWUw)**
---
Leaders of New York City’s “Forgotten Borough” — and most conservative enclave — are re-introducing stalled legislation for Staten Island to secede from what they fear will become the People’s Republic of Mamdani. The Democratic Socialist “could not be further out of sync with the values of communities on Staten Island, and I’d argue that [...]...Click to read more

---
Soap? Check. Bottled water? Check. Toothbrushes? Nope. As judges move to order better conditions at U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement’s facilities where they process, and sometimes hold, newly arrested migrants, the agency is drawing a line at the demand for dental hygiene, arguing it’s too dangerous to issue toothbrushes to every detainee. The problem, ICE [...]...Click to read more

[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/7mn9bGRzGx3idy_C1erS6w)
# **[Middle school boy faces 10 felonies in AI nude scandal. But expulsion of girl, 13 — an alleged victim — sparks firestorm.](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/7mn9bGRzGx3idy_C1erS6w)**
---
A Louisiana middle school boy is facing 10 felony counts for using AI to create fake nude photos of female classmates and sharing them with other students, according to multiple reports. However, one alleged female victim has been expelled following her reported reaction to the scandal. On Aug. 26, detectives with the Lafourche Parish Sheriff's Office launched an investigation into reports that male students had shared fake nude photos of female classmates at the Sixth Ward Middle School in Choctaw.'What’s going on here, I’ll be quite frank, is nothing more than disgusting.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/7mn9bGRzGx3idy_C1erS6w)

name: Troy Downing
subject: If you hate BS political emails, read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-BSXVmONFvLYRUflafDA)If you hate BS political emails, good. You’re exactly who I want to talk to, Peter.
This is Troy Downing.
I’m a combat vet, not a career politician. I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.
I ran for Congress — and won — because I tell the truth and fight for __We the People__ , not party bosses, lobbyists, or woke elites.**
****And because I refuse to play their games, the Left is coming after my GOP House seat.**[ RUSH HELP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)They want me out because I call out their radical agenda, support President Trump, and won’t back down on the issues that matter.
In other words, I’m “ _deplorable._ ”
“ _Garbage_.”
“ _MAGA Extremist_.”
They can label me whatever they want, but I guarantee you it won’t stop me from standing up to open-border policy and the mutilation of our kids in the name of “gender ideology.”
But here's the real problem: **Democrats are pummeling us with cash. **
They’ve stockpiled a **_$40 MILLION advantage over Republicans_** , aiming it straight at flipping the House Majority.
If I don’t flip the switch on fundraising soon, defending this seat will be nearly impossible.
And if we lose it, we don’t just lose my seat. We’ll lose our only chance at advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.
I’m not asking for a handout. I’m asking for an ally. [If you’re ready to join this fight, will you chip in $15.50 today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._AZld-7W1O1fKQ)[JOIN THE FIGHT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._Ac6Ndc9WTYRW48WyeX1A)[DONATE TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you for your patriotic support,
-Troy Downing** _Combat Veteran in Congress_**| |

subject: Kash Patel fires senior FBI officials
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
The swamp is being drained

| | | | _**MAGA MEMO**_
---

In a sweeping move that sources say amounts to a ‘purge,’ the Trump administration has fired three senior FBI officials—each tied to the Bureau’s investigation of January 6th.
**This is a DIRECT sign that the Department of Justice is done tolerating insubordination, leaks, and cover-ups.**
All three officials had long tenures at the Bureau and held senior leadership roles.
With more dismissals expected, the Trump administration is sending a strong message to those who might dare to undermine it: **_You will be fired._**
**_BUT THERE’S A PROBLEM_** As Kash Patel and Trump’s DOJ fight back, Democrats are doing everything they can to undermine their efforts.****

[STAND WITH TRUMP & KASH PATEL](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf87h5tnq9727tjedk8s7iaujr7lrh31th146tmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9ie2ob1c1h2bs)

This is CRUCIAL to the America-First movement. With years-long FBI corruption finally being cleaned up, we can’t let ANYTHING stand in our way of draining the swamp.

My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcj4voijecgnrttosnle36vdeggra4jekh856p2o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9ie2ob5cph2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zntpe8l9p1sfqrvqjjdnl7go8pn0ogv3spessvno_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9ie2ob5cph2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk9kf50ce7rhlobs6dcm1o06b0injth51uk5aueg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9ie2ob5cph2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlbpjgb9tnvm3k1ahuaa4bme9dd100ica1h1osv8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9ie2ob5cph2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvuia1ktcf8qate76uqo06dtu0dpejkh4rfh5e5o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9ie2ob5cph2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs0h80tsjb0mkbhgn1c21rc22tj3ks7ublv8t8ig_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9ie2ob5cph2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**

Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. name: so dark
subject: A 17 year old girl who was saving up for braces
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Enough with all of the predators and their army of enablers in the MAGA movement. Out with them all—starting with Lauren Boebert.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bu3B2mT-bfPtnNF0o2Eszs8tyOuOh0jXfyFDKeRNb8yxUN3VYR0ou3mI9gmYq0oJ8OISWaxhC63ttsAWd69LuR4-yPVRULcjGh0Xt5uFjj-bbM0cBl1WoTuIOCm6El_p3sApfeQfWjaiXRkbViObAAGHbOjdDz675p2QWwHbQ5nt10D_A1tj34oAw1IXy4h6lcIkEI10UXdRjqsmqav-tUFIJDHjkHqM&c=odCmouDwGslcgD7zhpb9wHuTtwjyr_E3pjNrnr68FPQE5obIS7EM2w==&ch=jXwubjWMT6cYD4VPsszscAVHPhXFRgJvXGDRe0BHOHvSWtu5b3-3GQ==)
---
|

Peter,
When Donald Trump nominated his fellow pervert and MAGA ally Matt Gaetz for Attorney General after the 2024 election, news stories re-emerged of Gaetz's statutory rape involving a 17 year-old high school student.
Just this week we got to hear the girl's side of the story via a New York Times expose. The story describes how at the time she met Gaetz she was living at a homeless shelter and needed the money to save up for braces to fix her teeth. It's just so dark.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bu3B2mT-bfPtnNF0o2Eszs8tyOuOh0jXfyFDKeRNb8yxUN3VYR0ou3mI9gmYq0oJ8OISWaxhC63ttsAWd69LuR4-yPVRULcjGh0Xt5uFjj-bbM0cBl1WoTuIOCm6El_p3sApfeQfWjaiXRkbViObAAGHbOjdDz675p2QWwHbQ5nt10D_A1tj34oAw1IXy4h6lcIkEI10UXeaZqXZnluF3zoIi6HU7r3x&c=odCmouDwGslcgD7zhpb9wHuTtwjyr_E3pjNrnr68FPQE5obIS7EM2w==&ch=jXwubjWMT6cYD4VPsszscAVHPhXFRgJvXGDRe0BHOHvSWtu5b3-3GQ==)
---
Despite the mountains of evidence against Gaetz, Trump nominated him as Attorney General. Support for him was so low, even the most vocal MAGA cheerleaders refused to get on board with the idea. Trump ultimately was forced to withdraw Gaetz from consideration.
Only the most depraved and hardcore defenders of Trump remained in favor of Gaetz as AG. Lauren Boebert not only enthusiastically endorsed Gaetz, she also went on a news blitz fighting for him to lead the Justice Department:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bu3B2mT-bfPtnNF0o2Eszs8tyOuOh0jXfyFDKeRNb8yxUN3VYR0ou3mI9gmYq0oJ8OISWaxhC63ttsAWd69LuR4-yPVRULcjGh0Xt5uFjj-bbM0cBl1WoTuIOCm6El_p3sApfeQfWjaiXRkbViObAAGHbOjdDz675p2QWwHbQ5nt10D_A1tj34oAw1IXy4h6lcIkEI10UXd603ENQCvoQeqUvC54PWN6&c=odCmouDwGslcgD7zhpb9wHuTtwjyr_E3pjNrnr68FPQE5obIS7EM2w==&ch=jXwubjWMT6cYD4VPsszscAVHPhXFRgJvXGDRe0BHOHvSWtu5b3-3GQ==)
---
After the Attorney General nomination fiasco had passed, Boebert floated Matt Gaetz as a Special Counsel to oversee any and all investigations into the Epstein Files scandal.
It couldn't be more obvious: Boebert's judgment is fatally flawed and she has got to go. The company she keeps is more than troubling--it's disqualifying.
Boebert is in Congress because of just 546 votes and in 2024 when Trisha Calvarese, her Democratic opponent ran against her we had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county.
Trisha's back to finish the job in 2026 but without a groundswell of support from good Democrats who want to see enablers like Boebert kicked out of office, Trisha faces an uphill battle - a possible stinging defeat instead of an incredible victory for the entire country.
[Can you chip in $25 or more to help Trisha fire Lauren Boebert? Anything you can give helps us build the team and support we need to finally defeat Boebert and deliver America from the embarrassment of Lauren Boebert:](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bu3B2mT-bfPtnNF0o2Eszs8tyOuOh0jXfyFDKeRNb8yxUN3VYR0ou3mI9gmYq0oJ02Bx-A5C4X_CnEGu8KjgbvGzBCc70Cn5TSGvEfGJEQMMqQbw3-6YW64kW5UtFqJefAq397iLVpuCXuh4wc3ev_ERAm_mxIbnpTH6ePA8T2CUtE83Osv-oPky9jSuzsw3_nRYJ8ZTRZhWR1f5cUOl3hzdJAGXV-FXQ-ggnioKmAw=&c=odCmouDwGslcgD7zhpb9wHuTtwjyr_E3pjNrnr68FPQE5obIS7EM2w==&ch=jXwubjWMT6cYD4VPsszscAVHPhXFRgJvXGDRe0BHOHvSWtu5b3-3GQ==)

Peter,
When Donald Trump nominated his fellow pervert and MAGA ally Matt Gaetz for Attorney General after the 2024 election, news stories re-emerged of Gaetz's statutory rape involving a 17 year-old high school student.
Just this week we got to hear the girl's side of the story via a New York Times expose. The story describes how at the time she met Gaetz she was living at a homeless shelter and needed the money to save up for braces to fix her teeth. It's just so dark.

After the Attorney General nomination fiasco had passed, Boebert floated Matt Gaetz as a Special Counsel to oversee any and all investigations into the Epstein Files scandal.
It couldn't be more obvious: Boebert's judgment is fatally flawed and she has got to go. The company she keeps is more than troubling--it's disqualifying.

name: Defenders of Wildlife
subject: Impact Report: The earth-shaking consequences of fossil fuel development
body:
Here's what's happening at Defenders of Wildlife

Here's what's happening at Defenders of Wildlife
                  

                  

(https://support.defenders.org/s/4208477/38SyG9Xl)

(https://support.defenders.org/s/4208478/38SyG9Xl)

WILDLIFE IN THE NEWS

“This moment asks something of us: to set aside what we think we know and look clearly at what’s unfolding. Not with blind enthusiasm. Not with predetermined opposition. But with the kind of honest curiosity that creates space for something new and better.”

Kaitie Schneider, Rockies and Plains Representative, on wolf reintroduction in Colorado.

Read Here → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208479/38SyG9Xl)

 

Marine mammals need our help: Defend the MMPA today!

America’s incredible variety of marine mammals – dolphins, whales, sea otters and even polar bears – are protected by the Marine Mammals Protection Act. But the MMPA is under attack in Congress by a new draft proposal. Our representatives need to hear from all of us right away! Sign a message to your representative urging them to stand against attempts to dismantle the MMPA and endanger marine wildlife! (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208480/38SyG9Xl)

 

Shaking the Earth: Seismic Exploration and Alaska’s Wildlife (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208481/38SyG9Xl)

Seismic exploration is a way the oil and gas industry “sees” fuel underground in the Arctic. But in the process, massive thumper trucks and other large vehicles can collapse polar bear dens, destabilize the tundra, and cause other serious harms to wildlife.

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208482/38SyG9Xl)

Shaking the Earth: Seismic Exploration and Alaska’s Wildlife (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208481/38SyG9Xl)

Seismic exploration is a way the oil and gas industry “sees” fuel underground in the Arctic. But in the process, massive thumper trucks and other large vehicles can collapse polar bear dens, destabilize the tundra, and cause other serious harms to wildlife.

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208482/38SyG9Xl)

Grizzly Bear Listing and the “Spirit of the American Wilderness” (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208483/38SyG9Xl)

Thanks to the Endangered Species Act, progress has been made to conserve grizzly bears in the U.S. But these iconic animals are still a long way from recovery. Learn about the six recovery zones and grizzly protections that need to be maintained.

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208484/38SyG9Xl)

Notes from the Field: Gray Wolves and Bison in Yellowstone (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208485/38SyG9Xl)

Defenders’ President and CEO Andrew Bowman reflects on our work with wildlife in Yellowstone, from gray wolf reintroduction to collaborating on bison transfers to Tribal lands.

What is the Marine Mammal Protection Act? (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208487/38SyG9Xl)

Marine mammals include whales and dolphins, of course, but also manatees, sea otters and even polar bears. The Marine Mammal Protection Act protects all these iconic animals – but proposed “reforms” stand to weaken the MMPA.

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4208488/38SyG9Xl)

clean_body: Here's what's happening at Defenders of Wildlife Here's what's happening at Defenders of Wildlife                                       () () WILDLIFE IN THE NEWS “This moment asks something of us: to set aside what we think we know and look clearly at what’s unfolding. Not with blind enthusiasm. Not with predetermined opposition. But with the kind of honest curiosity that creates space for something new and better.” Kaitie Schneider, Rockies and Plains Representative, on wolf reintroduction in Colorado. Read Here → ()   Marine mammals need our help: Defend the MMPA today! America’s incredible variety of marine mammals – dolphins, whales, sea otters and even polar bears – are protected by the Marine Mammals Protection Act. But the MMPA is under attack in Congress by a new draft proposal. Our representatives need to hear from all of us right away! Sign a message to your representative urging them to stand against attempts to dismantle the MMPA and endanger marine wildlife! ()   Shaking the Earth: Seismic Exploration and Alaska’s Wildlife () Seismic exploration is a way the oil and gas industry “sees” fuel underground in the Arctic. But in the process, massive thumper trucks and other large vehicles can collapse polar bear dens, destabilize the tundra, and cause other serious harms to wildlife. name: Luke Oberholtzer
subject: Breaking development could shatter MAGA’s Chicago occupation
body:
The streets of Chicago feel right different now.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QjGNS9_qCRsFDhEHY7OJ-D60CvoUnl8kvzut3dQnRlJ-yE3TtFCJLIJl913JEaRkUWS6E0FLqXRb-F-UBzcQGM8H9eYiYCOOMClJu3_cGnpKLnRH8QcjvdeBesc-_GfJDkGOAYERyi6lffSIm97ViDwwo3v9uGN-LrwozoQ54OO4t0YO0zJ3rd-7jobE5yvuGYVefG_OPzhCWPIdsMfN_dVfaB3GDDRB&c=rfso85paGy4WaAL4BC69-DnmNHZx9amI-nW5LwZz8hc-OZhxe-qDSw==&ch=TfeaL1ukgIINewB7EtDzJK29FOH6mHIQTLf6efMePJsHS9c-vSdPDg==)
---
|
Peter,
The streets of Chicago feel right different now.
Unmarked vans prowl at night--masked ICE agents snatching neighbors in silence. Protesters are dragged across pavement by masked federal agents whose names are hidden behind black tape. Soldiers march through city intersections meant for kids on bikes and buses to work.
At food banks, federal workers wait in line--their government paychecks frozen. Families scrape together meals as SNAP benefits disappear.
Children fall asleep hungry. Seniors cut their pills in half, praying it's enough to last the week.
This is Trump's America--and it's only been 11 months.
But earlier this month, there was a beacon of hope.
Across the country, Democrats won landslide victories. Not the kind propped up by corporate donors or political dynasties--but led by a new generation of Democrats, unfazed by Trump's fascist threats, determined to defend democracy and deliver for the people suffering most.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QjGNS9_qCRsFDhEHY7OJ-D60CvoUnl8kvzut3dQnRlJ-yE3TtFCJLIJl913JEaRkUWS6E0FLqXRb-F-UBzcQGM8H9eYiYCOOMClJu3_cGnpKLnRH8QcjvdeBesc-_GfJDkGOAYERyi6lffSIm97ViDwwo3v9uGN-LrwozoQ54OO4t0YO0zJ3rd-7jobE5yvuGYVefG_OPziPKy0iUzoX1PX6rZgWXcYM&c=rfso85paGy4WaAL4BC69-DnmNHZx9amI-nW5LwZz8hc-OZhxe-qDSw==&ch=TfeaL1ukgIINewB7EtDzJK29FOH6mHIQTLf6efMePJsHS9c-vSdPDg==)
---
|
They came from every faith, every color, every corner of America--a generation forged in crisis but united in purpose. And together, they dominated Republicans from coast to coast, determined to rebuild this nation for the working class.
I saw that energy firsthand when I worked for Zohran Mamdani during the primary in New York City. The establishment spent millions trying to destroy our movement--but our campaign was powered by people, and we won anyway.
That same exact spirit brought me home to Chicago to work for Bushra Amiwala.
And I'm seeing it again. The same fire. The same defiance. The same hope.
Bushra's campaign isn't fueled by big donors--it's powered by neighbors, students, and working people who believe in a better future for America. While establishment campaigns write checks, Bushra is building a movement.
When ICE began terrorizing our neighbors, Bushra stood by their side even in the face of tear gas and rubber bullets. When AIPAC poured hundreds of thousands into our opponent's campaign, Bushra outraised them with grassroots donations from ordinary people. And when others paid canvassers to collect signatures, our entirely volunteer-led team hit the streets--door by door, block by block--until we got Bushra on the ballot.
This is what democracy looks like in the hands of a new generation.
Now we need to keep building. The stakes are too high to let up for even a day. Please Peter,[ will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to send Bushra's movement from the streets of Chicago to the halls of Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QjGNS9_qCRsFDhEHY7OJ-D60CvoUnl8kvzut3dQnRlJ-yE3TtFCJLIJl913JEaRktjuY0ILK8C6pAIkp-GkjPXd15Nts4aNVWIFxgY7xNSt7FtFOzdUFXrgPL286-_iDDVFuwtblAHLQp2tQeFJU4cqMUjQYaRZKF0nWa3KuzzFH3NfuMVG6j_UtiZE7V2IOex7BIaI6zIcJyrwFQSTY5uoxHGpz-LO4RvmynVXaoCw=&c=rfso85paGy4WaAL4BC69-DnmNHZx9amI-nW5LwZz8hc-OZhxe-qDSw==&ch=TfeaL1ukgIINewB7EtDzJK29FOH6mHIQTLf6efMePJsHS9c-vSdPDg==)

clean_body: The streets of Chicago feel right different now. | | | | | == | Peter, The streets of Chicago feel right different now. Unmarked vans prowl at night--masked ICE agents snatching neighbors in silence. Protesters are dragged across pavement by masked federal agents whose names are hidden behind black tape. Soldiers march through city intersections meant for kids on bikes and buses to work. At food banks, federal workers wait in line--their government paychecks frozen. Families scrape together meals as SNAP benefits disappear. Children fall asleep hungry. Seniors cut their pills in half, praying it's enough to last the week. This is Trump's America--and it's only been 11 months. But earlier this month, there was a beacon of hope. Across the country, Democrats won landslide victories. Not the kind propped up by corporate donors or political dynasties--but led by a new generation of Democrats, unfazed by Trump's fascist threats, determined to defend democracy and deliver for the people suffering most. | | == | They came from every faith, every color, every corner of America--a generation forged in crisis but united in purpose. And together, they dominated Republicans from coast to coast, determined to rebuild this nation for the working class. I saw that energy firsthand when I worked for Zohran Mamdani during the primary in New York City. The establishment spent millions trying to destroy our movement--but our campaign was powered by people, and we won anyway. That same exact spirit brought me home to Chicago to work for Bushra Amiwala. And I'm seeing it again. The same fire. The same defiance. The same hope. Bushra's campaign isn't fueled by big donors--it's powered by neighbors, students, and working people who believe in a better future for America. While establishment campaigns write checks, Bushra is building a movement. When ICE began terrorizing our neighbors, Bushra stood by their side even in the face of tear gas and rubber bullets. When AIPAC poured hundreds of thousands into our opponent's campaign, Bushra outraised them with grassroots donations from ordinary people. And when others paid canvassers to collect signatures, our entirely volunteer-led team hit the streets--door by door, block by block--until we got Bushra on the ballot. This is what democracy looks like in the hands of a new generation. Now we need to keep building. The stakes are too high to let up for even a day. # IN YOUR WEEKLY BULLETIN:
---
|
---
| |
From dangerous overpasses to exploding county budgets, this week’s Sunday Bulletin exposes the crime, politics, and drama shaping Pennsylvania’s headlines:
**INVESTIGATIVE** : Delaware County homeowners are bracing for impact as a 19%, 24%, and 5% tax-increase trifecta lands all at once — adding $409 a year to the average tax bill. Are years of deprivatization and mismanagement finally catching up?
**REGIONAL NEWS** : Police seize over $50,000 in cash and drugs in Willow Grove, Horsham officers break up a violent Tinder meet-up, and Central Bucks investigators hunt the juveniles who hurled concrete off an overpass, shattering a driver’s windshield.
**SPORTS** : Dave Dombrowski signals the Phillies may be ready to move on from Nick Castellanos, while Flyers Twitter spirals into chaos again as fans clash over Couturier vs. Michkov.
**POLITICS** : Pennsylvania’s judicial retention vote reveals a shifting electoral map — with surprising counties flipping blue while party leaders stare down high-stakes Congressional battles coming in 2026.
**EDITORIAL** : From a Hershey spa worker’s religious-rights lawsuit to the federal shutdown that achieved almost nothing, our editors cut through political fog to spotlight the consequences of broken leadership.”
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump Disavows Greene, Richest Small Towns, and an Ode to HoJos
body:
President Trump announced Friday night on Truth Social that he is [withdrawing his support](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOnjAQBeDTQOdftjGwFC7S0G3alGiwB5iNsdHYC-H2EX-OkHZGenrf-_U5fQIFiutP2NGWJU0RrxywFOSp8Pd-eMpwpiuvjBiRyW2YJy11K5QSqps8ULgnU3u7IGpsarSq7xo9KNl29WZ7r0C6YYC26-XcNwDz8KElttgajR-uJvukKaU6paRR5uXMbKTzTedRet-4ykj0VBK_vhLFsuES7nQiv1za62C3Uo5cNT8qPVZ6vK7rtaQ_j-L5V3o8UqBCLld6fIOE53RksQN_JSYUBe6QWPzzCYw-ccYdYxEOQshiQxYMsVBcRfiOUMiJjWLJYgb3-7keTDvwLZhOCDVbf1wUAuWur4xcd6Dwrlr-a9_T6r8BAAD__64VlWo) and endorsement of Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, calling her a "ranting lunatic."

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGupSAQRVeDM1-gQMwfMOjkxdnvaQ8NQqnVATGAGnffsfN28KenUif33j_f47elQNvy20Y0dU7jhlcJWCvmseYj7p6KPdNVloy4YSa3YhmBQ9cK0Qo9ekvhHlXjzYwIKBs0otcSvgTvdLOayc0dR93ZHiQAfOleciUm3gNOXom-IfPYhBBaCK6Eejk1Ke681B6599IxxdFTTfn1N9FWV5zDnU7ML5diE8xa616Y_MVgYDBkSwV92lIuz53BsM_EYFjoxLamtq7YBir16VLay97PmxyOGseSjuyQyffHz0A_OKKnIzL53i35D3M27paWjcn3NU1lDrf1XDbZ-P2iEKjonim-REvhf8r6o2lPA_8CAAD__0Kgj70) | |
# Sunday, November 16, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1907, President Theodore Roosevelt issued Proclamation 780 [admitting Oklahoma](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DEPmzAQBeBfYzYj2xjSDB66sKVrR2R8B7gxPmRfQPn3VdKf0Pk9fXp6vx_Tw8cU8_rL7-h4oSnjVRMyY5m4vPYDYvUnXXUtiBlLDBvWySjTS62lHibwMb0n24BbEA12DTp9Gzpz16ofms0BzLPtl-6HMaqfF9OH-6LDp2vh3t-gie6jaa0HrZXVtg12tipANwAqgC4IqxAiU2n_UMy84ZLedGJpA-1NchvzUUX3U5hRmPG6rpaeFbNnbFc6hRkRXsFzpCzM-C-QvvBF5SnMeBSsETCzZAR4y0JU8cTEssY1x7zKyp5xIwJ5FArJ71-rKQ6OK6YU63ATVq27j-m7iP_rxtOZvwEAAP__90mMdQ)—formed by merging the Indian and Oklahoma Territories—as the 46th state. Weeks later, he told Congress Oklahoma had a strong future due to its natural resources. Howard Johnson's restaurants and hotels dotted the American landscape beginning in the 1960s, but the brand faltered amid fast food competition, as detailed in today's ["_Whatever Happened To_..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd7F48IC4oNjGXbbd0jLwbLODjQUkVv5-lPmFqe_VOdL595gec0zxWP_OO9m25OmgqyZqjcrUynM_Q6zzK191LUQHleg3qpPgQt0AbqCnMMf0nrALdiESJDuyYLQUA3Clu80uxuDCwTtHdwXOIQnn7tLwABol-i7aDw0ANABHwN6jQ-6D1IF4CNIz5BRiy6X_n-PRNlrSO7-o9D7vXbJba2dl8g8TIxPjdV39MntyOX99DkyMa8nPszIxSpRcGYXDoDjnnInxzLV9FsBBczTKgASjlWRi7IoN5xVTilUbhnzd55h-lO1XnV5WfAcAAP__j9V4VA) Through today's sponsor, [Prison Fellowship International](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGupSAQRVeDM1-gQMwfMOjkxdnvaQ8NQqnVATGAGnffsfN28KenUif33j_f47elQNvy20Y0dU7jhlcJWCvmseYj7p6KPdNVloy4YSa3YhmBQ9cK0Qo9ekvhHlXjzYwIKBs0otcSvgTvdLOayc0dR93ZHiQAfOleciUm3gNOXom-IfPYhBBaCK6Eejk1Ke681B6599IxxdFTTfn1N9FWV5zDnU7ML5diE8xa616Y_MVgYDBkSwV92lIuz53BsM_EYFjoxLamtq7YBir16VLay97PmxyOGseSjuyQyffHz0A_OKKnIzL53i35D3M27paWjcn3NU1lDrf1XDbZ-P2iEKjonim-REvhf8r6o2lPA_8CAAD__0Kgj70), you can help bring the hope of Jesus to prisoners worldwide by giving them access to audio Bibles in their own languages—so even those who can’t read can finally hear and experience the life-changing power of Scripture.
|
---
## Trump Repudiates Marjorie Taylor Greene
President Trump [announced on Truth Social](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOnjAQBeDTQOdftjGwFC7S0G3alGiwB5iNsdHYC-H2EX-OkHZGenrf-_U5fQIFiutP2NGWJU0RrxywFOSp8Pd-eMpwpiuvjBiRyW2YJy11K5QSqps8ULgnU3u7IGpsarSq7xo9KNl29WZ7r0C6YYC26-XcNwDz8KElttgajR-uJvukKaU6paRR5uXMbKTzTedRet-4ykj0VBK_vhLFsuES7nQiv1za62C3Uo5cNT8qPVZ6vK7rtaQ_j-L5V3o8UqBCLld6fIOE53RksQN_JSYUBe6QWPzzCYw-ccYdYxEOQshiQxYMsVBcRfiOUMiJjWLJYgb3-7keTDvwLZhOCDVbf1wUAuWur4xcd6Dwrlr-a9_T6r8BAAD__64VlWo) on Friday that he was withdrawing his support for Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, calling her a “ranting lunatic.” The president vowed "complete and unyielding support" to any conservative primary challenger leading into the 2026 midterm elections. Greene, a longtime Trump ally, responded with [a post on X on Saturday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9u6yAUgPGnwVsiDgYMA8NdfKd0qCp1RPw5jqmwsYAkzdtX6St0_Ybf8H1e7MWlnPbrm9vQ9KXYHR8tY-9Yba-37YipuXt5tGtF3LGmsGKzjDJxAjiBtNGl_LR8iGZBZDgOaGCSI9NAhRxW4xflvFMTLp6ih8DFJHREz4UKjutpSOalAYAEoBz4OXDPaYijjEhjHAPhFGPqpZ6_Str7ikt-ljvWcyjbkM3a-9HI-I-wmbD5-1UJm9_xuHz8J2xu3fVbI2wGrbRUDBQVdBRKaVBDNfF4pJxTkxPh9Lq5lH_Z_qcXd8N-AgAA___hkHDt), writing, _“I never thought that fighting to release the Epstein files, defending women who were victims of rape, and fighting to expose the web of rich powerful elites would have caused this, but here we are...There needs to be a new way forward.”_ The criticism between the two erupted amid the release of [email exchanges from convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOwyAQBdDT4I6IGWMcFxTbuMu2W1oExmEibCIgiXL7VbJH2G6kkf7X-z-n5eQ48X75dhvZtuZlp2dN1BqVpZX7dgtc3SM_66UQ7VTYR6oLKhwkgASzBMfptegu2JUIqe_Iwmh6nEANpot2hWH0enSAhP4cjhNMOPkBezw618PUsX2nAYABUBr0weuzVj70JpAKofdCKwrccjlcM-8t0ppe-UHl4PPWJRtbu1XRfwmcBc4tUuSU3j-Bc8wbvUGf815J4DwYNcLRyM2Vay5MsrlXykX--WTIu0tBfuiy8NoEzl2x4fbklLiaUWh12Rx_Grr2r8keFn8DAAD__72mgPw), in which the president’s name is mentioned. Greene was among four Republicans to sign a discharge petition to force a vote in the House on requiring the Department of Justice to release all information about its probe of the disgraced financier.
## FAA Rolls Back Flight Cuts
The Federal Aviation Administration on Friday [reduced flight cuts by half](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL9G6mTskjzKLlSkcXdpUwpr7lLagCINkmfj_j5QfuHKwQAPM-_P5_pJmjRvv-mQpceyZnm3JL1LXXv9Op6sjV7l3bYqkqVq2KWtBszHhDihX5k0fa9u5CWKGLGjLDh7a24IH37clxmv4MECXpEIhaww3Hh2LA9xAn7U5aQhokcEh-4S3MNBYOtZgNmGwYGw9lIvf4vmvktM3-Ul9RLKMaZl7_3ZBvtrMPfB3Ol5HjirM9SuIclg7pFoikm3vU9VWq8aupbcpu0E5UNyn9r-1bm880Rak2ZpU-TIhoKN1hJc2SHBAwJ5CcCzvbmxLvx8a0ra_Dw42A7S9H9V_5HK12L-BQAA__8WkIom) required at 40 U.S. airports as the nation’s aviation system recovers after the government shutdown. The FAA said airlines will [need to cut only 3% of flights](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkE1ugzAUhE9jdkb-ISZZeFG1Ypdsu0TGfsCrjI3sl6DcvqJX6HZGM5r5vu_j3WHEtDzcBpbmPCY4agQiKCOV57YHrO6Vj7oUgAQF_Qp1VEJduJRcmjE4jO-xa4KdARToBqzsjVY3KS6mWS1cZhnAuZuaQGjl52vvr70TJugw-ck0aM82KaWRUnSya303dcIHbQKIELRnnYCAlEv7kzHRCnN85xeU1uetiXYl2ivTH0wNTA3HcbR-queL02dqmHKlnJgaTo2pYXaOzxGXlXiBSgU9YU6Vx7y4xB2WPRfidX1SyMeZY3rARB4D01-fjzsXgkvhpiDXptiwHxgjVtOzTiybw_g3i_7F8mXVbwAAAP__jn2LEQ), down from the current 6% mandated during the stalemate. The rollback comes as staffing levels for air traffic controllers have improved since they missed two paychecks. The FAA is about [3,500 air traffic controllers short](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ8GMiP_ATOBg0vI5tILkcfdQN8YjOwGNG-_mtW-waalUqm-799jfHiKtM1__YqOpzRueJWIzJhHzse6AxV_pqvMGXHDTGHBMmqpW6GUUN0InuJ7tDW4CVGjqdGpvjP6rmTb1YtrrX_e-_Z2sxqVVsaoFu8ooVctGG1kTe6zppTqlJJW2SbYp5UBTAcoAUyorEQgTrn5n2jjBaf4TifmJqS1jm5h3ktl_lR6qPRwXVdD24mFaZs_jUoPH6RKD4VTeInV5xey-MmOIjzlSBsWkRGOgGKKNC8swsFFTCmLKRP4twAsOzGKTkzei5QBs7Cm7Y2VdXawXxQjla6vrJxXT_H7Hf9K6en0VwAAAP__mMOMbw) of targeted staffing levels. Many had been working mandatory overtime and six-day weeks even before the shutdown led to working without pay.
## List: Best Places to Retire
Midland, Michigan, was ranked [the best place to retire](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD-PozAQRz-N6Yz8L-RSuLiGLtdeiQz-AXMyGNmTRPn2J3a33G7b955GM_P3PtwDJdqXP2GD5zkPO141gRll4PLYjkg1PPOrLgXYUWhaUQejzEVqLXU3xEDpPbgm-hkwsA28vnbW3LS6dM3qu2h-zeFqoo1OBzvOxkXc7BhvF-3gVEP-nKa17rRWTrt2cqNTU7RdhIrRTsIpROJc2n-Zdl4xp3d-orRT3prkV-ajCvtbmF6YviAkVA6M9lHPW87qi8tPIUw_orI8UphQJWdZwFROHgrTlFCF6XmF_DaTtMtTPqqwfd5xhAVN8fF4UUpUu6twatkCpY_9-EdPfXrzPwAA__9OtY8f), according to a ranking of 850 cities by _U.S. News_. The top locations had the best mix of affordability, quality of life, health care access, and other benefits. The top five were rounded out by Weirton, West Virginia, Homosassa Springs, Florida, The Woodlands, Texas, and Spring, Texas. [Midland scored top marks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OwyAQBOCnwV0sFgNJCopr3OXaK601u7b3hH8EJFHe_pS8wnVTjD5p5uc23FCSbPM3rhzqtA8bP0viWjkPNd_Xg6TgY3-WOTNvnCUuXAajjTsBnMAPhJJeg20oTMyGu4YDnH1nrqCdb5aAF0vuPI7onI1u5MsI9hq5cxP5CyM0Et4aAHgAbcG20Y5WR-o8sSbqorKaSeqe299dtrrwlF77g3Mb97VJYan1KKr7UqZXps-MiUvFyu29vLe8W8r0R8LIRZl-lbjIjNsnUsKNmhzoeEpKUvxZWT2vKOmD13898gjmLwAA__9AdXcm) on walkability, culture, retail establishments, and restaurants. The town is just a short drive from beaches at the edge of Lake Huron. The top 25 included nine cities in Florida and six in Texas. [See the full list here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD-PozAQRz-N6Yz8L-RSuLiGLtdeiQz-AXMyGNmTRPn2J3a33G7b955GM_P3PtwDJdqXP2GD5zkPO141gRll4PLYjkg1PPOrLgXYUWhaUQejzEVqLXU3xEDpPbgm-hkwsA28vnbW3LS6dM3qu2h-zeFqoo1OBzvOxkXc7BhvF-3gVEP-nKa17rRWTrt2cqNTU7RdhIrRTsIpROJc2n-Zdl4xp3d-orRT3prkV-ajCvtbmF6YviAkVA6M9lHPW87qi8tPIUw_orI8UphQJWdZwFROHgrTlFCF6XmF_DaTtMtTPqqwfd5xhAVN8fF4UUpUu6twatkCpY_9-EdPfXrzPwAA__9OtY8f).

We’re in the middle of a sprint to 2,000 investors—and just a few hundred away.

**Ever wonder:**

* How _The Flyover_ grew from 47 readers to 3.4 million in just 21⁄2 years, and what it means for _The Flyover’s_ future?

* How early investors helped grow our audience from 2.5M to 3.4M, and why early investors are seeing record momentum in growth, profit, and revenue?

* What makes our model work when legacy media is failing?

**Whatever happened to Howard Johnson's?** For decades, spotting an orange roof on the horizon meant you’d found a Howard Johnson’s. To travelers, HoJo wasn’t just a restaurant or motel: It was a promise of [delicious fried clams, frankforts, and 28 flavors of ice cream](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd7F48IC4oNjGXbbd0jLwbLODjQUkVv5-lPmFqe_VOdL595gec0zxWP_OO9m25OmgqyZqjcrUynM_Q6zzK191LUQHleg3qpPgQt0AbqCnMMf0nrALdiESJDuyYLQUA3Clu80uxuDCwTtHdwXOIQnn7tLwABol-i7aDw0ANABHwN6jQ-6D1IF4CNIz5BRiy6X_n-PRNlrSO7-o9D7vXbJba2dl8g8TIxPjdV39MntyOX99DkyMa8nPszIxSpRcGYXDoDjnnInxzLV9FsBBczTKgASjlWRi7IoN5xVTilUbhnzd55h-lO1XnV5WfAcAAP__j9V4VA), no matter where you were. How did that happen? The saga began 100 years ago in 1925, when Howard Deering Johnson transformed a tiny Quincy, Massachusetts, soda shop into a sensation with his rich, high-butterfat ice cream. Demand exploded, and Johnson embraced a new idea: he let independent operators use his name, menu, and recipes in exchange for a fee. This proto-franchising model allowed HoJo to expand rapidly just as Americans were discovering the joy of long-distance car travel. At its peak in the 1960s, Howard Johnson’s was the largest restaurant chain in America, [instantly recognizable with its bright orange roofs and cupolas.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUQOGnwVssLmBcDwxdvKVrR4uaS3xTfiygQXn7Kn2F7kffcD6v29VSoHT7sBFN83lL2GvA1rBsrfzE01G1j9zrrSAmLLQfWDfBxXQBuIDenKXw3NTgjEcUKAc0MGspFuCTHg6zeG8BFyknzt-kknaaJ6dRaakWoWY_kHlpAKABuAI17upL8d1J7ZA7J3emODpquYz3TKkd6MMzP7CMe45DMEdrZ2XynYmVibX3Pp6UGhas7VUwsfpA-7f1GCMysR652-Iu93ykmlNlYh2KcWenEKjqmSl-i5bCn97-teRhxG8AAAD__5x_dls) Then the decline hit. Competing fast-food chains delivered quicker, cheaper meals. HoJo’s buildings grew dated, franchise standards slipped, and new corporate owners treated the company more like a real-estate portfolio than a hospitality brand.

Bit by bit, the orange roofs disappeared, until the last Howard Johnson’s restaurant closed in Lake George, New York, in 2022. Today, only the hotel survives under Wyndham as a mid-priced brand. The empire that once fed America’s road trips has become a piece of Americana, a nostalgic reminder of the way we used to travel. _Were you a Howard Johnson's fan? Let us know what your favorite part of the experience was by replying to this email._

Marjorie Taylor Greene, calling her a “ranting lunatic.” The president vowed "complete and unyielding support" to any conservative primary challenger leading into the 2026 midterm elections. Greene, a longtime Trump ally, responded with , writing, “I never thought that fighting to release the Epstein files, defending women who were victims of rape, and fighting to expose the web of rich powerful elites would have caused this, but here we are...There needs to be a new way forward.” The criticism between the two erupted amid the release of , in which the president’s name is mentioned. Greene was among four Republicans to sign a discharge petition to force a vote in the House on requiring the Department of Justice to release all information about its probe of the disgraced financier. FAA Rolls Back Flight Cuts The Federal Aviation Administration on Friday required at 40 U.S. airports as the nation’s aviation system recovers after the government shutdown. The FAA said airlines will , down from the current 6% mandated during the stalemate. The rollback comes as staffing levels for air traffic controllers have improved since they missed two paychecks. The FAA is about of targeted staffing levels. Many had been working mandatory overtime and six-day weeks even before the shutdown led to working without pay. To travelers, HoJo wasn’t just a restaurant or motel: It was a promise of , no matter where you were. How did that happen? The saga began 100 years ago in 1925, when Howard Deering Johnson transformed a tiny Quincy, Massachusetts, soda shop into a sensation with his rich, high-butterfat ice cream. Demand exploded, and Johnson embraced a new idea: he let independent operators use his name, menu, and recipes in exchange for a fee. This proto-franchising model allowed HoJo to expand rapidly just as Americans were discovering the joy of long-distance car travel. At its peak in the 1960s, Howard Johnson’s was the largest restaurant chain in America, Then the decline hit. Competing fast-food chains delivered quicker, cheaper meals. HoJo’s buildings grew dated, franchise standards slipped, and new corporate owners treated the company more like a real-estate portfolio than a hospitality brand. Bit by bit, the orange roofs disappeared, until the last Howard Johnson’s restaurant closed in Lake George, New York, in 2022. Today, only the hotel survives under Wyndham as a mid-priced brand. | | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message- will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM-OmzAQh5_G3Ig8nmAnBx-yS7LaQ7pVtqJHazCGWMIYYUNfv2K1fYDeRt_80Xy_33dzJz_6afhBwWm7ebMkE9eldSnbJ03W5ZhynAcXl8EZwUVVApQg9zkoOm07iaJwGpREcQaFWDz1uef9GRXAGbkEiT2p_giOVIUWnZSF1_slAJAAUCEcqqo7taeOWqqQK67Yka9zR9mlg41TcstG2W_OT1PcqzgdbAzFqJ85z4nhhYkbEzcKZMl-tRe3bQcbmbjN1AtOtgU8yaMCzvC25mBSXBfrGNYv9Vv5uDZMyB0H1_k1MKyv929iKczkh4lhvT_NFYB5qd_M5X75ZT4_Hh-f5nFtzM9L-dq8f-9ky7B-bd7Lf5rForv5jx9Hn-QuNwTy45dD_v_UNy3-BgAA__8LlYvS) ** You're one of America's most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system. And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal. >> George Soros' push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York's horrible Letitia James who's now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants. It's their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros' native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the "Stop Soros Law." The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn't drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens. That's exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It's why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive - and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM-OmzAQh5_G3Ig8nmAnBx-yS7LaQ7pVtqJHazCGWMIYYUNfv2K1fYDeRt_80Xy_33dzJz_6afhBwWm7ebMkE9eldSnbJ03W5ZhynAcXl8EZwUVVApQg9zkoOm07iaJwGpREcQaFWDz1uef9GRXAGbkEiT2p_giOVIUWnZSF1_slAJAAUCEcqqo7taeOWqqQK67Yka9zR9mlg41TcstG2W_OT1PcqzgdbAzFqJ85z4nhhYkbEzcKZMl-tRe3bQcbmbjN1AtOtgU8yaMCzvC25mBSXBfrGNYv9Vv5uDZMyB0H1_k1MKyv929iKczkh4lhvT_NFYB5qd_M5X75ZT4_Hh-f5nFtzM9L-dq8f-9ky7B-bd7Lf5rForv5jx9Hn-QuNwTy45dD_v_UNy3-BgAA__8LlYvS)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM-OmzAQh5_G3Ig8nmAnBx-yS7LaQ7pVtqJHazCGWMIYYUNfv2K1fYDeRt_80Xy_33dzJz_6afhBwWm7ebMkE9eldSnbJ03W5ZhynAcXl8EZwUVVApQg9zkoOm07iaJwGpREcQaFWDz1uef9GRXAGbkEiT2p_giOVIUWnZSF1_slAJAAUCEcqqo7taeOWqqQK67Yka9zR9mlg41TcstG2W_OT1PcqzgdbAzFqJ85z4nhhYkbEzcKZMl-tRe3bQcbmbjN1AtOtgU8yaMCzvC25mBSXBfrGNYv9Vv5uDZMyB0H1_k1MKyv929iKczkh4lhvT_NFYB5qd_M5X75ZT4_Hh-f5nFtzM9L-dq8f-9ky7B-bd7Lf5rForv5jx9Hn-QuNwTy45dD_v_UNy3-BgAA__8LlYvS)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros' globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we! After the "Stop Soros Law" passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted. And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...** **...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did. **_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we'll lose the House or the Senate -\- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now. Great change comes from embracing great opportunities - and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM-OmzAQh5_G3Ig8nmAnBx-yS7LaQ7pVtqJHazCGWMIYYUNfv2K1fYDeRt_80Xy_33dzJz_6afhBwWm7ebMkE9eldSnbJ03W5ZhynAcXl8EZwUVVApQg9zkoOm07iaJwGpREcQaFWDz1uef9GRXAGbkEiT2p_giOVIUWnZSF1_slAJAAUCEcqqo7taeOWqqQK67Yka9zR9mlg41TcstG2W_OT1PcqzgdbAzFqJ85z4nhhYkbEzcKZMl-tRe3bQcbmbjN1AtOtgU8yaMCzvC25mBSXBfrGNYv9Vv5uDZMyB0H1_k1MKyv929iKczkh4lhvT_NFYB5qd_M5X75ZT4_Hh-f5nFtzM9L-dq8f-9ky7B-bd7Lf5rForv5jx9Hn-QuNwTy45dD_v_UNy3-BgAA__8LlYvS) ** **My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I 'm the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** "AMAC" stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, "action" is what we're known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we're fighting against George Soros not alongside him. You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of "climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom" and their mission is "justice and equity." You know that's just globalist speak for 'destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.' And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of "America's Greatest Innovators" who's**** "changing the world, $100 million at a time." It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it's under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. But today, I'm not writing to those seniors. **[I'm writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM-OmzAQh5_G3Ig8nmAnBx-yS7LaQ7pVtqJHazCGWMIYYUNfv2K1fYDeRt_80Xy_33dzJz_6afhBwWm7ebMkE9eldSnbJ03W5ZhynAcXl8EZwUVVApQg9zkoOm07iaJwGpREcQaFWDz1uef9GRXAGbkEiT2p_giOVIUWnZSF1_slAJAAUCEcqqo7taeOWqqQK67Yka9zR9mlg41TcstG2W_OT1PcqzgdbAzFqJ85z4nhhYkbEzcKZMl-tRe3bQcbmbjN1AtOtgU8yaMCzvC25mBSXBfrGNYv9Vv5uDZMyB0H1_k1MKyv929iKczkh4lhvT_NFYB5qd_M5X75ZT4_Hh-f5nFtzM9L-dq8f-9ky7B-bd7Lf5rForv5jx9Hn-QuNwTy45dD_v_UNy3-BgAA__8LlYvS) ** If the AARP wants to betray America's seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ** **And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we'll need in the next 20 months.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM-OmzAQh5_G3Ig8nmAnBx-yS7LaQ7pVtqJHazCGWMIYYUNfv2K1fYDeRt_80Xy_33dzJz_6afhBwWm7ebMkE9eldSnbJ03W5ZhynAcXl8EZwUVVApQg9zkoOm07iaJwGpREcQaFWDz1uef9GRXAGbkEiT2p_giOVIUWnZSF1_slAJAAUCEcqqo7taeOWqqQK67Yka9zR9mlg41TcstG2W_OT1PcqzgdbAzFqJ85z4nhhYkbEzcKZMl-tRe3bQcbmbjN1AtOtgU8yaMCzvC25mBSXBfrGNYv9Vv5uDZMyB0H1_k1MKyv929iKczkh4lhvT_NFYB5qd_M5X75ZT4_Hh-f5nFtzM9L-dq8f-9ky7B-bd7Lf5rForv5jx9Hn-QuNwTy45dD_v_UNy3-BgAA__8LlYvS) ** AMAC Action doesn't take a dime of taxpayer funding.
