clean_body: Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. | | | | I'm writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat. | | | | STOP SOROS Dear Fellow Patriot, Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. You're one of America's most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system. And the results are disastrous for the nation we love. > We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal. >> George Soros' push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys. This includes New York's horrible Letitia James who's now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants. It's their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros' native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the "Stop Soros Law." The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn't drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens. That's exactly the kind of common sense we need here. Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros' globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we! After the "Stop Soros Law" passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted. And he turned his attention to us. Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system... ...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us?? My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals! There are no two ways about it. George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law. We must make a move against them just like Hungary did. And we only have 20 months to do it. On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we'll lose the House or the Senate -\- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now. Great change comes from embracing great opportunities - and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I 'm the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. "AMAC" stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, "action" is what we're known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. And unlike the AARP, we're fighting against George Soros not alongside him. You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of "climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom" and their mission is "justice and equity." You know that's just globalist speak for 'destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.' And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of "America's Greatest Innovators" who's** "changing the world, $100 million at a time." It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it's under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. But today, I'm not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America's seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn't take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we're certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you're able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1926, the [South Texas Chamber of Commerce](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2uqzAQRldjOpDHOBAKF6-hy2tvifwzwEiOHdmjEHZ_FbZwq1N9R5_Oz2N5WIqUtv_2iYY_a14SHjUiM5Zly3mLSOmNlSslxo-tyTLlRUl1awFaGJZgKZ6LboJxMkzQoIFx6NWkbxKa3cB0VxacvnnndfD9gFb5Kajg5Oh9wIbMVwYAAygJ_dDBKvWEq5sw9PaundASA3EuHe94fVjjmd9YOp-fTTQ786uK_p9Qs1DzcRwd193mFClhl8sm1Hyt2mDP1p1fCDVj4vLlqGVTTHgdFCPVYRRabk9L8ZLz35K8jfoNAAD___hmdzo) was established, representing 55 counties in the region. In 1988, it merged with other regional chambers to form the Texas Chamber of Commerce. A Texas state trooper was kicked out of the Texas A&M game after bumping a few rival players in the tunnel. ## Google To Invest $40 Billion In Texas
Google on Friday announced [plans to invest $40 billion](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdCCvcQwULq6hy7VXogUvZCWzjrCPJG9_SiLdC_zlSKOZb-bPdboiR5btN-7ky3NNk9AjRyqFjmlLaYvEclIumaXQE7Ng4TQZbS41QA1uCsjxNdkq-FmHASry0LnWDPaiobr5Ye1WsM5iH1qD2gLNBnvQGqELrm8r9u8wAHBgNLSugVXbgdZ5oNBib2dlNQUu6WjKjT4Ma3ylk45mSXsV_a2Ue1btL2VGZcY5pq35giszsmQOVP_XS9rvKK8aRdJfWWgnKVmZ8WuocaeDF5SaRdL5Xir1p1GZsTp8uD84Rs6uU1ZvO3L8IJSfHXd68y8AAP__Gm6FPw) to build three new AI data centers in Texas. The new AI facilities in Armstrong and Haskell counties will add thousands of jobs, provide worker training, and cut energy use with advanced air-cooling technology. Gov. Greg Abbott was joined by U.S. Deputy Energy Secretary James Danly, along with other officials from Google and the state, to celebrate the announcement. You can read the governor's full press release [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAQRk9jOiPb2BAKF9vQZdstkX8GYsl4IjxLktuvQo6w9Td6em9-rvPVpZzK-u02sPRccC7wqBmIYJ9XxDVDKgdUqqkQPF0tjhLOSijDpeSyn6NL-TXrJlov4igbsHLoOzVqI2Rzs0GZxbghCCW8u-hgYhiNHEQP0Ygw6ibZN0xK2UslZNe3chF6hMWPEDt30Z5pATER7i3d4HRY8gsP2NuAW5PtjeheWffF1MTUtOLRnkftigdT0zuHqemOlT4r7AV37rxHIv4p5K4U_C0BuBbcp5wTFv7J3qAQT4WfyGa38f5477UfmBbr5lI-Leh_vzus-gsAAP__-JuGnw).
## Nine Indicted In Alvarado ICE Facility Attack
Nine people [tied to a North Texas Antifa](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSpSAQQE-DGZYNyGhAsInZbLqhhdJqbyFY0KN_br-1_wpzgfdevT-f86enSGn_7U90_NrynPCpEZmxzHvOe0RKN1aulBhfvibPlGfVqV4CSLBz8BS_Z9MEt3RhhAYdfFitRtN30BzOIiyrAjOobfTWox4324cBtBm0tn1oyP2HAYAF1YG2LWydGXFbRgzaD2YRpsNAnEvLB74btvidbyztms8muoP5qkL_EmoSanqep_37VZlWbPd8CzV9VZ9lCvwSarqKUJNPTJuXK8YoTzwXLFVSCrQyBnkVT4Uw-hRkPXJmSntTXLgeipGq_RCm209P8W3nnz27nfoXAAD__5Skg5c) cell were federally indicted for their alleged role in the July 4 attack on an ICE facility in Alvarado. Those indicted were charged with a multitude of crimes, including rioting with the intent to commit an act of violence, providing material support to terrorists, and conspiracy to use and carry an explosive. In addition to the nine indicted, seven more have been charged in the case. You can find more details on who was indicted and the crimes committed [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAUhE9jd1iAibMUFNu4y7ZbWmAezpP4seAlTm6_cq6w9Yw-fTO_t-VmMWLefmwCQ69QlgxHi0AEddlK2SJgfkKjhpngZVu2hGWRXF6YEExMi7cY34vqvXHca9GDEddplFpduOjvRgkArbUFCXzUXit3cVopFwK4cdW6R3PChBCTkFyM0yACVxqC0-BH-6Vcpzh4pFIHusPHIcR3eUId1pL6aO5Ee-vG707OnZyP4xhCeZ0rzryT86N1craZMFiWIDmojWH2uBJ49uExXIEFu2JEerOKhZglgrSfjfSoHiorIeAKdbBp76vx-4ExYpuuneJbshg_MvS_C59G_gUAAP__nteKWg).
## Texas Has Two Top Sports Cities In America
A new study ranked [Dallas and Houston](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAUhE9jOkf-w0DhYhu6bLulZeMHWHJwxHsJ4farZI-w9YzmG30_V38NueRt-Q43cPSaq9_gwAJEsPul1qVA3p6AhHkjeAXcAuXqlVAtl5JL61PI5fSmSS6KNMgGnOysVoNphWxWN5kIfdfFYI0WKQy21zZ1rVRtbLXuY5Pde0xKaaUSUtuLnIUZYI4DJB16E5kRkDLV_UIrfD7M5axP2C9TvTXFrUR3ZPqLqZGpcTq0fgdMjXivOyFTYwqlBOQZ-RuFvKWVR0Difw0-ZTr5EUoBWh-RIz3SydTY7C7dj1xKRtsxI5ZbyOUDpf-pejr1GwAA__8BLn5e) among the 30 best sports cities in America. The rankings analyzed cities based on 50 key metrics from the five largest sports in America: football, baseball, basketball, soccer, and hockey. The report ranked Dallas as the No. 5 best sports city and Houston as No. 21. Other cities in the top five were Boston, No. 1, Los Angeles, No.2, Pittsburgh, No.3, and New York, No. 4. Greg Abbott was joined by U.S. Deputy Energy Secretary James Danly, along with other officials from Google and the state, to celebrate the announcement. You can read the governor's full press release . Nine Indicted In Alvarado ICE Facility Attack Nine people cell were federally indicted for their alleged role in the July 4 attack on an ICE facility in Alvarado. Those indicted were charged with a multitude of crimes, including rioting with the intent to commit an act of violence, providing material support to terrorists, and conspiracy to use and carry an explosive. In addition to the nine indicted, seven more have been charged in the case. You can find more details on who was indicted and the crimes committed . Texas Has Two Top Sports Cities In America A new study ranked among the 30 best sports cities in America. The rankings analyzed cities based on 50 key metrics from the five largest sports in America: football, baseball, basketball, soccer, and hockey. The report ranked Dallas as the No. 5 best sports city and Houston as No. 21. name: Ted Cruz
subject: No pay during govt shutdowns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
If our military isn’t getting paid, then neither should the U.S. Senators who forced the government shutdown in the first place.

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, This shouldn't be that hard - if the government is in the middle of a record-long shutdown, members of the United States Senate (I'm looking at you, Democrats) shouldn't be getting their damn paychecks. The first thing I did when the government closed on October 1st was to instruct the Senate office responsible for distributing paychecks to NOT PAY ME. If Democrats want to shut down the government over a policy debate, then they shouldn't have the luxury of collecting a paycheck while millions of Americans go without. It's out of touch. It's hypocrisy at its worst. But most of all, it's in poor taste. I want to hear from you - **would you back a Republican-led effort to strip U.S. Senators from being paid during future shutdowns?**
---
[ **< <VOTE NOW>>** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
[ **YES** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz._x3nrFWqw)
---
[ **NO** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
[ **UNSURE** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz._ZgrsVYjWC4Tg)
---
In liberty, Ted Cruz
---

Houston, TX 77265

name: Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Ret.)
subject: $5 to defeat Lauren Boebert?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $5.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6aed20a-913a-44be-afe9-406f41d951a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce721f3e-4a32-4870-b07f-4f58c59839d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, $5. That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $5. $5 because I am the retired Navy Rear Admiral and Democrat running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado. $5 because Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in the closest race in the country. $5 because Lauren Boebert has never been more unpopular than she is now. And $5 because Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, and I need your help now to fight back if we’re going to send Boebert packing and flip this seat. I know $5 probably doesn’t seem like much, but combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we out-raised Lauren Boebert and her corporate PAC supporters last quarter. But we cannot stop here or let up. We’ve set a goal to raise another $25,000 to defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, and right now, we are still dangerously short. [Please, can I count on you to split a $5 donation right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – any amount you can afford – to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6ee9b56-3b18-4a31-bb10-c375482fcf1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Having the support of people like you means the world to me. Thank you, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy

|

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGvpSAQhX8Ndpo7g-C1oNjE2L1ttzQIo5c8AQPo_v0Nd_OyzRavmznnzEm-zK-P5UO7w4X9p_akzO2WlBer02dw-6t4nSgv-EDRArQgqwmNVcZKjg0pGCTHUXA-NC8FKGCUKxcD9GJ7iqe267ihXZFDD6NonKpNACABQXDRIT4BAFHgZqFfOesf12l1odyZGDKlWxd3kwsh1imGzkTfHOpVypkZ_8FwZjhnMleiTgeysdQEwzl-Em3kyTq9p3idVfJ7W8Haf2StX9sznprx-Sp-yfFKhhif_hNlKGukNl6e8el99lcz2p_a7YHx6Yvvy4mhUCiMT-Z2DKX28XqvKJqk7PnbHYfLcmD9Y_faHW-88s0v3Ar_BAAA__9jvZIC) [****](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGvpSAQhX8Ndpo7g-C1oNjE2L1ttzQIo5c8AQPo_v0Nd_OyzRavmznnzEm-zK-P5UO7w4X9p_akzO2WlBer02dw-6t4nSgv-EDRArQgqwmNVcZKjg0pGCTHUXA-NC8FKGCUKxcD9GJ7iqe267ihXZFDD6NonKpNACABQXDRIT4BAFHgZqFfOesf12l1odyZGDKlWxd3kwsh1imGzkTfHOpVypkZ_8FwZjhnMleiTgeysdQEwzl-Em3kyTq9p3idVfJ7W8Haf2StX9sznprx-Sp-yfFKhhif_hNlKGukNl6e8el99lcz2p_a7YHx6Yvvy4mhUCiMT-Z2DKX28XqvKJqk7PnbHYfLcmD9Y_faHW-88s0v3Ar_BAAA__9jvZIC) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGvpSAQhX8Ndpo7g-C1oNjE2L1ttzQIo5c8AQPo_v0Nd_OyzRavmznnzEm-zK-P5UO7w4X9p_akzO2WlBer02dw-6t4nSgv-EDRArQgqwmNVcZKjg0pGCTHUXA-NC8FKGCUKxcD9GJ7iqe267ihXZFDD6NonKpNACABQXDRIT4BAFHgZqFfOesf12l1odyZGDKlWxd3kwsh1imGzkTfHOpVypkZ_8FwZjhnMleiTgeysdQEwzl-Em3kyTq9p3idVfJ7W8Haf2StX9sznprx-Sp-yfFKhhif_hNlKGukNl6e8el99lcz2p_a7YHx6Yvvy4mhUCiMT-Z2DKX28XqvKJqk7PnbHYfLcmD9Y_faHW-88s0v3Ar_BAAA__9jvZIC). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGvpSAQhX8Ndpo7g-C1oNjE2L1ttzQIo5c8AQPo_v0Nd_OyzRavmznnzEm-zK-P5UO7w4X9p_akzO2WlBer02dw-6t4nSgv-EDRArQgqwmNVcZKjg0pGCTHUXA-NC8FKGCUKxcD9GJ7iqe267ihXZFDD6NonKpNACABQXDRIT4BAFHgZqFfOesf12l1odyZGDKlWxd3kwsh1imGzkTfHOpVypkZ_8FwZjhnMleiTgeysdQEwzl-Em3kyTq9p3idVfJ7W8Haf2StX9sznprx-Sp-yfFKhhif_hNlKGukNl6e8el99lcz2p_a7YHx6Yvvy4mhUCiMT-Z2DKX28XqvKJqk7PnbHYfLcmD9Y_faHW-88s0v3Ar_BAAA__9jvZIC).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGvpSAQhX8Ndpo7g-C1oNjE2L1ttzQIo5c8AQPo_v0Nd_OyzRavmznnzEm-zK-P5UO7w4X9p_akzO2WlBer02dw-6t4nSgv-EDRArQgqwmNVcZKjg0pGCTHUXA-NC8FKGCUKxcD9GJ7iqe267ihXZFDD6NonKpNACABQXDRIT4BAFHgZqFfOesf12l1odyZGDKlWxd3kwsh1imGzkTfHOpVypkZ_8FwZjhnMleiTgeysdQEwzl-Em3kyTq9p3idVfJ7W8Haf2StX9sznprx-Sp-yfFKhhif_hNlKGukNl6e8el99lcz2p_a7YHx6Yvvy4mhUCiMT-Z2DKX28XqvKJqk7PnbHYfLcmD9Y_faHW-88s0v3Ar_BAAA__9jvZIC).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Instant karma
subject: When Trump turns on Boebert, we must show her no mercy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Boebert and MTG are two of the worst people in Congress who have done nothing but tear our country apart since they were elected. They are reaping what they’ve sowed.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014_xPaE489KFB612v7avHG1fwB1JLBy1cPTKp--fZ9Kgl1pdTDBDSMZ5Xh0zN1XAx0EJ1hw85Fb4z4ke_sysumu0h9nQWRWbQUxFKHM6cuCELfy8KlFlfzX3SwZ0BcdRNbaGOC7rQzD3tXrGYwZ_T_LshPU4L6xk9L6aFTwTcghA2JZLF8JsYXgl-YLtLVj14RCdfGTB3qqU3ETttbwAFW6YlK4G_qsovejLosf5nxcY=&c=V7nm_6nLrl1iGAbbFUWKmrH7C8h19b1XXF95ZzDYdApEuMDeuNb6NA==&ch=5IH0do65quHPz6lK5o9vaXwVAB-YfYz-BnvsEpQSm_kCjj9frHPlaQ==)

|

Peter,
Donald Trump has spent the weekend on a rage bender attacking Republicans on social media who have supported releasing the full Epstein Files.
Trump lobbed vicious personal attacks against Thomas Massie, who co-sponsored the bill to release the full Epstein files, and Marjorie Taylor Greene who signed the discharge petition.
Conspicuously absent from Trump's wrath is Lauren Boebert, who on Wed. met with Trump, FBI Director Patel, and AG Bondi for a stern conversation in the White House Situation Room. Boebert claimed afterward that the meeting was vaguely about "transparency" and reaffirmed that she still stands with Trump saying that she is "pretty high profile."
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014_xPaE489KFB612v7avHG1fwB1JLBy1cPTKp--fZ9Kgl1pdTDBDSMZ5Xh0zN1XAx0EJ1hw85Fb4z4ke_sysumu0h9nQWRWbQUxFKHM6cuCELfy8KlFlfzX3SwZ0BcdRNbaGOC7rQzD3tXrGYwZ_T_LshPU4L6xk9L6aFTwTcghA2JZLF8JsYXgl-YLtLVj14RCdfGTB3qqU3ETttbwAFW8HuuKOEuEjtGBT_isJJb54=&c=V7nm_6nLrl1iGAbbFUWKmrH7C8h19b1XXF95ZzDYdApEuMDeuNb6NA==&ch=5IH0do65quHPz6lK5o9vaXwVAB-YfYz-BnvsEpQSm_kCjj9frHPlaQ==)
---

Marjorie Taylor Greene is one of the worst and craziest MAGA conspiracy theorists, but even a broken clock is right twice a day: Trump is furiously working to prevent the release of the Epstein Files and is coming after her for trying to release them.
Both MTG and Lauren Boebert have no one else to blame for the ugliness Trump is unleashing on them--in fact, they are just reaping what they've sowed.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014_xPaE489KFB612v7avHG1fwB1JLBy1cPTKp--fZ9Kgl1pdTDBDSMZ5Xh0zN1XAx0EJ1hw85Fb4z4ke_sysumu0h9nQWRWbQUxFKHM6cuCELfy8KlFlfzX3SwZ0BcdRNbaGOC7rQzD3tXrGYwZ_T_LshPU4L6xk9L6aFTwTcghA2JZLF8JsYXgl-YLtLVj14RCdfGTB3qqU3ETttbwAFW2j_AKAEIvlemYm8nMrhb9Q=&c=V7nm_6nLrl1iGAbbFUWKmrH7C8h19b1XXF95ZzDYdApEuMDeuNb6NA==&ch=5IH0do65quHPz6lK5o9vaXwVAB-YfYz-BnvsEpQSm_kCjj9frHPlaQ==)

Boebert and MTG are two of the worst people in Congress who have done nothing but tear our country apart since they were elected.
Trump is attacking anyone who opposes him, and blood is in the water. But now is the time to show no mercy for Lauren Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of just 546 votes and in 2024 when Trisha Calvarese, her Democratic opponent, ran against her Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county.
[This is our moment to deliver real change to America by defeating Trump ally Lauren Boebert. But we absolutely need your support if we are going to do this--Boebert is keeping Trump close so she can leverage his support for her fledgling campaign. Peter,
Donald Trump has spent the weekend on a rage bender attacking Republicans on social media who have supported releasing the full Epstein Files.
Trump lobbed vicious personal attacks against Thomas Massie, who co-sponsored the bill to release the full Epstein files, and Marjorie Taylor Greene who signed the discharge petition.
Conspicuously absent from Trump's wrath is Lauren Boebert, who on Wed. met with Trump, FBI Director Patel, and AG Bondi for a stern conversation in the White House Situation Room. Boebert claimed afterward that the meeting was vaguely about "transparency" and reaffirmed that she still stands with Trump saying that she is "pretty high profile."

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Buried deep in the Appalachians, a video has exploded online—what it shows is pure nightmare fuel.

These quiet streets hold more than stories—they echo with memories that still haunt locals.

The accounts I’ve heard are unsettling—many who’ve seen it can’t look at this place the same way again.

This isn’t rumor or legend; it’s compelling evidence of something disturbing that demands attention.

After watching, you’ll understand why this story can’t be left in the dark.

[Don’t miss your chance—watch now before it’s gone.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=dec0e76468074e1bacd4988cd933709d&_e=sXIl4pNXaGcLePFHN00fIdKu0QmHKHkodwfUvuxQ0mN4KLUNZIHBkICInxGKA0_i3Uy1xgScGdUQly3Cl57gj5wXjXC8GQyKCd6rQoYa8fhWixP7J_HaVkyVhKdwrfHDzAC_RNBlt-HTRevPFmYnXOhrE2pf8VrmURgxcCSGLkWsjidSNB7GgOm0HXlwynbjBsgaaENAD2xrHuFL1dvHjuTA_CMEZVvjgEm1KtKKSFCSr0m2a6e8S6F0iE8xO4JvaayZipA19zxikviwVNniG_dc8lip2Wa3c0O2IUZQlUioJJnxBoL0UqrihqxGB4o5nL_l9h1gDVSn0iUHLODbS1Gy9VPX2e7g9ghvN8PsXnFkNanHyz0JsD9tYxzMSXXy1UsQqBxBEfQVguqfewf115dIm10bN7IrBZhMTgnH8DyKySxPX1wY4-m1Pjscigy1WjMWbJuOyNozXeAdkWxfKpjK8ftlRCjUhqTkQGVGlPaywlOb84oU4UtxQXikbvWTmI_5oPQLEhoin84d_QaLzyA3JnA9p04Ijncw_sBvioUhwFA5AOmLJzUwuXyGCxzYlFIYOtMrO25FmYUq-yYJVg%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | Advertisement – content sponsored by Brownstone Research. This footage shines a light on what’s long been ignored. Buried deep in the Appalachians, a video has exploded online—what it shows is pure nightmare fuel. These quiet streets hold more than stories—they echo with memories that still haunt locals. The accounts I’ve heard are unsettling—many who’ve seen it can’t look at this place the same way again. This isn’t rumor or legend; it’s compelling evidence of something disturbing that demands attention. After watching, you’ll understand why this story can’t be left in the dark. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. | It's not bragging; it's a fact: We won big. All three Democratic justices on the PA Supreme Court won retention with over 61% of the vote:
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MyP_mzNpqqvxw3QOHmb5a55twkDEpBvNnjiy5_AjVi6I3TODH4vUXR2urlozUOWDqq7WA4lxtcyF6kgvKtan6Obx49P_YaJ8VRoe3r8VBlEC34cQ0cMndnNwzyS3qNli6ZELxoXd_YTgLG4Ig38AlJTVkIE8svZxWK-RgaM-bVIzBiwa7Y8tX0lC-5WNzWlYcfG1FIPkUY53weAUzdhHUnwNRhSoLBhQ&c=c9gOBblDh_stwmgNhBHVT1kwITzRm0lvJW3luR9urbF8Hbu6Uz7Jlg==&ch=rJXtQqFv_RLHVNp7wrD7dXEhzLqsOQfiQttGB4bA2X88df57BYTE8Q==)
---
Make no mistake: YOU made this happen. We should feel great about what we did together.
Defend Our Courts assembled a nationwide coalition to protect the highest court in the most important swing state from MAGA's plot to keep Trump in power past 2028.
As if to acknowledge the truth of our message about the stakes in the race, Trump just issued pardons to Rudy Giuliani and 76 other senior aides, lawyers, and consultants that planned and carried out the attempted 2020 coup to keep him in office.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MyP_mzNpqqvxw3QOHmb5a55twkDEpBvNnjiy5_AjVi6I3TODH4vUXR2urlozUOWDqq7WA4lxtcyF6kgvKtan6Obx49P_YaJ8VRoe3r8VBlEC34cQ0cMndnNwzyS3qNli6ZELxoXd_YTgLG4Ig38AlJTVkIE8svZxWK-RgaM-bVIzBiwa7Y8tX0lC-5WNzWlYcfG1FIPkUY5jhsl8i6YdJXjV9S0ODwXe&c=c9gOBblDh_stwmgNhBHVT1kwITzRm0lvJW3luR9urbF8Hbu6Uz7Jlg==&ch=rJXtQqFv_RLHVNp7wrD7dXEhzLqsOQfiQttGB4bA2X88df57BYTE8Q==)
---
It's no exaggeration to say that together we saved Pennsylvania--and perhaps the nation--from the clutches of MAGA for the foreseeable future.
But right now, we have to be honest. We're celebrating, but we're also hurting. We gave literally everything to this cause. And we made promises and signed contracts that we knew would put us in a bad situation, but we did it because the moment demanded no less than total commitment.
You stood with us to win this crucial court. You fought for democracy, justice, and fairness when America needed us. We worked together to deliver a big win and send a message to MAGA: hands off the courts.
Now that the dust has settled we really need your help. So that we can move on to defending the next courts that MAGA is targeting in MI, GA, and AZ, we need to retire our debt and pay what is owed to every member of our team who worked hard until the very last minute polls closed fighting for this incredible victory.
Can you chip in even just a $5 donation or whatever you can spare right now to help Defend Our Courts get back on the right footing and prepare for the critical battles to come?

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: CONVENTION 2026: What you need to know right now
body:
Save the date: April 25, 2026
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SmmXul95_cW1rPFT-0xjuZs-vzrwuCyWp5BiMRSqwA2aYuPhRZg5Vkte2NXIpSPah5XoeJwvPxXOtXb8k0XnYc13fKZFtCxpiCGkJqHgAgYqkdu-YMLyjgXAlmTDXyy5Oxi1ctkSfxl2hzuO5qVKTg==&c=sAkXCjspMiyC8nmO3YbNwrlRaMrRf8beJz9grYr3cMzmVkrtfUG0UQ==&ch=O4g5z-PLewNPQWHKa92SiiQtXNwuhQbQPG-f5jadljN-O6-9lbGctg==)
---
| Dear Peter,
Planning for next April's Convention is in full swing. Here's what you need to know right now:
* Convention will be held on Saturday, April 25, 2026 at the DCU Center in Worcester. Held every four years, it remains the largest gathering of Republican activists in Massachusetts.

* While the Republican State Committee is still finalizing the 2026 rules, one thing is already confirmed: we have room for more than 5,500 delegates, and preparations are underway to maximize the number of credentialed delegates attending the convention.

* Given the hotly contested state-wide races, interest in this convention is already running high.

* Convention Eve continues to be one of the most enjoyable traditions, with campaigns and organizations hosting a variety of events throughout the host city.

* Delegates can expect to hear from notable national figures, as well as the full slate of statewide candidates. Our nominating convention celebrates who we are as a party.

* To participate as a delegate, individuals must be registered Republicans by December 31, 2025.

* To qualify to nominate delegates, Republican Ward & Town Committees must be organized by December 31, 2025. Final delegate numbers are still being determined.

Our team at the MassGOP is bursting with excitement at the prospect of hosting a successful and fun event in April aimed at winning back the corner office, building our seats in the legislature and re-establishing a Republican presence at the federal level.
A dedicated convention portal will be launching on our website soon with additional details and resources.
Stay tuned!
Best,
---
| |
---
| Amy Carnevale Chair, Massachusetts Republican Party
---
| |
---
| | [CHIP IN TO THE MASSGOP TODAY](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SmmXul95_cW1rPFT-0xjuZs-vzrwuCyWp5BiMRSqwA2aYuPhRZg5VsxBGb2nX9cNzbmpxVL-wJlZthbxArhifoF1G72oEh_aUl5r1tGGfjKdWGNR9VFIWQJSDQk2kdJpE9XfLMo9PKPBp7CSP68ByK54bPmxpxBUXIjVjlKyzUf8w5eSnZCSU-4XPjOSFIaaREE4AlPGPqY=&c=sAkXCjspMiyC8nmO3YbNwrlRaMrRf8beJz9grYr3cMzmVkrtfUG0UQ==&ch=O4g5z-PLewNPQWHKa92SiiQtXNwuhQbQPG-f5jadljN-O6-9lbGctg==)
---

#
Peter --
First and foremost, I want to say thank you to everybody who has supported our grassroots campaign. I am so grateful to the more than 150,000 people who have helped us get to where we are in just two months. It’s truly humbling.
I’m reaching out because we're halfway to the FEC deadline, and we’ve set a goal of 5,000 donations before midnight.
**Will you consider making a contribution to our people-powered campaign? We’re tracking donations at this link:**
[**https://act.JamesTalarico.com/go/5000-donation-goal**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251116-1-ak&t=1&akid=234%2E1347274%2E3dyoTd)
This FEC deadline is critical for our campaign. We made a big splash at launch, and our opponents and their billionaire mega-donors are hoping that we’ve stalled out.
And truthfully, our numbers are behind where we need them to be right now. We know that fundraising around the holidays is going to be harder, so we have to put in extra work right now.
The people at the top who profit from the status quo are hoping we fail. As they work to gut health care for millions of Americans so they can give another tax break to billionaires, they don’t want fighters in the U.S. Senate who will take power back for the people.
They think they can scare us with dark money super PACs. It’s why our opponents are already attacking me in the press and on the airwaves. They’re worried because public polling shows our campaign statistically tied with John Cornyn and Ken Paxton.
We can take back Texas — but the truth is I can’t do it alone.
[**So I’m humbly asking you to make a $5 contribution to our campaign today to make sure we reach our goal before midnight. Every dollar will go toward taking back this seat for the people and winning a Senate majority for Democrats.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251116-1-ak&t=2&akid=234%2E1347274%2E3dyoTd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-launch.3s2pDp&refcode=em251116-1-ak&t=21&akid=234%2E1347274%2E3dyoTd)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-launch.soFUPy&refcode=em251116-1-ak&t=22&akid=234%2E1347274%2E3dyoTd)**
---
****

---
****

Thank you for making sure we give this race our all. Every dollar we raise, every voter we reach — all of it will make a difference.
James

Jose will crack down on those who prey on them and ensure they have the protection they deserve.

name: Ben McAdams
subject: We need to hit the ground running from Day One.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
In 2018, we won by just a few hundred votes
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96616?t=6&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS) Friend,

My name is Ben McAdams, and I’m running for Congress to flip UT-01 from red to blue. In 2018, I won this district and became the only federal Democrat elected from Utah.

**Recent redistricting changes have once again made this seat winnable.**

If you’re ready to help me take back this seat – you can use this link now to become a Founding Donor. [**The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96616?t=7&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96616?t=8&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)
---
Look, I can't think of any other time in my life where I've been more concerned about the direction of our nation. Political enemies being prosecuted, the National Guard sent to patrol our streets, more than one hundred and seventy American citizens falsely detained by ICE, not to mention the thousands of hard working and law abiding immigrants ripped from their families without an ounce of due process.

In the blink of an eye Donald Trump has taken our democracy and trampled all over it. Republicans in Congress are his accomplices and let’s be honest too many democrats aren’t doing enough to stop it.

So here is my promise to you.

My service will always be about Utah. I haven’t changed, I’ll work with anyone to get results. But I’ve never been afraid to stand up and even stand alone to fight for the America that you and your family deserve to live in. A free, fair, and just place - that helps your neighbor, protects dissent, and provides for its people.

That’s why I’m writing to you today. You see, how many voters our campaign will be able to reach is directly tied to how many resources we’re able to raise from emails like this one.

So I’m respectfully asking:

[**Can you split a contribution with the Voter Protection Project of $10, $20, or whatever you can afford and become a Founding Donor to my campaign in UT-01 ? Every dollar makes a difference in a race like this one.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96616?t=9&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ben McAdams and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96617?t=10&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96618?t=11&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96619?t=12&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96620?t=13&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96616?t=14&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)
Thank you for your generous support,
Ben McAdams
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21872%2E878179%2EByELoS)

subject: Democratic PA Supreme Court Victory spurs threats of violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
“If you can’t beat em kill em.” This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dhXh321NWllS_aq85Ka1Wv6v8HzZFKUz1roGj7Hj5iZqfzIWMN7tKKSeDkyqTiP3yQCPzI2NY_2r_TFHhVQC8ozqceRrCRbPUCvEGKMFO_5eqFPQfdPUtTVDQB8z3nthMRWmoojZv1dBD1lP2zVlc8cYS9NLfOWP9sLCmteEB1OF5OyRIFpFWZ34krTIbNZzkhWrcvu8KKNLWb-q_7460Z-lT6J3mmmUUYxQQbBxauIyZ0lV99cjWw==&c=DrMKJjyzjX0h8-uxBxs38A9BFX-7bW5rPWwBQTPhfDtIANyPa5y4sg==&ch=344WkA-QugcEiRD2ais0efD4EYBGmDL35WTjeAI1ahCjV5XysDQjRQ==)
---
| Peter,
Following MAGA's blowout defeat in the critical Pennsylvania Supreme Court the right has found themselves in an existential crisis.
At a meeting of the Federalist Society (the far-right organization focused on judicial capture and responsible for the GOP majority on the US Supreme Court), Chad Mizelle, a former Trump DOJ appointee laid out a new approach to winning judicial fights in the aftermath of PA:
Putting down Justices like "stray cats."
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dhXh321NWllS_aq85Ka1Wv6v8HzZFKUz1roGj7Hj5iZqfzIWMN7tKKSeDkyqTiP3yQCPzI2NY_2r_TFHhVQC8ozqceRrCRbPUCvEGKMFO_5eqFPQfdPUtTVDQB8z3nthMRWmoojZv1dBD1lP2zVlc8cYS9NLfOWP9sLCmteEB1OF5OyRIFpFWZ34krTIbNZzkhWrcvu8KKNLWb-q_7460Z-lT6J3mmmUPxrHSR7DYO54jNm_pg40jg==&c=DrMKJjyzjX0h8-uxBxs38A9BFX-7bW5rPWwBQTPhfDtIANyPa5y4sg==&ch=344WkA-QugcEiRD2ais0efD4EYBGmDL35WTjeAI1ahCjV5XysDQjRQ==)
---
|
This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting: "If you can't beat em kill em."
Already we've seen this strategy begin to play out. Just last month a South Carolina Supreme Court judge who ruled against Trump had her home burn down in a suspicious massive explosion that many suspected was arson.
The reason why they are resorting to this is because the left is making a comeback in the fight for our nation's courts. On Nov. 4th, Defend our Courts helped orchestrate a landslide victory in PA that will all but guarantee Democratic control for the next decade. It sent a resounding message to MAGA: Don't f*** with our courts.
MAGA can't win these judicial fights when voters are educated on the stakes of what right-wing capture of our judiciary entails. They can try to circumvent the voters' will and win through violence but in the long run that strategy will only alienate them with the American people.
These courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full implementation of Trump's agenda and if we can keep up the pressure and keep pulling off victories in supreme court races like we just did in Pennsylvania - we will survive these next three years of Trump and reclaim America.
Winning the fight in PA required going for broke, literally, and we owe tens of thousands of dollars to our hardworking staff. [To move on to the coming judicial fights in MI, AZ, and GA, we need to close the books on PA. Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to help us pay our team? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dhXh321NWllS_aq85Ka1Wv6v8HzZFKUz1roGj7Hj5iZqfzIWMN7tKKSeDkyqTiP304it_ztHpzMVKVAegC02WisAvXLnKoijngGMdelLIkEHubSAAVUpF4JpP-hKEfeEnXcHGrQgo6SXE9Nat_FadJSucYtdCzFmn_dtKpOCpusz9gI8E0Uqcw-hWHc15Kd5jdK4ZQsJM0hP9EQdhkeWrfIwjqO462aP5CwCKiqJA4Tro7kVCaj_hf7iYFWVg12w&c=DrMKJjyzjX0h8-uxBxs38A9BFX-7bW5rPWwBQTPhfDtIANyPa5y4sg==&ch=344WkA-QugcEiRD2ais0efD4EYBGmDL35WTjeAI1ahCjV5XysDQjRQ==)

subject: The Democrats are counting on us to be asleep at the wheel

It ALL comes to a head on December 2nd
Protect the House majority
| Fellow Patriot,
Look, I’m not gonna sugarcoat it – we’re barely clinging to our majority in the House and there's a razor-thin line between forward progress, and watching the radical Left torch everything we fought for...

_**CLOSING Biden's open border.
DE-FANGING the Deep State.
PROTECTING girls' sports.
SHRINKING our massive bureaucracy.
CUTTING taxes for ALL Americans. **_

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Disgusting. Absolutely disgusting.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump doesn’t care about Veterans, he doesn’t care about their families, and he certainly doesn’t care about the people who take care of them. He’s called them “suckers” and “losers” and has trampled their graves at Arlington.
#
Peter —
At the beginning of the year, Donald Trump and Elon Musk directed the VA to fire thousands of employees. These were career VA staff — case workers, researchers, support staff, even the people answering the phones at the Veterans Crisis Line. Many of them were Veterans themselves, or members of Military families.
And as if being fired by the lamest billionaire in history and the worst president of all time wasn’t bad enough, this is how Trump just described those VA staff:
_“They were sadists, they were sick people, they were thieves.”_
Rich, considering the real sadist, the convicted felon, the person who called Jeffrey Epstein a “terrific guy” is... Trump himself.
Trump doesn’t care about Veterans, he doesn’t care about their families, and he certainly doesn’t care about the people who serve them. He’s called us “suckers” and “losers” and has trampled the graves of our fallen comrades at Arlington National Cemetery.
It’s disgusting. Absolutely disgusting.
The VA has been under siege all year from Trump, Elon, and VA Secretary Doug Collins. We’re sure they’d appreciate some support. So, we’re sending over a quick request:

| [THANK THE VA](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251116_vv_VA/?source=em251116-1-120&akid=34769%2E3013755%2E940NS7)
---

Thanks,
The team at VoteVets

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: Will you stand up for women’s sports today?
body:
As a defender of truth, you know that women shouldn’t have to share locker rooms with men.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/O0zqP3IAezjVHpLyS4V03XnuEg92PWqGLEnireIDgFuszEp1Hr6h07zVyFjsyeHXyG35tSlqTu3V7zLmyXSExdLNOfSP8taDEizMywxzV2TNwMhylyBhQ2Qrq2CBJfQ3ZNvq5PaOATzdL3otKN5dxr4OL6SgncZM8eIt9tBFeeXTSF97iBynU9Xs/XnjnuydIQdOwYsc5XrV4NH-OSuV5sX-T/14)_

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/yacTIUq_hIDuQayit4wjnK6hVUyog0fVTl27ytshZQQ6WUi-PpIi7zTjkjUSvUYwmFSGv1CJ5mDkHf0XALmyCQbxU0-TZARaaJqIu5DwCiVENZZ9IBNRY0brBoyRZB2jE0A0tKHJwF-zR4LWECzK_mLTwk1qH4t1LESsgPshXyWY3s2_3gH6yixCQn-JMqqQD08aDDibE3B9vvycxCke9p_AiFTXuzX1rD3LJvlFCKy6yKjFEtMTOOkh0Q3WYDecChka9KuaMT3pAdfBuvlwKOSSXbliE-_qKUvOyKhqOudU_Ho5YjRZf8qZ8YHom5QhYeRDq_DYHqOfEFdmqO_d18DcxulYbpfYhwI7D2TmlFOXaS9ux9V_P7F5fFL0ONFcjHLCbJV3Oyf73IH1VRT_EJFAHNRF-eCOgaICkM2WG_dmx1sZXswCJ6rSHlS40yEmG6PhX9AO4hVNBR0cQrnwH80jd6GWk3fZf6nWX5NEVhuqWGlODJl0Fz0jqS5SF4vvxmj1jVRBDkWDXC3SVNmeFi-7VLtZaaka6RUA7OERs7RQCdPcRid07GiASxPsGeRCGDPrTy4Ck1PJgneu_09N8bWDrOvHgjbph2UsAVp-swnXaM6_QBsQI7kmZFRHxgm3hKoGO3-pSXIrtTHkWzaopqRbxUGUJnc4lsvkT0o8Zs22ePQ3TQJ6kX2M3TLH4hOPuKlXhG2X2hZY918Ilurnx8WcJuLy57VeHDf07KR64kiMUN0zHvWUCTLveTlho0a0VCOs/Q9hpNI1yRt5ottUoXHEoMAiELRyZlgEd/14)
**** Dear Fellow American, As a defender of truth, you know that women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men.

They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth.

But across America, that's exactly what's happening.

Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety.

Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--_State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide.

This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness.

If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today.
[ Sign the Declaration on Women’s Sports](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/0dA_TNMYP-f3_PaBFiTgRtJT_dCgfggcQZuFmWfpRnKKh4kn-bzc5PRPEjGd6f2-C6TyE_2Ky7mHBaEQu88k8v1D6HbKgnji9Jq8xVTonJ-Y8fCNrWYZv2Tw3AbIFT3yBox6ks_pUBOL08Tdst7o60dXCsEHLCHQLV2GwYK-qK5t0FMmcT0-ULr5oqX4fjlC5ZOLTVOFLv14SjH93A4Pnl9zBx_bncl_XOAiBz9v-U72mWJ3MS0G0FuWOps9dLA0kuJUX98gpMsftNl894BlA574DhYXSsjyLM0X1IhfHbgyDL7e_zUBpv7ACXNLA7RlmRuczMJ_pkHQiJTBEN4PJVeRlWMleVoAbaEVd6Djy50M1fhf6CX5202C117qThIiElUEKM3ouY64Ax115I86auSOB7dpP4xqy3POO2hCd9D0Ltd6lMDUaXSkiujHnC7cbpWUbaR48SLFFgpvIq77Yd2ie85NuqeMtW_GbW-F3A4ACdnJHFbVxVllB_jrYwyPVLaNnU1ECI2fGzJ3DVHnWrxlKG1g2AEJDZuIuonXcNQXRv-HASc_GmFOIDjpfRFaqH6GskIvMwo042x9Oe1xZNKlVOO_zl6I0S3r1__By53yrf6qchYrMwnaGrRTmBrJ4zwrJgHMo6QRWyUrHoJxSxi3cJixp0bqyUJ7FZ-btEcW4s-dEBHocCqkFC6Kwr-Mtsaj-DHbLsIy1b2jxkOVC53QbJyaKJAopH38MjwA5KAKcy1FQe-B-3Uq1i0675YNsO5X/Zb4bPZHfwxv_OtBznUHKFvmuy55TS5o4/14)
Your signature will say clearly:

✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams
✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety
✅ Radical gender ideology ignores biological truth This is more than athletics. It's about truth, justice, and standing up to gender ideology's dangerous, reality-denying agenda.

When our culture accepts the lie that men can be women and women and be men, the downstream effects victimize women and children most of all.

Doctors end up criminally charged for blowing the whistle on the medical industry for preying on children. Young girls end up sharing locker rooms and bathrooms with boys. Female athletes lose out on opportunities to males. Parents get pushed aside by government officials, who make life-altering decisions for kids on their behalf.

Men haven't stopped competing in women's sports just because it's 2025. You only have to scroll X or watch the news to see new examples of men invading women's sports and spaces.

The thing is, courageous female athletes like Madison Kenyon and Mary Kate Marshall have been sounding the alarm on this issue for years--standing up when it wasn't popular to do so.

Madison and Mary Kate are former college athletes who ran track and cross country at Idaho State University.

Both found running to be their happy place. Both invested years of training into becoming college athletes. But both had to face a male athlete in college.

Madison and Mary Kate, represented by ADF, intervened in _Little v. Hecox_ to defend Idaho's women's sports law. They don't want other girls to lose the opportunities they did.

But, soon, they're getting their day before our nation's highest court.

Please stand with Madison and Mary Kate and add your name now to the Declaration on Women's Sports.
[ Add Your Name](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/1DxFZG68LebxiLEIvXMWsbp066_1-nqyPOVn1S8ZAHzUPqxkTLubQfo_k3kThUfhg_CGi4BG8uzXlcZajv-0iT5XGwtKiajLDZ94EnIuuq7ECXdaEEEQ5NFCdT2ikbzSuQ9bkj8oqUTSuNWx55kr7olGoArieXZDXhKDYpGA-InMElfSaKqbo3FaV_tWBTMy0jJTIeJx3EkLWESEhpVlTKpQFCtTa1PkNUZjOTsjIPmDSVsO67VgP7NT4OkX5Jc9p-VctjLQyiYwzmvYiCiwNw56g8UQGyu4NvadZe7ZMWJrQ8zbcVW47T6vKIkpBFP23pAa1znkhcyJf6pn7QRZcUl0yL08EtsOhl0P2GC_9kaPXJxj74qsSKuMFoE9cJWDha7RZ17p3hwJJDaAPpai0KjSsih9qvnTzakHGhzH83Fma2r8ZgxP7XyZIYbK7fWZrLPmXCd1-E4fIXkp-HIVhaByImtHIdoPIJu1NVYq6vTkTzyLL-L5OD4IDUiqsD7G43v1gnYlbAuzMKtCcZ1QJ655JVU_5PHacU18iTny075wKdVYaHSsZUiJFf7eR7CzUWnizqPCFgXlX3rqPXL4owCCXmvzjW42XcURijRYykkOXMb7-Bo5tob-NfoOhTp5uDBNeMcuLyFdfCRAKr2U40f7UOOpXEH9UkV5LHiUZTtJIIc_uWsK8Vg5M7FPuyfIgm_uie-T6RecvWyKZW5Pwbpc0zRHD0s4l8wxirfmmcYiABGzDGetrO17msjTN9yWjEl6/QbwqYmT6TwZyf2mCRwWZLkLe6c8-mAus/14)
Together, we can ensure every girl has a fair opportunity to play--and win--on a level playing field.

Thank you for standing for truth. With gratitude, **Suzanne Beecher**
Legal Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/my0G4aHYVDEsgUZiJGRsmt7DjNb4j9pUEwHKx114QYY61MLkDwi2-eqelu_v5SNZxfMJYbU_1VNW-IxAjAndIk6MNLNPEpqrfbSKbjgn8oUFAL2JAQzeCoPBS2jRG4FAOzLaGq0quQ50woiYQ7hBG3AoqERk5X6GzM9KmmH7oeOgieVOKJVXvTkG89dwwPA4Yu-4E0qE3DRPeXVWRim45PxvN4ed4FNr73g6aue_Q7ha5x3J84n0u2YfGIrQpiMXuaG8kZIeWz4zZf2vNqUJPsnuXzZh8lI_jljX0XmZ_ip8e3W8PK8KQH3koa0L46UG_E3zWe4oq4w9paz2r7jSSnW0wqMpMhevWINJUMvWx5yYlD85x_LDcZr_2gHonbbELRPlXaANddhAY7natAg8fbj38pHVCLhrabyuvLD91iRMHj5YEXde5t8n9p6H90PQq32nDtHADohakwjm4XLuM6889qOhsiCRFOWbuDqSKcysRaP0KN3aGXrMF0iAeWZ9OhobUWTS_cufCmvngxHeJKZjfBeum0rnSZwf9jGqhioq-FGa3Iggl9wtDYdQOCwERtdt9qY886MvffZ1o7c4CSx7HL_MDhPyn8Om5P5bnlp6a8OVYGXsk3aRrg-7MeZx_bV7P0t85eUzUWv5V47glqwfob47OW9OJ0DY39XVLdAZtHZAChgHg2b2lQLijgexpC2J-bYVzjXAEFCj6yXQPTtOPgZnCWjB4hVJkf3p8MojsTMJI5rMA-aD2NeyniNE9Yh9/NqCeYVgDAhPpBTyr9f8hHeOFjs9srYIS/14)

clean_body: | We wish we had better news to share... We missed our mid-month fundraising goal by $5,098 last night. That might not sound like much, but $5,098 could be: A field organizer’s salary for a month. A weekend of door-knocking in a swing state. Hundreds of voter calls in places like Texas or Maine — where just a few thousand votes could decide control of the Senate next year. = | | = Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is fighting day and night to elect more Democrats, defend our democracy, and flip the Senate blue – but she can’t do it alone. She’s counting on a nationwide movement of grassroots Democrats like you to power this fight every single day. Republicans are defending 22 Senate seats. We need to hold all of our blue seats and flip just four to flip the Senate and hold Republicans accountable. We can take back the Senate if we build the groundwork now. Your donation today isn’t just another contribution. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Re: Epstein Files
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251116_1_ossoff.rPahbb&refcode=em20251116-1&t=1001&akid=3479%2E582294%2E2OyOdD ]Jon Ossoff

Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?

Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party
with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files?

Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the
rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them
to foreign prisons.

We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people.

But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their
hospitals and nursing homes.

You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school
lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working
parents are struggling to fill the fridge.

***

I know it can feel like the Republic is falling apart. But what I need you
to hear is that the only way out of this spiral is to win in the midterm
elections.

That’s the whole ballgame.

2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this
descent toward one-man rule.

And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up
for reelection in a state Trump won.

I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.

There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured
the Democratic majority five years ago.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251116_1_ossoff.rPahbb&refcode=em20251116-1&t=1002&akid=3479%2E582294%2E2OyOdD ]If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of
power — and if you are determined to WIN — please chip in to my campaign
and Chris Pappas today. This is the most important Senate race in the
country, and I can’t win without you.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251116_1_ossoff.rPahbb&amount=5&refcode=em20251116-1&t=1021&akid=3479%2E582294%2E2OyOdD ]Donate $5 »

Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility
for the whole nation. It’s still shining.

And come next November, we will raise it higher.

In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and
corruption.

Thank you for your support.

- Jon

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251116_1_ossoff.rPahbb&amount=5&refcode=em20251116-1&t=1022&akid=3479%2E582294%2E2OyOdD ]Donate $5 »

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3479%2E582294%2E2OyOdD

_**By David Shuster**_
Once upon a time, the White House Situation Room was a hallowed sanctum of Presidential power and communications. 15 years ago, the White House Sensitive, Compartmentalized, Information Facility (WH SCIF), as it is technically called, was where President Obama and his national security team watched, with grim faces and steady hands, as 9-11 mastermind Osama Bin Laden met his end thanks to SEAL Team 6 raiding the terrorist's compound in Pakistan.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/724df919-afa7-43d7-a83c-40176c94b004?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Situation Room, as history underscored that night, is a place for the often grave business of safeguarding the nation.
Now, Donald Trump and his corrupt enablers have converted this same chamber of national vigilance into a sleazy coordination center against the Epstein scandal.
This week, Attorney General Pam Bondi, Deputy AG Todd Blanche, and FBI Director Kash Patel packed into the secure vault not to defend the United States, but to try and strong-arm Congresswoman Lauren Boebert (R-CO) into withdrawing her name from a petition demanding the FBI and DOJ release all the Epstein files.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/04dde212-fec7-4b55-85f5-e2e30cbee60b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It was Trumpism on full display: the art of turning every instrument of the federal government into a personal weapon. Cell phones won't work in a SCIF and must be kept outside to prevent recordings. And everything said in the Situation Room is shielded not just from the outside world, but from the rest of the White House.
* * *
Shuster tells the truth. Get it delivered to your inbox for free!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.rqjkHUp9iYKRrXtNOtudwssPB6MzrqnxSkPnbPF_x6E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178835922)
* * *
The ambiance is deadly serious and stately. A contrast, of course, with the self-absorbed and tacky Trump. He cannot tell the difference between national security and his own political security; between classified secrets and personal embarrassments; between the power of the President and the privilege of a thug. Trump's Presidency is not government. It is an extended and ongoing act of vandalism.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/77dadf2f-f1f4-4791-92de-db266cebe53d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Picture the scene: beneath the buzzing fluorescents, and alongside the hum of surveillance screens, three of the nation's top law enforcement officers gathered not to track an enemy or manage a crisis, but to whisper and cajole a Congressional backbencher into conformity and silence. The White House Situation Room, that holy bunker of U.S. national security, was turned into an immoral brew pub, where the liquor is fear and the currency is loyalty.
What inspires such frantic and demeaning shenanigans? The Epstein files -- that festering archive of underage sex trafficking and secrecy, where the names of the powerful lie like corpses under a tarp. In documents from Epstein's estate, recently released by the House Oversight committee, Donald Trump's name comes up repeatedly.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52f39e39-c411-4778-9948-f8e58ab21350?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By most accounts, as the estate emails establish, Trump and sexual predator Epstein were best friends for over a decade. In one email, Epstein wrote of Trump, "of course he knew about the girls..." In another email, Epstein wrote that "Trump spent hours" at Epstein's home with one of the girls.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f9f19f83-8c6a-4ce3-a92a-75869f16901f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Congressional lawmakers have been advised through back-channel contacts at the FBI and DOJ that the materials being withheld by the Trump administration are even more graphic and disturbing. This includes grand jury testimony, witness statements, victim interviews, photographs, and videos.
The fact that Trump's team is scrambling to keep those materials sealed tells you more than a thousand Trumpian red-faced denials and claims about a "democratic hoax." Trump and his goons are not defending security; they are defending the Orange Man's myth. And the swamp, far from being drained, has been re-stocked and covered in crass gold fixtures.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc4ecf5d-42ad-4fed-9ec1-8ba926ee0333?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a40bda88-ca62-406b-8f5a-017ee667be2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump won his first Presidential election thanks in part to jabs at Hillary Clinton and promises to "lock her up." Since then, the only thing Trump has locked up is the truth itself, as well as justice for the Epstein victims who were raped and abused. And now, in the Epstein scandal, the truth and justice remain hidden in government safes, vaults, and soundproof rooms where daylight fears to tread.
The irony is remarkable. Trump the populist, who denounced elites, has become their concierge. And, the self-proclaimed champion of transparency now wraps himself in secrecy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c0603ee-c21a-4cea-8060-dcce91043063?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In any halfway decent America, this would provoke a constitutional crisis. In ours, among far too many republicans, it provokes a shrug. People who once prided themselves on "owning the libs" now find themselves owned by their own cowardice -- and by a man whose every instinct is to hide, bluster, and bully. The GOP, once a party of principle, now resembles a medieval court that gathers not to deliberate but to flatter the monarch's paranoia.
* * *
