[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.rqjkHUp9iYKRrXtNOtudwssPB6MzrqnxSkPnbPF_x6E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178835922)
* * *
Our nation's founders warned us of tyranny. But they did not anticipate farce. They imagined a Caesar, not a demented carnival barker with a spray tan and social media addiction.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a78b70ba-0266-453d-8c67-e31434cd3c1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yet here we are -- our democracy has been reduced to a grotesque sideshow. Our public servants have been turned into butt boys (and girls). And our White House Situation Room has become a denigrating joke.
Even by raw political calculation standards, it's pathetic.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ecbc2ca2-27c1-4150-b220-bbd8d84ef00c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Because unlike the Obama team, which eliminated Bin Laden, the Trump team targeted Lauren Boebert and failed to stop her. Boebert left the White House Situation Room meeting and promptly announced she was keeping her signature on the discharge petition.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9907d6ba-4555-43e5-9c25-6f319b9fa203?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There are reports Trump also tried to pull back Nancy Mace (R-SC) from the discharge petition and that Mace refused to take Trump's phone call.
So much for Presidential power and for Donald Trump's political strength. His lobbying antics, including whoring out the Situation Room, did nothing except underscore Trump's weakness.
Democrats see how feeble Trump is. Lauren Boebert wasn't intimidated. And now, more republicans are joining the jail break.
It means that whether the White House situation room is distinguished or disgraceful -- honesty, on the Epstein files, still has a chance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4e7c1530-8fa6-42df-bf08-1c467a084eb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cc32edc1-54de-4734-bfc6-1523d1c5d3ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

She’s worked to help small businesses succeed by passing three bills to cut through red tape. She’s introduced legislation to make housing more affordable in Oregon and across the country. Janelle’s proven that she’s committed to fighting for change that benefits Oregonians and people across the country — and she’s ready to keep delivering for us in the House. = | | = Unlike Janelle, Republicans in the House have spent their time ramming through their disastrous agenda that lines the pockets of billionaires — at the expense of Oregonians. name: Seth Magaziner
subject: This economy is failing working people.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=9aNPqAm4DvFR9hJ4X9zl%2BuGhPWWqs%2Banll60OpaI%2BWuiLj7hdtLrVCtPtIWlH9MiH19Nn07gQi5V%2BPhRMto1OjJWV24CjM8F9vFeVxZe%2FJ0qCVl%2FyDzGqLlhNdHYqoo7xVKEKmP5dSAHkwTBbcLIxERRH%2FAa16fOnSww18V9Q5XlT8Otv6DRIqHNQ%2Ft0zVcsbjQgdCFxyJjfEMB5n8z9Y27KcDiIOrb%2FvuTKAgKd7h7oK%2BgTCajc%2B97K%2BodX9nygeqUY4RFpi89bghIEHrLJDiqacKnlR7w2XP%2F3Vj4vQ1SHuN3GCW3GU%2B41bfJwKEWyk3%2BnLHeYMLOu%2F4w8FX7dxlQHRu77BFuOVp7pzuUtONkdg7ppx3ZvPZF50WGPv%2BELKmoLV3UTUxMxsnj2HP%2F21j9%2F2ELcV34hbfVuKxOoJQdaySxAhevcnq2h7ZDfTjFE)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter,

The cost of coffee, meat, and fruit are all higher because of Trump’s tariffs.

Food prices keep climbing, and working people are the ones paying the price. Instead of addressing it, Republicans in Congress are choosing to do nothing, letting tariffs, corporate greed, and bad policy drive everyday costs even higher.

I’m fighting to change that. We need to lower costs for families, and invest in policies that actually make life more affordable, not ones that punish people at the checkout line.

**[If you agree, chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep fighting for policies that put working people first.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119393288/582918215/-1851914409?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20251116_FR_economyfailingpeople_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjU0ZDZlMS1mZWMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=plr3KgG1nDSbQNSITCVbywIV7OvL1hBjG7TleK0HqYI=)**

This economy shouldn’t work only for the wealthy or well-connected. It should work for everyone.

Thanks,

— Seth

name: Stop ICE Our Revolution
subject: AT&T must drop its $146 MILLION ICE contract: add your name now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Right now, communities across Chicago and the rest of the country are
fighting for their lives – and AT&T is making millions helping ICE
terrorize our neighborhoods.

ICE agents just pepper-sprayed a family, including their one-year-old
daughter, in their car while they were trying to go grocery shopping. A
child care worker was dragged out of a Chicago day care as children
watched ICE agents take their beloved teacher away.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34677?source=email-20251116&t=1011&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Headline: 'They dragged her out in front of the kids': inside Chicago's
ICE raid at a bilingual daycare

Families are living in fear. Schools and neighborhood groups are forced to
organize rapid response teams to try and stop violent abductions by
Trump’s deportation machine. We must use the power we have — and one way
is to apply pressure on complicit companies like AT&T, which holds a $146
MILLION contract to supply ICE with the technology they use to track,
identify, and tear our undocumented neighbors away from loved ones.

It’s unconscionable. Which is why Our Revolution is mobilizing the
grassroots and deploying our Citizen Action Team to demand AT&T DROP its
ICE contract now – and we need you to join us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34677?source=email-20251116&t=1012&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Take action: Add your name to tell AT&T – stop fueling ICE’s inhumane
takeover of our cities NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34677?source=email-20251116&t=1013&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]ADD YOUR NAME

Make no mistake: by providing ICE with the technology they use to identify
and track down members of our communities, AT&T is enabling this regime to
terrorize our families and rip people from their homes and schools.

We cannot allow massive corporations to continue getting away with getting
richer off our fear and suffering. Yet that’s exactly what AT&T is doing
off the back of Trump’s deportation machine, while working people are
forced to make impossible choices as our nutrition assistance and health
care are slashed.

We’re already making an impact on ICE flights. When our movement organized
against Avelo Airlines for collaborating with Trump’s regime and forced
the airline to stop operating out of several airports, we showed what’s
possible.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34677?source=email-20251116&t=1014&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Headline: Avelo Airlines outcry shows will pay a price for assisting
Trump's takeover

Now, it's time to come after AT&T, with people power, right in their own
backyard.

Next week, Our Revolution activists will show how powerful this movement
is when we come together alongside our allies for a demonstration at a
Chicago AT&T store. But we need a tidal wave of support from across the
country to up the pressure on AT&T executives to act.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34677?source=email-20251116&t=1015&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Add your name right now and send a powerful message: AT&T, drop your
ICE contract and stop enabling Trump’s deportation force, NOW!

Our neighborhoods are showing up for each other. Now let’s show the
corporations we won’t stand for their complicity with ICE for profit.
Together, let’s force AT&T to pick a side.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251116.SQ6FRS&t=1007&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251116.L7Ss4v&t=1008&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251116.-FHQXD&t=1009&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251116.LvUJZW&t=1010&akid=9835%2E5885482%2EAlCv1K ]GIVE ONCE

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

**REMEMBER:** Top Democrats like Elizabeth Warren agree that abolishing the Electoral College is the ONLY WAY to stop Republicans from stealing future presidential elections.

[But, literally nobody in your area has signed onto our petition... **do you even care, team?!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70034?t=3&akid=23612%2E4449941%2Eg8DCqG)

**We’re re-opening our petition for the next 14 hours ONLY in your area! Team, if you truly care about helping to save our democracy, you’ll sign on before it’s too late.** [ **125,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign our petition now to show Congress there’s massive support for abolishing the Electoral College once and for all! >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70034?t=4&akid=23612%2E4449941%2Eg8DCqG) | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70034?t=5&akid=23612%2E4449941%2Eg8DCqG)

**BREAKING via _NBC_ :** "Trump just realigned the entire political map. Democrats have 'no easy path' to fix it."
[**Elizabeth Warren is calling for an END to the Electoral College now. Without 125,OOO signatures, ****we won 't be able to show Democrats in Congress there's a critical mass. Please sign the petition now:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70034?t=6&akid=23612%2E4449941%2Eg8DCqG)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70034?t=7&akid=23612%2E4449941%2Eg8DCqG)
---
This petition is registered to you only.

Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

_Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory._

**Now, Sen. Elizabeth Warren is urgently pleading with Democrats:**
We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.

**So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again.**

[**_If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70034?t=8&akid=23612%2E4449941%2Eg8DCqG)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70034?t=9&akid=23612%2E4449941%2Eg8DCqG)
---
Thank you,

_Fight for Reform_

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Oh no... Fox News.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Tune into Fox News (don't, actually) and you will see a steady stream of Trump sycophants alongside curious case of California Derangement Syndrome.

Tune into Fox News (don't, actually) and you will see a steady stream of Trump sycophants alongside curious case of California Derangement Syndrome.
But here are some cold, hard FACTS you will never see on the network.
🆙 Prices are not, down ... they are UP.
☕️ Coffee: UP 18.9%
🛜 Utilities: UP 11.7%
💡Electricity: UP 5.1%
🚗 Vehicles: UP 11.5%
💰 Middle class families in California pay LESS in taxes than in states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas.
🔴 Life expectancy, infant mortality, deaths of despair, wages and uninsured rates are all worse off in red states.
🚨 For Greg Abbott and Texas Republicans talking trash: California is the fourth largest economy in the WORLD. We contribute $83 billion to the federal government while Texas takes $71 billion.
🥇 California is #1 in manufacturing, #1 in farming, #1 in new business starts, #1 in tech and VC investments, #1 in Fortune 500 companies, and the #1 public higher education system in the country.
👨👩👧👧 California has some of the strongest gun laws in the country and as a result has a 43% lower gun death rate than the rest of the U.S. according to data from the CDC while President Trump oversaw the largest spike in homicides recorded in U.S. history.
😡 Republicans across the country are fanning the flames of culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth, and economic outcomes they are failing.
🗳️ When Democrats go on OFFENSE, we WIN.
THANK YOU FOR YOUR ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER!
Gavin Newsom
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have a book coming out in a few weeks. It's called "Young Man in a Hurry." It's a good book. Very personal. At the same time, we just spent a bunch of money on passing Prop 50, so now I need to refill that coffers at my Campaign for Democracy for the fights ahead
If you make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT, I'll send you a copy of my new book when it comes out. The average cost per book is $22.45 including shipping. If you can give that, great. If you can only give $5, great. If you want to cover the cost for a few folks who can only give a few bucks, great.
[**Make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT today and I will send you a copy of my new book, "Young Man in a Hurry." If we raise more than costs, every dollar will go toward helping Democrats fight back against Trump's effort to rig the next election.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/5333?source=em251116&t=4&akid=2790%2E4767699%2EacmZQ0)
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $23](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/5334?source=em251116&t=5&akid=2790%2E4767699%2EacmZQ0)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/5333?source=em251116&t=6&akid=2790%2E4767699%2EacmZQ0)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=2790%2E4767699%2EacmZQ0).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

At the same time, we just spent a bunch of money on passing Prop 50, so now I need to refill that coffers at my Campaign for Democracy for the fights ahead If you make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT, I'll send you a copy of my new book when it comes out. The average cost per book is $22.45 including shipping. If you can give that, great. If you can only give $5, great. If you want to cover the cost for a few folks who can only give a few bucks, great. | | |

body:
Every GOP voter should verify their profile ASAP
Dear Fellow American,
I am reaching out with a critical request.
For decades, the radical left has allowed open borders that flooded their states with illegal immigrants. Now, they want to turn them into voters - but not on our watch.
[That’s why the House GOP needs to verify EVERY GOP voter ahead of the 2026 midterms. ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=794d44fdf2e540e5b5744070e1d0f767&_e=WbkbAj7L2cVwJPTI4coK8kv5KsgPJ5GGq9kD1d4Tr3puqSEwKvvlPyFMGj1lMOG9AaIbw6nY9zdrKNwMaSPceahFvIUa8hn66-JArvDCIYgyFM6udla7KHJE1bdozIXDq9ysKxkO2Zo1Fs32a-LkJXbkSHSkhG7zA0YRSvba7zczra3-dQazrhyT1IFSF3UgNrSJzhvDjz1tk-jEmEgi281ZdGtS5X-B2Sge8oRlNGJvVIPDoJ11tafUn0e6xao6a6hepKvd6iV67lsyWdjSg4QTthcZEQc-68OwMpguJ1W33-qwuJP07nSPUUoEk2l9kAWVaoKHnhp0U_kWjF7r7s6uuqoE2jSbOmHBqFTWXldMqjwOBJJ8CdHTz70i3l7PC8yQr8iBakpj0yuooAjXi8ivXFy1G5KOlozDqdjYYPDz7zIDmgzJw5IuA4ZKPtbqbSj9LaimViY4vXX9xsKwjGsW8uC2DSZtzg0luun6FZH73nP6NnGrEkhS2kyIZQ4kreG9l-pYmYpy3vSzF5ddszCFUM7BqM-iqEmZlN6LOgfNSzHWKV5Yk2xtRhb3_4AnCRLuBed74mLB98Ppj_Kk9A5OkUpx8bqFMh5jLyaw2-Wucd71-BOKDzfv8KwuSMBEhT6e6rarJu-1jbmYQh2TNUSEEVBe0XjWutMIWGUpoZtwxjD5-wmP6ZCR3ZfNsdbI3vKkGEE2JNwIDv_HkEpXZZJcngQN1ucaVN-kIodRLLA5R6LHo6ELaM9AUuS426Nunvcx2-Dm3VeD0EHU5bEuYayulD5WGE7DikJOpKjgwJ4VgRbRqrqpDM6HOQqDC45rpOH1-ZOA14D5skh0TzVE4u3NScGsfgr2rg5Oh3hAyVA%3D)

name: Team DNC
subject: Help us pick a winner →
body:
---
Derek, as we prepare to close the books on 2025 and gear up for 2026, we’re requesting input from dedicated supporters like you: **We’re getting ready to release our Official 2026 Democratic Member Card, but we need your input on which design you’d like to see.** [**Can you take a few seconds to vote on your favorite member card design? Your input will help inform what this year’s member cards look like:**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&amount=7&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&amount=7&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&amount=7&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&amount=7&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB)
Democrats in every corner of the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into the 2026 midterm elections — a reminder that there are millions of us who didn’t vote for Trump’s agenda and aren’t standing idly by while it’s enacted.
This year, we’ve held town halls in all 50 states. We’ve invested in every single Democratic state party. We turned out millions of voters to support Democratic candidates and ballot initiatives, sweeping races nationwide. **And in 2026, we’ll continue building on that momentum as we take back Congress.**
[**So, Derek, as an invaluable part of this team, we know your input is critical. Will you be one of the first supporters to select your favorite member card design?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB)
**[VOTE](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB)**
Thank you for your continued support,
The Democrats
P.S. [**After you cast a vote on your favorite design, consider making a donation of whatever you can afford to reserve your 2026 Member Card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&refcode2=5283_22930333_F7xBcB&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251116_5283_fr&refcode2=5283_22930333_F7xBcB&akid=5283%2E22930333%2EF7xBcB)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
clean_body: Derek, as we prepare to close the books on 2025 and gear up for 2026, we’re requesting input from dedicated supporters like you: We’re getting ready to release our Official 2026 Democratic Member Card, but we need your input on which design you’d like to see. Democrats in every corner of the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into the 2026 midterm elections — a reminder that there are millions of us who didn’t vote for Trump’s agenda and aren’t standing idly by while it’s enacted. This year, we’ve held town halls in all 50 states. We’ve invested in every single Democratic state party. We turned out millions of voters to support Democratic candidates and ballot initiatives, sweeping races nationwide. And in 2026, we’ll continue building on that momentum as we take back Congress. Thank you for your continued support, The Democrats P.S. If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

subject: A special thank you for you, Peter

### Critical minerals are another front in the US-China war.

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7e63891a-cbf2-49b0-a1a7-a99061429ee1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Energy, which has usually meant oil, has been a driver of geopolitics for the past 100 years or so. As the internal combustion engine touched every aspect of life, fuel was needed for cars and trucks, industrial machines, and farm equipment. The world's militaries transitioned away from coal-fired power and grew dependent upon gasoline to power tanks, planes, and ships. As eloquently described in Daniel Yergin's _**[The Prize: The Epic Quest for Oil, Money& Power](https://substack.com/redirect/8421be8d-c4f5-49a0-92ba-5df436d139c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, _the pursuit of oil impacted virtually every one of a country's actions in both times of war and times of peace.
A similar dynamic is playing out with rare earths and critical minerals. It's becoming increasingly clear that these commodities are the 21st century's version of oil. They are vital inputs for technology and electronics, and essential to power data centers that fuel AI systems. It's impossible to imagine a future that is not dependent upon critical minerals.
Before we go further, what are rare earth elements? The Reuters video below is a fabulous 3 minute primer and worth your time.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e3097b80-8c35-453a-a253-12266e82d91d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Regular readers of my work know that I've been concerned about a rapidly-escalating, even if not (yet) kinetic, US-China War. And for years, I've been concerned about America's dependence upon China for critical minerals. In fact, in my January 2021 set of predictions (see link below), I explicitly stated I believed rare earth commodities would hit all time highs within five years.
* * *
## [21 Global Developments to Watch Over the Next Five Years](https://substack.com/redirect/65d847ee-bc27-4dfc-a012-be2544e6a1dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| January 6, 2021
[](https://substack.com/redirect/65d847ee-bc27-4dfc-a012-be2544e6a1dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[2020 will go down as one of the most anxiety-inducing, stomach-churning, confidence-sapping, and downright disappointing years on record. While it began with a global fascination on the potential imp...](https://substack.com/redirect/65d847ee-bc27-4dfc-a012-be2544e6a1dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/65d847ee-bc27-4dfc-a012-be2544e6a1dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
One of my core beliefs that has run through all my work is that it's critical (pardon the pun) to connect the dots across seemingly disparate sources of information. As part of my growing concern about America's vulnerability with respect to critical minerals, I interviewed James Litinksy for my THINK FOR YOURSELF podcast and webinar series. James is the Chairman and CEO of MP Materials, America's largest producer of rare earth commodities, and we spoke at length about the upcoming rare-earth conflict. The conversation, which took place almost 5 years ago, remains relevant and is worth your time. Link below.
* * *
[TFY Podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/1508ca31-b85a-4718-943a-7817031a510c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
## [VIDEO: Talking Rare Earths with MP Materials' James Litinsky](https://substack.com/redirect/1508ca31-b85a-4718-943a-7817031a510c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| March 4, 2021
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1508ca31-b85a-4718-943a-7817031a510c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1508ca31-b85a-4718-943a-7817031a510c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/1508ca31-b85a-4718-943a-7817031a510c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**So where do we stand today?**
To say that China is the Middle East of rare earths wouldn't only be an understatement; it's also cliche. Deng Xiaoping made the same point as far back as 1992, when he remarked that, "The Middle East has oil; China has rare earths." China has more rare earths than any other nation on earth; Brazil, with less than half of China's amount, is second.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aa610e60-454c-4647-8275-fb4835b23e71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
China is also the world's leading producer of 15 of 27 rare earths, and its share of global production tops 60 percent in 12 of them. This includes a nearly 99 percent share of gallium and 95 percent share of magnesium, as well the vast majority of the world's tungsten, bismuth, graphite and silicon.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40d72083-cf25-47c3-ad1c-dc1c619e839e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The flip side of Chinese dominance is US dependence. The U.S. imports 70 percent of its rare earths from China, including many that are crucial to national security. Malaysia, Japan, and Estonia also play a role.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8cbc168e-c38c-4511-a183-c69ca1d81ebb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
China has also showed a willingness to withhold exports for geopolitical leverage. In 2010, it [halted mineral shipments](https://substack.com/redirect/a396e2d2-d487-4213-813d-8b94f347191a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Japan over a dispute involving a Chinese fishing trawler colliding with a Japanese Coast Guard ship. Beijing also threatened to [weaponize](https://substack.com/redirect/f0de8084-1404-455b-87e0-671804f2b8c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) rare earths during 2019 trade tensions with the U.S, and has been doing [exactly that](https://substack.com/redirect/615e6f3c-1ff2-4e2f-b5c0-1837ed37f2e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during the trade war this year.
Is there any doubt that Chinese will use this stranglehold to choke off the U.S. supply of rare earths in any future conflict between the two powers? How might this threat temper the U.S. response to a Chinese invasion of Taiwan?
* * *
## [Three Gigantic Global (Imminent) Opportunities](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff88788-2b21-473b-a254-ad63e5258235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| July 17, 2023
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff88788-2b21-473b-a254-ad63e5258235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Uncertainty is a two-sided coin. Lots of us focus on the risks emerging from uncertainty; we should also consider the opportunities it creates. In fact, it might be that a lack of uncertainty is a l...](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff88788-2b21-473b-a254-ad63e5258235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff88788-2b21-473b-a254-ad63e5258235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
The bifurcation of the world is creating two global ecosystems based on values. This is the new geopolitical battlefield, and rare earths will play a disproportionate role as to which ecosystem will end up on top by century's end. **The critical minerals race is on (and has been for a while), but it 's far from** **over**.
And while the United States may be "behind" at this point, I would never bet against a system that prizes individual liberties, protects property rights, values intellectual capital, and ultimately abides by rule of law...especially against a system that runs roughshod over individuals and rights in pursuit of centrally determined objectives.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/6bd45670-0a49-49b9-8114-7bc61dd8dc28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/806d736b-91cf-4dcc-a3f5-562067f2a1c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/0c22878b-8695-45e5-84d1-157a725056ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

The world's militaries transitioned away from coal-fired power and grew dependent upon gasoline to power tanks, planes, and ships. As eloquently described in Daniel Yergin's , the pursuit of oil impacted virtually every one of a country's actions in both times of war and times of peace. A similar dynamic is playing out with rare earths and critical minerals. It's becoming increasingly clear that these commodities are the 21st century's version of oil. They are vital inputs for technology and electronics, and essential to power data centers that fuel AI systems. It's impossible to imagine a future that is not dependent upon critical minerals. In case you need a refresher, here’s what you need to know about the candidates 👇
**MICHAEL WHATLEY (R)**
💰 Former Big Oil lobbyist
🔴 GOP insider handpicked by the national party
⛔ Supports BANNING abortion care
🩺 Supports the GOP’s agenda of SLASHING Medicaid
**ROY COOPER (D)**
✅ Former Governor trusted by North Carolinians
♀️ Strong supporter of the right to access abortion care
🩺 Proponent of health care access (passed Medicaid Expansion as Governor)
🗳️ Voting rights defender

name: Janet Mills
subject: I’m going to fight like hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8746?t=2&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)
null, I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I could _never_ live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.
Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger every _single day,_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it.
**So I’ve officially announced my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins. MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority.[Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8747?t=3&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8746?t=4&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)
---
null, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, the first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And null, I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years.
_
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me.>> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8746?t=5&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janet Mills and Haley Stevens will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8748?t=6&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8749?t=7&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8750?t=8&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8746?t=9&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)
---
Let’s win this thing.

– Janet Mills
Governor of Maine
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8751?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8752?t=11&akid=1360%2E49239%2EqZWa6Q)
---

Thank you,
Haley

body:
Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina.
#

**Cook Political Report has FOUR U.S. Senate races currently rated as TOSS UPS for 2026:** _Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina._
---

**Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Jon Ossoff** — _the most vulnerable Democrat in the 2026 midterm elections._ The GOP will undoubtedly do everything they can to win this seat back for a Republican. They’ll spend millions upon millions of dollars. They’ll come up with all sorts of outlandish attacks. Anything to solidify their majority in the Senate next year. **[DEFEND GEORGIA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97731?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl)**
---

**Maine’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Susan Collins** — _the most vulnerable Republican in the 2026 midterm elections._ Cook Political Report recently UPGRADED this race from Leans Republican to TOSS UP, signaling that Democrats have a major opportunity to flip this seat. Now, we need to make sure we carry the momentum we've seen for Democrats in Maine + across the country all the way to next November. **[FLIP MAINE: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97731?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl)**
---

**Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Gary Peters,** who announced earlier this year that he will retire in 2026. _The good news is that Democrats currently hold every statewide seat in Michigan._ But defending this critical Democrat-held Senate seat won't be easy. _Last year, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race was one of the closest in the country._ So now, we can absolutely expect the GOP to go all-in to win this open seat. **[DEFEND MICHIGAN: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97731?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl)**
---

**North Carolina’s GOP-held U.S. Senate seat is one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities for 2026.** We have a strong Democratic candidate in former governor Roy Cooper, who has a record of winning + delivering for the people of North Carolina. _But outside groups are already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this Senate race_ — a year away from the actual election! If this is any indication, the GOP will spend BIG to stop Democrats from flipping this Senate seat next year. **[FLIP NORTH CAROLINA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97731?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl)**
---

**Today, we’re asking for your help to defend the Democratic candidates running in all of these battleground elections and more, Peter.** **[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us take back the Senate in 2026? Giving right now, while it’s still early, could make an even bigger impact than it would next year!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97731?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97732?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=6&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97732?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=7&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97732?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97732?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97732?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97732?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97731?refcode=em20251116-9720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=9720%2E614464%2EnU44Sl)

clean_body: Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina. Cook Political Report has FOUR U.S. Senate races currently rated as TOSS UPS for 2026: Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina. Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Jon Ossoff — the most vulnerable Democrat in the 2026 midterm elections. The GOP will undoubtedly do everything they can to win this seat back for a Republican. They’ll spend millions upon millions of dollars. They’ll come up with all sorts of outlandish attacks. Anything to solidify their majority in the Senate next year. Maine’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Susan Collins — the most vulnerable Republican in the 2026 midterm elections. Cook Political Report recently UPGRADED this race from Leans Republican to TOSS UP, signaling that Democrats have a major opportunity to flip this seat. Now, we need to make sure we carry the momentum we've seen for Democrats in Maine + across the country all the way to next November. Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Gary Peters, who announced earlier this year that he will retire in 2026. The good news is that Democrats currently hold every statewide seat in Michigan. But defending this critical Democrat-held Senate seat won't be easy. Last year, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race was one of the closest in the country. So now, we can absolutely expect the GOP to go all-in to win this open seat. North Carolina’s GOP-held U.S. Senate seat is one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities for 2026. We have a strong Democratic candidate in former governor Roy Cooper, who has a record of winning + delivering for the people of North Carolina. But outside groups are already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this Senate race — a year away from the actual election! If this is any indication, the GOP will spend BIG to stop Democrats from flipping this Senate seat next year. Today, we’re asking for your help to defend the Democratic candidates running in all of these battleground elections and more, Peter. Peter,
In one of the marquee races of 2026, Democrat Trisha Calvarese is taking on MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert. In this race, Democrats have a real shot at pulling off one of the most stunning victories in the upcoming '26 midterm elections.
As a labor leader and a public servant, Trisha has a long track record of fighting to improve the lives of working-families and her message is gaining traction in Colorado's 4th District. She's exactly the kind of working-class populist who can take down Lauren Boebert once and for all.
Here's why your support matters: Lauren Boebert is one of the most vulnerable GOP members heading into 2026 and Democrats can flip this seat on route to taking back the House.
Here's why your support could be the difference: Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes.
Here's why Trisha is so close to toppling Boebert: In 2024, when Trisha ran against Boebert, she delivered the strongest Democratic performance this district has ever seen--outperfoming Kamala Harris by 6 points while Boebert underperformed Trump in every county during a red wave election.

Peter,
In one of the marquee races of 2026, Democrat Trisha Calvarese is taking on MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert. In this race, Democrats have a real shot at pulling off one of the most stunning victories in the upcoming '26 midterm elections.
As a labor leader and a public servant, Trisha has a long track record of fighting to improve the lives of working-families and her message is gaining traction in Colorado's 4th District. She's exactly the kind of working-class populist who can take down Lauren Boebert once and for all.
Here's why your support matters: Lauren Boebert is one of the most vulnerable GOP members heading into 2026 and Democrats can flip this seat on route to taking back the House.
Here's why your support could be the difference: Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes.
Here's why Trisha is so close to toppling Boebert: In 2024, when Trisha ran against Boebert, she delivered the strongest Democratic performance this district has ever seen--outperfoming Kamala Harris by 6 points while Boebert underperformed Trump in every county during a red wave election.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015KZALcx6XP1tz0mJRgtajqXzLopwNV9coJZX_6SGtAJmacgCrhl2jabtsh5VB8xcA-4uiekapXg01gX5OXBZfkzwi1GzacKICORKP7zif-6dL_CZOdLFrdRhcVEwrVQoxNB7LeA-nnbDa2MCBcLAiDUvBZviFGPww-xVVfIc27NsdvY1oleUOjbtccwAIDy97UMnjDq7iExeAMyzbDb5SxwIgM4yR1k8&c=rIhdigv11NeBGs6AbCXzEhAYwz7hQhQFwn6XS9VAHKAKTPwmBVQoDA==&ch=sTGkbSWcxUUxDtyzeM-jH1D4R7SPwwle9CTgLoIOajVPbs7WVHMP5w==)

2026 is shaping up to be a massive blue wave election, and Boebert is more vulnerable now than she's ever been. Trisha just outraised her 5 to 1 last quarter, is surging with unstoppable momentum, and is proving that voters here are done with Boebert's circus acts and ready for a working-class Democrat who'll actually fight for them.
But to have a real shot at defeating Boebert and flipping this seat blue, our campaign needs to raise another $5,000 before midnight tonight--and we aren't even close to hitting the goal. Boebert has the full might of MAGA backing her, but we have something stronger: an army of working-class Democrats who show up when it counts.
That is why we are sending out an urgent SOS beacon to all Democrats:
Please Peter, [will you make a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you before midnight tonight to help Trisha defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015KZALcx6XP1tz0mJRgtajqXzLopwNV9coJZX_6SGtAJmacgCrhl2jabtsh5VB8xcdbfeLOFUp8pvt-tIhGr58S08WNDGoDm1-1tY_MX41qkIFll-6LcJrP5N40uptfFZ58n99VPQIXrGXy6OoQ8qzxlPgyqefxkhGH89JX4JmIQBkKBJvVwcLjOCVGK4ohtM_GCdRqs886hM8saUgZek2i3C-r326gFqANQdgambJmU=&c=rIhdigv11NeBGs6AbCXzEhAYwz7hQhQFwn6XS9VAHKAKTPwmBVQoDA==&ch=sTGkbSWcxUUxDtyzeM-jH1D4R7SPwwle9CTgLoIOajVPbs7WVHMP5w==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, In one of the marquee races of 2026, Democrat Trisha Calvarese is taking on MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert. In this race, Democrats have a real shot at pulling off one of the most stunning victories in the upcoming '26 midterm elections. As a labor leader and a public servant, Trisha has a long track record of fighting to improve the lives of working-families and her message is gaining traction in Colorado's 4th District. She's exactly the kind of working-class populist who can take down Lauren Boebert once and for all. Here's why your support matters: Lauren Boebert is one of the most vulnerable GOP members heading into 2026 and Democrats can flip this seat on route to taking back the House. Here's why your support could be the difference: Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. Here's why Trisha is so close to toppling Boebert: In 2024, when Trisha ran against Boebert, she delivered the strongest Democratic performance this district has ever seen--outperfoming Kamala Harris by 6 points while Boebert underperformed Trump in every county during a red wave election. | == 2026 is shaping up to be a massive blue wave election, and Boebert is more vulnerable now than she's ever been. Trisha just outraised her 5 to 1 last quarter, is surging with unstoppable momentum, and is proving that voters here are done with Boebert's circus acts and ready for a working-class Democrat who'll actually fight for them. But to have a real shot at defeating Boebert and flipping this seat blue, our campaign needs to raise another $5,000 before midnight tonight--and we aren't even close to hitting the goal. Boebert has the full might of MAGA backing her, but we have something stronger: an army of working-class Democrats who show up when it counts. That is why we are sending out an urgent SOS beacon to all Democrats: Please Peter, == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thank you for everything you do for Trisha and for Democrats everywhere, Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | | | | | | |

Elise has made it crystal clear whose side she's on — and it's not New Yorkers.

She's shown us time and time again that she only works on behalf of Trump and his MAGA agenda. And the GOP is already gearing up to spend millions to bring MAGA destruction to New York's statehouse. But New Yorkers deserve a governor who works for them, not a MAGA loyalist seeking applause in D.C.

**Kathy Hochul has proven she's a fighter for New York** — protecting reproductive freedom, keeping communities safe, and making sure families can build a better life. She’s stood up to Trump's attacks before, and she'll do it again. But she can't do it alone.

This race is going to be one of the _closest_ and _most expensive_ in the country. If Elise and her MAGA allies smell even a hint of weakness, they'll flood New York with right-wing money and disinformation. EMILYs List is ready to go all in, but we need grassroots supporters like you with us from the very start.

clean_body: New Yorkers deserve a governor who delivers, not a MAGA loyalist seeking applause in D.C. | = Peter, meet Elise Stefanik: She's bragged about being Donald Trump's "top ally." She proudly calls herself "ultra-MAGA." And now, a new poll shows her within three points of Gov. Kathy Hochul in the New York governor's race. = | = Elise has made it crystal clear whose side she's on — and it's not New Yorkers. She's shown us time and time again that she only works on behalf of Trump and his MAGA agenda. And the GOP is already gearing up to spend millions to bring MAGA destruction to New York's statehouse. But New Yorkers deserve a governor who works for them, not a MAGA loyalist seeking applause in D.C. Kathy Hochul has proven she's a fighter for New York — protecting reproductive freedom, keeping communities safe, and making sure families can build a better life. She’s stood up to Trump's attacks before, and she'll do it again. But she can't do it alone. This race is going to be one of the closest and most expensive in the country. If Elise and her MAGA allies smell even a hint of weakness, they'll flood New York with right-wing money and disinformation. EMILYs List is ready to go all in, but we need grassroots supporters like you with us from the very start. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for standing with our candidates. – the EMILYs List Campaigns Team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: NDRC
subject: Let’s make their gerrymandering attempts backfire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The lone Democrat representing Kansas is under threat of redistricting.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119402759/582939708/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNTA0N2EyLTA5YzMtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=21o_gZz6gN_svq_OKlyqYwbVJw2l5I55aZ-9-8Q5Ia4=&emci=f28d2a08-70c1-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8a5047a2-09c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, There’s one simple reason why Republicans are manipulating district lines everywhere from Texas to Missouri to North Carolina: They know they have to cheat to win. Their policies are unpopular, and their politicians are terrified of the will of the people. So instead, they’re trying to rig the rules of the game so they can’t lose. No one puts this better than Rep. Sharice Davids, the lone Democrat representing Kansas in Congress whose seat Kansas Republicans are threatening to redraw in order to defeat her. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119402760/582939709/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ShariceDavidsSumsUp_email_20251116-NDRC-Tier1-ShariceDavidsSumsUp_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251116-NDRC-Tier1-ShariceDavidsSumsUp_&utm_campaign=ShariceDavidsSumsUp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNTA0N2EyLTA5YzMtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=21o_gZz6gN_svq_OKlyqYwbVJw2l5I55aZ-9-8Q5Ia4=)

Friend, Our cruel, fascist president and his billionaire MAGA cronies are trying to pick who counts and who gets to live. They’re spreading fear to divide us, so they can hoard wealth and power while taking away our rights and resources. As they hand tax breaks to billionaires and give Argentina’s right-wing government a $40 billion bailout, they’re simultaneously taking away food and healthcare from vulnerable families. **But I have hope:** Just as previous generations rose up to stop oppression, millions of Americans are rising up against MAGA’s attempts to violate our rights and turn our communities into war zones. They’re organizing patrols and networks to block ICE agents and they’re doing grocery dropoffs to help neighbors in need. We must continue fighting fascism by standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent. Thank you. Throughout Donald Trump’s government shutdown, I demanded healthcare as a human right and led my colleagues in Congress to push Trump’s administration to fund food assistance and stop illegally firing federal workers. Even with the federal government re-opened, that work continues now.
Together we’ll keep fighting for justice and dignity for every family who calls our country home.
With you in the fight for better,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Nov 15, 2025
Subject: How we fight fascism while defending our neighbors and our rights:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Across the country, Americans are rising up against our fascist and cruel president.
They’re keeping their communities safe from illegal immigration raids, including organizing patrols and doing emergency planning with families and schools. They’ve also been showing up for their neighbors by helping SNAP recipients buy groceries or access free food during the shutdown.
During the government shutdown, I never stopped serving you. I led colleagues in Congress to push Trump’s administration to fund the life-saving food assistance program known as SNAP. To help the millions of people impacted, my team and I distributed food and raised money for food banks.
Joining my colleagues, I demanded Republicans renew the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help 21 million Americans afford healthcare. I also cosponsored legislation to safeguard our democracy and shield federal workers from the Trump administration's illegal layoffs.
**We must keep speaking up and resisting.** By standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent, we fight fascism and make sure our constitutional rights are not eroded.

clean_body: By standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent, we fight fascism. | | | Friend, Our cruel, fascist president and his billionaire MAGA cronies are trying to pick who counts and who gets to live. They’re spreading fear to divide us, so they can hoard wealth and power while taking away our rights and resources. As they hand tax breaks to billionaires and give Argentina’s right-wing government a $40 billion bailout, they’re simultaneously taking away food and healthcare from vulnerable families. But I have hope: Just as previous generations rose up to stop oppression, millions of Americans are rising up against MAGA’s attempts to violate our rights and turn our communities into war zones. They’re organizing patrols and networks to block ICE agents and they’re doing grocery dropoffs to help neighbors in need. We must continue fighting fascism by standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Throughout Donald Trump’s government shutdown, I demanded healthcare as a human right and led my colleagues in Congress to push Trump’s administration to fund food assistance and stop illegally firing federal workers. Even with the federal government re-opened, that work continues now. Together we’ll keep fighting for justice and dignity for every family who calls our country home. With you in the fight for better, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Nov 15, 2025 Subject: How we fight fascism while defending our neighbors and our rights: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Across the country, Americans are rising up against our fascist and cruel president. They’re keeping their communities safe from illegal immigration raids, including organizing patrols and doing emergency planning with families and schools. They’ve also been showing up for their neighbors by helping SNAP recipients buy groceries or access free food during the shutdown. During the government shutdown, I never stopped serving you. I led colleagues in Congress to push Trump’s administration to fund the life-saving food assistance program known as SNAP. To help the millions of people impacted, my team and I distributed food and raised money for food banks. Joining my colleagues, I demanded Republicans renew the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help 21 million Americans afford healthcare. I also cosponsored legislation to safeguard our democracy and shield federal workers from the Trump administration's illegal layoffs. We must keep speaking up and resisting. By standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent, we fight fascism and make sure our constitutional rights are not eroded. Trump and MAGA Republicans are spreading fear to divide us, so they can hoard wealth and power while taking away our rights and resources. They want to pick and choose who counts and who gets to be human. They want to block us from joining together to demand what we all deserve, because they’re scared of the power we have when we come together across differences. But just as previous generations rose up to end slavery and win civil rights, we will keep making our voices heard and building the people power we need to win. We know a better future is possible, and together we’ll keep pushing for a country where no one starves and everyone can thrive. But we’re up against powerful corporate special interests and billionaires with deep influence over most of my colleagues in Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | We shouldn’t be begging our country to protect our constitutional and human rights. But we must keep protesting—it’s one of the most patriotic and American things we can do. Keep it up! | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: Trump is already talking….
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111325_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111325_1]
It's official...
I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home.
Hi Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero.
In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress.
This isn't going to be your average campaign — we’re at the forefront of a movement backed by real people who are ready for a new generation of leadership. I won't be bought or intimidated. Instead, I'll be relying on folks like you. So, if you're willing to be one of the first donors to my campaign, will you split a donation between myself and Real Texas PAC right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111325_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111325_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111325_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111325_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111325_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111325_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111325_1&amount=25]
I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy.
I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life. But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today.
Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research.
We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it.
And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool.
None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard."
Together, we can build a new Congress and a New York City that works for everyone. Will you join our movement today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Real Texas PAC ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111325_1]
Talk soon,
Jack

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
