Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Ready Now. | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Atlantic Ave., Suite 200 Delray Beach, FL 33444 Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. body:
It is the honor of my life to be in this fight with you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119403688/582941843/1328794144?refcode=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMWRhMWMxLTBjYzMtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7hG9njgkQO9LFu_t_rYe8u36zX7ewZhOknj_PHLkvrE=&emci=fb1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

We have a _lot_ to celebrate! So far this year, we’ve elected **over 60 climate champions** all across the country. I’m talking seats in city councils, state legislatures, a public service commission, Congress, and more — wins that YOU made possible. **[Many of these state and local candidates put in long hours with very little recognition. I want them to know just how proud we are. Will you take a moment to represent your community in Cresco and sign our congratulations card today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119403689/582941844/-840730308?refcode=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMWRhMWMxLTBjYzMtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7hG9njgkQO9LFu_t_rYe8u36zX7ewZhOknj_PHLkvrE=&emci=fb1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119403690/582941845/-840730308?refcode=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMWRhMWMxLTBjYzMtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7hG9njgkQO9LFu_t_rYe8u36zX7ewZhOknj_PHLkvrE=&emci=fb1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105) I hope you take a moment to reflect on what you’ve been a part of and how your support is transforming not only the face of leadership in our country, but the daily reality for millions of people who call it home. Thank you! At 87, I’ve lived long enough to learn that nothing is guaranteed, especially when you threaten the status quo that’s benefited the likes of Big Oil and corporate polluters for all too long. These state and local races? These are the ones Big Oil quietly buys and hopes we’re not paying attention to. But on election night, voters sent a clear message: We’re done with politicians who bend to Big Oil and Big Bullies. We want leaders who lead with courage and integrity — leaders who will fight for clean air and clean water, who stand up to polluters, and who will defend our democracy from those trying to undermine it. **It’s for those very reasons that when voters raise their voices at the ballot box, they side with climate champions we’ve endorsed._That’s why we’re in this work together. That’s why we win together. And that is special._** **[It’s the honor of my life to be in this fight with you, and it’s time for us to celebrate. Will you join me in congratulating our climate champions by signing the card below? We set a goal to reach 1,000 signatures before the day ends so we can show them just how darn proud we are.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119403691/582941846/-840730308?refcode=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMWRhMWMxLTBjYzMtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7hG9njgkQO9LFu_t_rYe8u36zX7ewZhOknj_PHLkvrE=&emci=fb1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE CARD**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119403692/582941847/-840730308?refcode=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMWRhMWMxLTBjYzMtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7hG9njgkQO9LFu_t_rYe8u36zX7ewZhOknj_PHLkvrE=&emci=fb1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fe1da1c1-0cc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: It is the honor of my life to be in this fight with you. | We have a lot to celebrate! So far this year, we’ve elected over 60 climate champions all across the country. I’m talking seats in city councils, state legislatures, a public service commission, Congress, and more — wins that YOU made possible. I hope you take a moment to reflect on what you’ve been a part of and how your support is transforming not only the face of leadership in our country, but the daily reality for millions of people who call it home. Thank you! At 87, I’ve lived long enough to learn that nothing is guaranteed, especially when you threaten the status quo that’s benefited the likes of Big Oil and corporate polluters for all too long. These state and local races? These are the ones Big Oil quietly buys and hopes we’re not paying attention to. But on election night, voters sent a clear message: We’re done with politicians who bend to Big Oil and Big Bullies. We want leaders who lead with courage and integrity — leaders who will fight for clean air and clean water, who stand up to polluters, and who will defend our democracy from those trying to undermine it. It’s for those very reasons that when voters raise their voices at the ballot box, they side with climate champions we’ve endorsed.That’s why we’re in this work together. That’s why we win together. And that is special. | Onward, Jane xx | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I believe He saved me for a reason.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Here's why I think He did it.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
**I was never supposed to be President.**
Friend,
I was never supposed to survive the bullet of an assassin, **BUT I DID.**
I was never supposed to be President of the United States again, **BUT I AM.**
I was never supposed to Make America Great Again, **BUT I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
The great behemoth known as the Democrat Party threw everything at me: Hoaxes, Witch Hunts, Impeachments, Election Interference, Raids, Arrests, and so much more!
But the steady compass of Faith has guided my hands through it all.
_Democrats are brainstorming new plots to shut down our movement after they failed to stop MAGA through the government shutdown. They want nothing more than to: clench enough power to**destroy our great country.**_
_We can’t take our foot off the gas!_
I was saved for this one reason: to Make America Great Again.
I was made for this, **BUT MAGA IS POWERED BY YOU.**
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
May God Bless you,

Donald J. Trump

President of the United States

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: New Dems
subject: The middle majority is ready to flip the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Reject extremism and demand real leadership now >>

| The victories of Democrats like Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherril this month proved to us that Democrats are ready and energized to flip the House next year.

**Across party lines, Americans are tired of political extremism.** They want leaders who are solutions-driven, pragmatic, and focused on improving lives.

Spanberger and Sherrill were part of New Dems’ 2018 class that flipped 40 seats – **and they continue to show that the middle majority is strong, growing, and our pathway to a Democratic majority.**

While the MAGA Majority sows chaos and division, voters are calling for a Democratic agenda rooted in common sense that the New Dems agenda delivers:**lowering costs, creating good jobs, and defending the rule of law.** **[As we prepare for the midterm elections, we need to know that you’ll be a part of the fight. But as Michael puts the pressure on Trump's FCC to protect the interests of Coloradans over corporate profits and undue political influence, he wants to be sure folks like you are invested in the fight, too. Do you watch the local news? | | | | Thanks in advance for chiming in, Team Bennet | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251116-1626-foote&t=1001&akid=1626%2E342411%2EOm180- ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Grassroots supporters are proving that any donation can create enormous
impact: Laurel gave $7. Pat gave $10. Rainer gave $15. Mallory gave $18.

On their own, these amounts might seem small. But when thousands of people
chip in — one donation at a time — it adds up to the fuel our movement
needs to fight for progressive change at every level.

It’s these contributions — not billionaires, not corporate PACs — that
allow Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida to protect healthcare,
education, and workers’ rights, build long-term power for communities too
often ignored by the political system, and push bold, transformative
policies that create real change.

Every single contribution, no matter the size, sends a message: our
movement is powered by people, not special interests. Every dollar gives
our Squad the resources to keep fighting — from organizing on the ground
to defending democracy in Congress.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251116-movement.ASiFpB&refcode=em20251116-1626&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1626%2E342411%2EOm180- ]Can you join Laurel, Pat, Rainer, and Mallory today with a contribution
to the Squad Victory Fund? Together, your donation adds up to a movement
that’s unstoppable.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

**Iowans have spoken: 68 percent say abortion should be legal, according to a study published earlier this year.**

But Mariannette Miller-Meeks has made her priorities clear — and Iowans aren't on the list. She cheered the _Dobbs v. Jackson_ decision that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , voted for bill after bill restricting abortion access, and co-sponsored Iowa’s near-total abortion ban. Why? To win points with anti-abortion elites in Washington, not to represent the people she was elected to serve.

**The ban has been catastrophic for Iowans.** Since the ban took effect, women in Iowa have been forced to travel across state lines to access abortion care and clinics providing reproductive care have shut down across our state.

By taking support and money from this group, Mariannette Miller-Meeks is letting all of us know that she will continue to attack our reproductive freedoms. _Do we really want two more years of Miller-Meeks' anti-women extremism in our district?_

Christina believes Iowa can do better. As a law professor, she understands that bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom are human rights. She will fight for every woman in this district to make her own decisions about her body, her future, and her family.

**[Will you stand with the candidate who puts Iowa's women first? If the answer is "yes," make a donation to support Christina's campaign today to help us fight back against Miller-Meeks' anti-abortion backers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119405603/582948281/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251116_FRAbor_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251116_FRAbor_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b3a179a9-0ec3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2ExNzlhOS0wZWMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GQLZFMw5PFtL5S6Ts_WFjWUrjL3KXcWTb2MG3N372zM=)**

Thank you,

Bohannan HQ

= Iowans have spoken: 68 percent say abortion should be legal, according to a study published earlier this year. But Mariannette Miller-Meeks has made her priorities clear — and Iowans aren't on the list. She cheered the Dobbs v. Jackson decision that overturned Roe v. Wade , voted for bill after bill restricting abortion access, and co-sponsored Iowa’s near-total abortion ban. Why? To win points with anti-abortion elites in Washington, not to represent the people she was elected to serve. The ban has been catastrophic for Iowans. Since the ban took effect, women in Iowa have been forced to travel across state lines to access abortion care and clinics providing reproductive care have shut down across our state. By taking support and money from this group, Mariannette Miller-Meeks is letting all of us know that she will continue to attack our reproductive freedoms. Do we really want two more years of Miller-Meeks' anti-women extremism in our district? Christina believes Iowa can do better. As a law professor, she understands that bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom are human rights. She will fight for every woman in this district to make her own decisions about her body, her future, and her family. = Thank you, Bohannan HQ Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. Chip in to support her campaign today >> | = = | PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 722 Iowa City, IA 52244 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

# **The Body 's Most Abundant Protein (That Most People Are Losing Fast)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b8b3fefa-4741-45ad-b09e-eea29a1cbe9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Your body loses 1-2% of its collagen every year after 30--and it's the most abundant protein you've got. Translation? Less support for joints, skin, nails, and overall resilience.
NativePath Collagen helps you restore what time chips away--clean, grass-fed, no fillers, no junk. One study found that women taking just 5g a day saw meaningful improvements in bone support over a year. That's the power of consistent collagen intake.
Just mix two flavorless scoops into coffee or any drink for 18g of easy, high-quality protein that supports joints, mobility, digestion, and more.

* * *
# **Trump says $2,000 tariff dividend checks coming in 2026**
President Donald Trump **[confirmed Friday](https://substack.com/redirect/5128273f-c228-4352-98eb-557276c06fdb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that his proposed $2,000 tariff dividend checks won't arrive in time for the Christmas shopping season and will instead be distributed in 2026 as he faces a tough midterm election cycle, telling reporters aboard Air Force One "the tariffs allow us to give a dividend" while also planning to reduce debt.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5128273f-c228-4352-98eb-557276c06fdb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Supreme Court ruling and Congressional approval pose major obstacles:** The tariff dividends face uncertainty as the Supreme Court could strike down Trump's IEEPA tariffs following a tough oral argument, with Trump admitting "then I'd have to do something else" if the Court rolls them back, while the rebate also needs Congressional approval from skeptical Republicans who want focus on reducing the federal budget deficit instead.
* **Revenue shortfall and income threshold undecided:** Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent suggested payments would go to families making under $100,000--costing about $300 billion according to Tax Foundation estimates--but quickly clarified "it's in discussion" and "we haven't decided," while IEEPA tariffs have only brought in $90 billion so far, far short of the funds needed, and Trump could be forced to refund tariffs if he loses the Supreme Court case.

* * *
# **Female track athlete denied medal for months after podium protest against transgender competitor**
High school track athlete Alexa Anderson, who finished third at the state championship high jump in May, **[allegedly never received her medal](https://substack.com/redirect/f8c85682-7beb-491b-80e2-77b29726a046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she and fourth-place finisher Reese Eckard stepped down from the podium to protest a trans athlete who finished fifth, with Anderson claiming she was forced out of the championship photo and only received her medal months later through her law firm after taking legal action.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f8c85682-7beb-491b-80e2-77b29726a046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Death threats and expulsion calls followed protest:** Anderson faced severe backlash including death threats and people calling her school, Tigard High School, demanding her expulsion before graduation, with messages allegedly reading "I hope you die" and "Your parents are definitely embarrassed of you," though she said "part of me expected this and knew that's just what happens when you stand up for what you believe in."
* **Lawsuit advances after judge denies OSAA motion:** U.S. District Court Judge Youlee Yim You denied the Oregon School Activities Association's motion to strike portions of the lawsuit highlighting selective enforcement, as Anderson claims she regularly witnessed other athletes protest with Black Lives Matter and pro-LGBTQ messaging without punishment, arguing "it's really harmful to students to only allow them to express certain viewpoints that you agree with."
* **Athletes received recognition at Fox Nation Patriot Awards:** The medals were ceremoniously presented to Anderson and Eckard at the Fox Nation Patriot Awards in November where they received the Most Valuable Patriot Award, with Anderson now keeping her medal at her parents' Oregon home while attending the University of South Alabama, saying there are "more important things that we're fighting for" beyond the medal itself.

* * *
# MTG says Trump's recent criticisms put her "life in danger"
## What's going on between Greene and Trump?
* **Trump pulls Greene endorsement, calls her "traitor":** President Donald Trump withdrew his endorsement of Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) late Friday and called the conservative congresswoman a "ranting lunatic" and "traitor" on Truth Social, saying he would support a primary challenge against her if "the right person runs" while complaining "all I see 'Wacky' Marjorie Taylor Greene do is COMPLAIN, COMPLAIN, COMPLAIN!"
* **[Greene says Trump's words put her "life in danger":](https://substack.com/redirect/4ef960e0-279d-4bff-8268-e23cedca56f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** The Georgia Republican told CNN's Dana Bash Sunday that Trump calling her a "traitor" was "so extremely wrong," warning that "those are the types of words used that can radicalize people against me and put my life in danger" after she criticized the president's Iran strikes, the GOP's healthcare plan during the shutdown, and signed a discharge petition to force release of Jeffrey Epstein files.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/01dc28a8-b224-4178-a126-71ddfc94bc4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Greene pledges to tone down rhetoric:** Despite attributing Trump's criticism to her support for releasing the Epstein files, which garnered enough signatures for a floor vote this week despite Trump's opposition, Greene acknowledged participating in "toxic politics" and committed to "put down the knives in politics," saying "I really just want to see people be kind to one another."

MTG says Trump's recent criticisms put her "life in danger" What's going on between Greene and Trump? Trump pulls Greene endorsement, calls her "traitor": President Donald Trump withdrew his endorsement of Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) late Friday and called the conservative congresswoman a "ranting lunatic" and "traitor" on Truth Social, saying he would support a primary challenge against her if "the right person runs" while complaining "all I see 'Wacky' Marjorie Taylor Greene do is COMPLAIN, COMPLAIN, COMPLAIN!" The Georgia Republican told CNN's Dana Bash Sunday that Trump calling her a "traitor" was "so extremely wrong," warning that "those are the types of words used that can radicalize people against me and put my life in danger" after she criticized the president's Iran strikes, the GOP's healthcare plan during the shutdown, and signed a discharge petition to force release of Jeffrey Epstein files. Greene pledges to tone down rhetoric: Despite attributing Trump's criticism to her support for releasing the Epstein files, which garnered enough signatures for a floor vote this week despite Trump's opposition, Greene acknowledged participating in "toxic politics" and committed to "put down the knives in politics," saying "I really just want to see people be kind to one another." You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

clean_body: I’m laser-focused on this one thing. | Peter, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party's voter file isLAGGING behind the Democrats'. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer's Shutdown (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... ...But unless we have a 100% verified voter file, we'll lose everything to the Democrats, We need to MATCH that energy and determination. We can't let Democrats take back the reins of the Senate for the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency. Thank you, Senator John Thune If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.

I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’t abandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119407134/582952698/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ3NGJhZC0xNGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=szOguIxesuYNdz-h6CQnxLNAMsbieuGAxY2t08dXFd0=)
Friend, In 2026, **26 Secretary of State races will shape the future of our elections,** redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race. Republicans know it. That’s why they’re _already_ pouring money into these states – and we have to fight back now, while it still makes a difference. **That's why the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State is going on offense, early.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119407135/582952699/-248329304?refcode=em-11.16.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ3NGJhZC0xNGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=szOguIxesuYNdz-h6CQnxLNAMsbieuGAxY2t08dXFd0=) We’re launching our most aggressive early campaign yet – building the infrastructure to defend seats in Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Nevada, and flip key battlegrounds like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa. But none of it happens without your support. [**Before the deadline, can you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us lock in the resources we need to win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119407136/582952700/-248329304?refcode=em-11.16.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ3NGJhZC0xNGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=szOguIxesuYNdz-h6CQnxLNAMsbieuGAxY2t08dXFd0=) | | **[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119407137/582952701/-248329304?refcode=em-11.16.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ3NGJhZC0xNGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=szOguIxesuYNdz-h6CQnxLNAMsbieuGAxY2t08dXFd0=)**
---
**The GOP’s long game is clear: rig the rules, suppress the vote, and hand power to candidates who’ll ignore the will of the people.**
Democratic Secretaries of State are our last line of defense – and your support before our fundraising deadline could make or break the map.

clean_body: | = Friend, In 2026, 26 Secretary of State races will shape the future of our elections, redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race. Republicans know it. That’s why they’re already pouring money into these states – and we have to fight back now, while it still makes a difference. That's why the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State is going on offense, early. = We’re launching our most aggressive early campaign yet – building the infrastructure to defend seats in Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Nevada, and flip key battlegrounds like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa. But none of it happens without your support. = | | = The GOP’s long game is clear: rig the rules, suppress the vote, and hand power to candidates who’ll ignore the will of the people. subject: I’m always told that my reputation precedes me...

I’m told my reputation precedes me. So believe me when I say that I’m deeply concerned right now.
Folks - it's John Kennedy.[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=55be6ca3211c4ac3b1f33f7e70bbaa66&_e=MLSyvjFU2fWYOiKWC1Vi6I2BphQCrrnFUoJbYdpt_L9B9psP_AtLk1oXL_Vy-uyYpMYsPip8ZbPnu7RBJW9p6BAp6VA3XG14LbQcBoBte_dsKqgecPa-KvuzO61gvCXP_PVsVjb0gJrWgBKbHQ3qJp8H7ZbLGA9DM5VxKaSS8fNmVzJ6rCtBoab7bGzz3xrzPriLUB2w2PlHKdhN3FZmNyfKGcV3jZS5lmGoDfqqbuB9Mbgyf_2bp9kZj7wrbdfZu2Vj0--h6mOlkylb3rEM0Y9kdg1Aj5usGJqqrVDYCK1MZ6NqkfXSqwmmIfCO5mZVIVA-0_Gt4aSef7O6AIGmNc1JbWhCMD3LXeTecK1ZnXp9J_K4k6ggXpDlihAicnb67e8nzFUNnnnDI1qNyHgx4FAoYBqblltSmZxH_DppgoGvIQhuEmgO443zkpTuBSLXRXGMNu7S8XUUYMyfsZ3dqUWonNwZ3X7IVQMB3SsZw5JRAxt4OFZK9Wqh7yFtNBSOAmegRBF3nvOjw-_X9czL6VmKK5KI5Dc66nlk66BpZvTSoKWX11cA2Oj0RXKQHtweAgr0Xf9R4U9xlzqXeXbgAx7iRsNEtDlGXkQ2hbxytxf6wDqdenmRrH-tQx_dUDbYA4BvQOlcoCTQSsFYX_8hcfffbr2HLAUDKIPVINravLGlNr1zYPCw5CxXUW96tBXw4OLdWcbfxDW4GRVBLUAc0WyFKVAGv9y04G8lc-qNxzIRhvxQDAj-M2j6i3hmVxvp32PQD9uGpkrSYdDy9raCtZzj-eo0lwEx-HZfSmrn8uCtB6lzbPXV3tzu-PF7gqcEI65cA1b5JUMz9uVGZMRN06l7gKyN8v6uLG2sfLGN_F0%3D)I'm told my reputation precedes me.
I hope that's a good thing.
I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.
So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.
My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.
That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!
_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal.__
_It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

name: Greg Landsman
subject: No one should go hungry in the richest country in the world
body:
| | |
---
| | , This week before Thanksgiving, is National Hunger and Homelessness Awareness Week. It's a reminder that while many of us are planning holiday meals, too many families in Cincinnati are worried about where their next meal is coming from. The numbers are sobering. Food banks across Southwest Ohio are seeing high demand. Families who never thought they'd need help are showing up because groceries are too expensive. Seniors are choosing between food and medication. Kids are going to school hungry.It's affecting working families - people with jobs who still can't make ends meet because wages haven't kept up with the cost of living. Here's what we can do:Right now: **-** Donate to local food banks like Freestore Foodbank **-** Volunteer to serve meals at local shelters **-** Drop off non-perishable items at food collection sitesLong-term: We need policies that ensure hard work pays off. That means raising wages, lowering grocery costs, and strengthening programs like SNAP that help families put food on the table.Republicans want to cut food assistance to pay for tax cuts for the super wealthy. That's unacceptable. I'm fighting against those cuts every single day. No one should go hungry. Not in Cincinnati. Not anywhere.Appreciate you, _Greg_ 💙🙏
---
| | Landsman for Congress
PO Box 413
Cincinnati, OH 45201
United States
---
---
| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/BDj7DbXBBEyfq2oKIRdzRg2?unsubscribedata=BMfIIq0M5fhDJToJ1URJog7y72%2BagcuYBTnfF6lJtJw9wNZQOBV0LzqTemJ%2Bl%2Fd1%2Foy7WpYULVhM5C%2Be4BcFO2CP3NfalPPqt80eRGDYu%2FAv8bmnqtt0sQE%2BwUAh3Wt3lYBMYJzjIXpmCYzYDXzELXw8tOPv02g%2Bf3QnKUM9cVDocOGicJ6%2BetgEKykdKH3f0s4qeXYeGsp9M1KDfU%2Bycy%2F8CUTEHABKenN1sIKae4JaCDFi2gpCYsj5OyX1g9NYcNT1yK2gO%2FNC02YHQDFipLjGrms4milWUfvNJPRMod5KrhGBEu80Po2DQfNtq4bwc3EGoQyuxc7Vdq9iyq9edAodLuBbpZTwNToNm3jOLHCVqirbVlR2CYyGSU6kXyoNH2uiyH6f8BzZa0QskvDWblMh497j%2F5ZpENmozPEOoQDbyW2ePBzJjtAu9gBaYbqy).

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m honored to endorse my good friend Deb Haaland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I hope you’ll join me in supporting Deb’s historic campaign.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5725%2E400544%2EJLjauN)
Hi there — it's Elizabeth Warren.
I’m honored to endorse my good friend Deb Haaland’s run to become New Mexico’s next governor, and **[I'm hoping you'll join me in supporting her by making a donation to power her historic campaign today.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251116_1_ew.n4bgvq&amount=5&refcode=em20251116-5725&t=2&akid=5725%2E400544%2EJLjauN)
**Deb is the real deal.** I watched her fight like hell for working families and stand up to Big Oil in Congress — and I’ve seen the impact of her leadership as Secretary of the Interior, where she defended our public lands, took real action on the climate crisis, and protected people from the big polluters harming our communities.
Now, Deb is running for Governor of New Mexico. If she wins, she’ll make history as the first Native American woman to ever serve as governor in the United States.
This race isn’t going to be easy. New Mexico’s governorship has changed parties every two terms for decades.
National Republicans are looking to flip this seat red, and we can’t let that happen.
**Governors are the first line of defense against the dangerous policies coming out of the Trump administration. In this moment, we need righteous fighters like Deb leading the way.**
Deb is building a movement to make life better for all New Mexicans — to lower costs, protect public lands, and ensure every person has the resources and support they need to thrive. **But in order to win this thing, she needs our help.**
**[If you can, please make a contribution to help Deb win this race and keep New Mexico blue.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251116_1_ew.n4bgvq&amount=5&refcode=em20251116-5725&t=3&akid=5725%2E400544%2EJLjauN)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251116_1_ew.n4bgvq&amount=5&refcode=em20251116-5725&t=22&akid=5725%2E400544%2EJLjauN)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251116-1&t=23&refcode2=5725_400544_JLjauN&akid=5725%2E400544%2EJLjauN)**

clean_body: Please sign on as a Citizen Cosponsor of the Emergency Responder Protection Act – and leave a note about why you support this policy. | When disaster strikes, our priority must be community safety. Not political agendas. Our firefighters and emergency personnel run toward disaster zones when others run away. I introduced the Emergency Responder Protection Act because they deserve our respect, not persecution. (More details below!) Let’s get this passed ✊ – Emily PREVIOUS EMAIL: Peter, In August, Customs and Border Patrol agents in the Olympic National Forest. They arrested two people who were putting their lives on the line to fight the Bear Gulch Fire, the largest wildfire in the state. Emily introduced a new bill to ensure that never happens again: the Emergency Responder Protection Act. When CBP agents entered the Bear Gulch fire zone and detained firefighters without warning or coordination with the coordinated emergency response efforts, they put their lives and the crew’s lives at risk. Emily’s bill would ban immigration enforcement operations in active disaster zones and ensure our first responders can do their jobs without looking over their shoulders. Thank you so much 💙 – The whole team at Emily Randall for Congress | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on:** | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. subject: we messed up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
We’re turning to our top supporters to turn things around.

We messed up. We saw a surge of support after we reached out this weekend and we thought we were back on track to reach our final end-of-quarter fundraising goal after this weekend’s fundraising drive. **But we were wrong. ** Look, miscalculations happen. But if we don’t turn things around before we have to publicly report our fundraising numbers, it could leave our campaign vulnerable. Democrats need to defend every seat possible if we’re going to reclaim our Senate majority, which means we can’t risk any setbacks. The good news is we still have time to turn this around. With one last push, we can get back on course and help John Hickenlooper keep Colorado blue. **[So will you chip in $3 or $10 to help our fundraising get back on track? Darren Bailey kicks off his 2026 campaign for governor at the Drake Hotel in Oakbrook.
By Illinois Review

Illinois politics has seen its share of dirty tricks, but the latest stunt aimed at smearing the Darren Bailey for Governor campaign may be one of the lowest yet — and it comes at a time when Bailey and his wife Cindy are mourning the unimaginable loss of their son, daughter-in-law, and two small grandchildren after a tragic helicopter crash.

While the Bailey family grieves in private, political operatives appear more focused on manufacturing scandal than showing even a shred of decency.

On Sunday morning, political activist and candidate Julie Cho posted on Facebook that she received a “Darren Bailey for Governor” postcard in the mail. Her post included a photo of the card — complete with a handwritten label, an outdated 2022 Bailey campaign logo, and the phrase “Cho Must Go!” scrawled across it.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/a-2022-postcard-becomes-the-center-of-a-political-hoax-targeting-the-bailey-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9c2d0ace3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(Facebook)
Cho then suggested the postcard came from the same people who recently objected to her petitions. But her claims fall apart under even the most basic scrutiny.

First, the postcard features Bailey’s 2022 campaign logo, not his current 2026 branding, which includes a Chicago skyline. Anyone connected with Bailey’s actual campaign would know the branding changed. Anyone attempting to impersonate the campaign using old leftovers would not.
Bailey for Illinois 2022 campaign logo, matching what is shown in the Cho mail piece.
Bailey for Illinois 2026 campaig logo, which includes the Chicago skyline.
Second, while no one is accusing Cho of fabricating anything, observers quickly noticed that the handwriting on the postcard closely resembles the handwriting on Cho’s own petitions. No accusations — just an unavoidable comparison that raises serious questions about the origins of the postcard and why it suddenly surfaced now.
This isn’t a coincidence. It’s political theater — and it fits a broader pattern tied to the Dabrowski operation.

In October 2025, Ted Dabrowski’s top advisor, former State Rep. Jeanne Ives — who also served as a top strategist on Bailey’s 2022 campaign — leaked a confidential internal document from that race. The leak was clearly intended to damage Bailey just as the 2026 primary season began.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/a-2022-postcard-becomes-the-center-of-a-political-hoax-targeting-the-bailey-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9c2d0ace3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Former State Reps. Jeanne Ives and Tom Morrison endorse Dabrowski’s campaign for governor.
Instead, it backfired, exposing the Dabrowski campaign’s willingness to weaponize private materials against fellow Republicans.

And the controversies don’t end there.

There was the stunning moment at a Yorkville memorial service for Charlie Kirk in September — a solemn event honoring a conservative leader killed by political hatred — when Dabrowski launched into a profanity-laced tirade from the stage.

According to multiple witnesses and cell phone video, he repeatedly shouted “Gdammit! Gdammit!” in front of families and young children.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8aIivl9N8_g&t=2s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9c2d0ace3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

This came moments after Dabrowski declared himself a “man of faith,” even joking about being late to church.

The irony deepened weeks later when Dabrowski vowed publicly never to use profanity after Gov. JB Pritzker dropped an F-bomb during a speech: “You will hear no such language from me when I am governor.”

Then there is Dabrowski’s campaign chairman, State Sen. Jason Plummer — a minority owner of one of the most aggressively progressive Major League Baseball teams in the country. The Los Angeles Dodgers proudly celebrate transgender ideology, pushes left-wing cultural activism, and has even mocked Catholics through promotional events.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/a-2022-postcard-becomes-the-center-of-a-political-hoax-targeting-the-bailey-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9c2d0ace3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Dabrowski for governor campaign chairman Jason Plummer speaking at Dabrowski’s campaign announcement. (The Center Square/screenshot)
For a Republican primary, the contradiction is impossible to miss: while Illinois families fight to protect parental rights and religious liberty, one of Dabrowski’s top allies profits from an organization that promotes the opposite.

And just weeks ago, the Dabrowski campaign stirred more outrage when it scheduled a campaign tour in Bailey’s own backyard — on the same day and at the exact same hour as the Bailey family funeral.

Only after immediate backlash did Dabrowski postpone. But the damage was done. Instead of demonstrating respect and compassion, his campaign left the impression of opportunism at the expense of a grieving family.

Taken together, these incidents reveal a campaign defined not by leadership, integrity, or moral clarity — but by missteps, poor judgment, and political gamesmanship.

The primary election is March 17, 2026.

Opinion: Gov. Pritzker Is More Vulnerable Than Ever: Here’s How Republicans Can Defeat Him in 2026 (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/opinion-gov-pritzker-is-more-vulnerable-than-ever-heres-how-republicans-can-defeat-him-in-2026.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9c2d0ace3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/opinion-gov-pritzker-is-more-vulnerable-than-ever-heres-how-republicans-can-defeat-him-in-2026.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9c2d0ace3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Vice President Kamala Harris at a rally to support Illinois Democrats with Illinois Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton (L) and Gov. JB Pritzker on Sept. 16, 2022, in Chicago. (Photo: Scott Olson/Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

For the first time in years, the political winds in Illinois are shifting – and Gov. JB Pritzker is more vulnerable today than at any point in his political career. Despite his billions and his national ambitions, Illinois voters are waking up to a simple truth: under Pritzker’s leadership, this state has become less safe, less affordable, and less free.

When Pritzker first took office, he promised “progress.” What Illinois got instead was chaos – a dangerous experiment in soft-on-crime policies, record spending on illegal immigrants, punishing taxes, and an exodus of families and businesses fleeing the state.

Nowhere has the failure been more devastating than on public safety.

clean_body: If you believe in God and the power of prayer, I'm humbly asking for you to lend me your thoughts and prayers as I keep up this mission for America. Do you believe in God ? As a Navy SEAL, I've been all across the globe facing America's enemies in the most desolate places imaginable. Through it all, God has guided and protected me. Now, as a Member of Congress working to protect the American Dream, I continue to rely on God's guiding hand. If you believe in God and the power of prayer, God Bless, -Eli Crane | | | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@email.craneforaz.com to your address book. body:

This is our moment to build a strong, unshakable Church.

Friend,
---
Something remarkable is happening in America right now. People are coming back to church.Pastors are finding their courage again.And young people -- yes, _young people_ -- are opening their Bibles and asking for truth.This is exactly what **Charlie **dreamed of when he launched **TPUSA Faith.** He wanted to see a generation return to God, and a Church unafraid to preach the truth -- no matter the cost.And today, that vision is becoming reality.📈 Our church network has **doubled** , now connecting with more than ** 8,000 congregations** across America. 💥 Our online reach has **surged by 1,000%** , spreading the message of biblical truth and courage farther than ever before.🙌 And over **200,000 new people** -- pastors, parents, and America- loving young believers -- have joined this movement of faith and conviction.
---

I'm **Pastor Lucas Miles** , and I have the honor of serving as the Senior Director of **TPUSA Faith** -- the church outreach arm of **Turning Point USA.** Our mission is simple but urgent: To build a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families in Christ.We train pastors.We unite congregations.We reach the next generation on college campuses.And we remind America that there is still truth worth standing for.You might be seeing the darkness in our culture -- the confusion, the moral drift, the pressure on Christians to stay silent.But here's the good news: **the Church is waking up.** All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down."_This is what **Charlie prayed for.** This is what I've dedicated my life to help lead.And now, I want to invite _you_ to be part of it.More pastors are asking for guidance.More churches are joining every week. More young people are hungry for answers -- for discipleship, for identity, for truth.And we must be ready to meet them.This is our moment, Friend.A once-in-a-generation opportunity to strengthen the Church -- not just for today, but for the decades to come. If you believe America needs a stronger Church -- one that speaks truth in love and refuses to bow to "Woke" ideology -- then I'd be honored to have you stand with us.**[Your gift today will help us:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7c70000930b6490da5a5a26bf521fae0&_e=VCKzu9OCvBkXH2_tPJNlo3QpSBonKZUt_2RjxtzZqodiGJXDVyZUzkoqwR9zGYWX1cpH8wmsVRgF0Eb10KMH-Ly9V62kzSayEUHo3CKGbjsTIfuI4I-mBmFAq1trBii55A1sM7vp5_MziUtlR3kIEzWTqTJlwSjbp8R1y3Ke216dR1pxgaDVs9ul43fihYs0RPsTp2haWFSz8pj6uTHmHfXihHVDtPgXzmhnDVFIeU1XCk_KsQEsIrTZed37fvlWqFT8ar3ofIPYJ1LpwPW8yuoyL1jJ6E98LlzBLfpD_9qiW6qb-gllNZOciuScpTMNL_4mq0njNSDUsgpdJCPi9ZHStMnMO8tNIjEWJFWrSRHzRTL3WhFQ4dAxXwLEZYAy4T3xMCZkSL5-z3_hI2XlTdanM7lvaE-M3eA53tCAyUc7qDYY1pDJuvVOEu84tITIx4tE7giGcLawHJGXIQG5bHAdiFCERt_UfUSB9AZgCfQhhdGVg5QNF5ixBM2lFEBrE6ZzK78g5rPznvEr3ZLsdgIZ8KRqCwQG5SSObyZHSePM0hyIZ61auyBXMl-SndLTW2OJwHJPNVP1X2qMXuUsY2DHuewRWRSoEQNxDSUeEdAGJatIeUsePBRoHaT3OnZEjT32RPGNS0Sdw1D58PAllbJMKe4dJ3sf-GQiWuElbBvZIM9qXf4tDPQhfoNGG_oAQJy-DtLmUle6D_921qH8CgPxvz58k0zPRE4me0I8WnxRJWI1YeXHzFYd20XMscbYTHRuOLrpk8nIsG6_pgs0Cg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: The Church is rising again across America This is our moment to build a strong, unshakable Church. | | | Friend, Something remarkable is happening in America right now. People are coming back to church.Pastors are finding their courage again.And young people -- yes, young people -- are opening their Bibles and asking for truth.This is exactly what Charlie dreamed of when he launched TPUSA Faith. He wanted to see a generation return to God, and a Church unafraid to preach the truth -- no matter the cost.And today, that vision is becoming reality.📈 Our church network has doubled , now connecting with more than 8,000 congregations across America. 💥 Our online reach has surged by 1,000% , spreading the message of biblical truth and courage farther than ever before.🙌 And over 200,000 new people -- pastors, parents, and America- loving young believers -- have joined this movement of faith and conviction. That's not just growth.That's revival. And I'm humbled to witness it. God is at work. And we need your support. I'm Pastor Lucas Miles , and I have the honor of serving as the Senior Director of TPUSA Faith -- the church outreach arm of Turning Point USA. Our mission is simple but urgent: To build a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families in Christ.We train pastors.We unite congregations.We reach the next generation on college campuses.And we remind America that there is still truth worth standing for.You might be seeing the darkness in our culture -- the confusion, the moral drift, the pressure on Christians to stay silent.But here's the good news: the Church is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down."This is what Charlie prayed for. This is what I've dedicated my life to help lead.And now, I want to invite you to be part of it.More pastors are asking for guidance.More churches are joining every week. More young people are hungry for answers -- for discipleship, for identity, for truth.And we must be ready to meet them.This is our moment, Friend.A once-in-a-generation opportunity to strengthen the Church -- not just for today, but for the decades to come. If you believe America needs a stronger Church -- one that speaks truth in love and refuses to bow to "Woke" ideology -- then I'd be honored to have you stand with us. Equip pastors to lead boldly and biblically. Expand the network from 8,000 to 10,000+ congregations. Reach more young people with the Gospel and the truth about liberty. Keep the light of truth shining in every corner of this nation. Charlie 's legacy continues -- And right now, that looks like revival.It looks like churches filling with life.It looks like believers standing together for God's truth.America needs strong churches -- and strong churches need friends like you. Will you take your stand today?Pressing forward, Pastor Lucas Miles Senior Director, TPUSA Faith P.S. Since September 10 , more than 4,000 new churches have joined the TPUSA Faith network. Each one represents a pastor choosing courage over comfort -- and believers hungry for truth.Your first gift today will help equip them with resources, training, and connection. $25 helps resource a pastor stepping into this movement. $50 helps reach young people returning to church. $100+ strengthens the growing network of churches uniting for revival.This is a once-in-a-generation moment.Charlie 's vision is alive.Let's build a stronger Church -- together. 4940 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: FWD: Thank Justice Sotomayor!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’re about to lose your signature spot...
| Trump’s Supreme Court majority is on the verge of DESTROYING the Voting Rights Act — they just agreed to hear the case!

**Sonia Sotomayor is one of our ONLY fighters for democracy left on the Court, but you still haven’t signed our letter thanking her for her work.** [**We’re giving you ONE more chance to sign by 8am tomorrow, or you will lose your signature spot. THANK JUSTICE SOTOMAYOR NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96608?t=6&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96608?t=7&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
_Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96608?t=8&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg)
**If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96608?t=9&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg)
[**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96608?t=10&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96608?t=11&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96608?t=12&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96608?t=13&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21859%2E878179%2Es4WfZg)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Apparently, Republicans don’t like this
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=932%2E1086043%2Ed_bb7Z)
Peter, no Maryland Governor has looked like me before.
**That is, no governor has been a guy who can _rock_ cargo shorts.** [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251116-1.ZOT97w&refcode=em-20251116-1&t=2&akid=932%2E1086043%2Ed_bb7Z)
Apparently, Republicans don’t like that. Donald Trump and his allies are launching a coordinated effort to roll back our progress.
Right-wing megadonors, career Republican politicians, and their MAGA friends are gearing up for a massive campaign. They’re hoping to make me a one-term governor and **flip this seat in 2026.**
That's why I have to ask for your support today. **Let’s show them Maryland won’t be bullied.**
**[Can I count on you, Peter? Please, donate $5 or any amount to help us defend Maryland.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251116-1.ZOT97w&refcode=em-20251116-1&t=3&akid=932%2E1086043%2Ed_bb7Z)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251116-1.ZOT97w&amount=5&refcode=em-20251116-1&t=22&akid=932%2E1086043%2Ed_bb7Z)**
Elevate,
Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251116-1&t=23&refcode2=932_1086043_d_bb7Z&akid=932%2E1086043%2Ed_bb7Z)**

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

subject: This just hit my desk…

name: Abdul El-Sayed (via LeftNet)
subject: Early in my career, Bernie Sanders gave me a piece of advice I’ve never forgotten
body:
[1]LeftNet

Hey friend,

Early in my career, Bernie Sanders gave me a piece of advice I’ve never
forgotten.

He said, "In politics, people succeed either by being really good at lying
or really good at telling the truth. You strike me as someone who’s not
good at lying — so your job is to get really good at telling the truth."

So today, I’m going to tell you some truths about our campaign.

We’re just two points behind the AIPAC-backed candidate.

We have the momentum to win.

This is, no exaggeration, a make-or-break moment for our campaign.

We need to raise as much as we can to prove that our campaign — one that
rejects AIPAC and corporate PAC money — has enough resources to take on
the establishment and win.

Finally, one more piece of truth: I don’t love asking people for money.

But because this is a 100% people-powered campaign, I’m relying on folks
like you who care about the future of our party and our country to pitch
in.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em20251116_partner_ms_aes_em_leftnet.NvDHUk&refcode=em20251116-1350&amount=5&t=1001&akid=1350%2E2118727%2E3rImPh ]If you can contribute to support our campaign, it would mean the world:

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em20251116_partner_ms_aes_em_leftnet.NvDHUk&refcode=em20251116-1350&amount=5&t=1002&akid=1350%2E2118727%2E3rImPh ]DONATE ››

Thank you,

Abdul El-Sayed

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.leftnet.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1350%2E2118727%2E3rImPh

name: Cate (Team Walz)
subject: A quick update
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
Cate from Team Walz here! I’m checking in with a quick mid-month update on where things stand and what the next few weeks mean for our campaign.
Since the moment we launched this campaign, the support for Governor Walz has been steady, strong, and inspiring. Every goal we’ve set so far, this team has met — and often surpassed. I can’t thank you enough for being part of that momentum.
But as we head into the final months of 2025, the stakes are getting even higher. Our first and only public fundraising deadline of the entire year is coming up on December 31, and once that report goes public, our opponents will be studying every number we report, looking for signs of weakness.
I know this team can rise to the occasion. But to stay on track, we’re going to need a strong surge starting now.
**[Will you chip in $5 today to help power our campaign through this critical stretch?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251116.NaaqT9&amount=5&refcode=em20251116-100&t=1&akid=100%2E34582%2EFwbS0O)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251116.NaaqT9&amount=5&refcode=20251116-100&t=20&akid=100%2E34582%2EFwbS0O)**
With appreciation,
Cate Paterson
Finance Director
Tim Walz for Governor

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251116-100&t=21&refcode2=100_34582_FwbS0O&akid=100%2E34582%2EFwbS0O)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251116-100&t=22&refcode2=100_34582_FwbS0O&akid=100%2E34582%2EFwbS0O)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=100%2E34582%2EFwbS0O)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=100%2E34582%2EFwbS0O)

Tim Walz for Governor

St. Paul MN 55104

name: Derek Tran
subject: Where I come from, and what I’m fighting for
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119409909/582962307/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmYTVkOWYtMWVjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zZHtetFVDOwxFYxug50aRFUKRiEPvU-DikOS2g-4yTw=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119409910/582962308/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.16.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmYTVkOWYtMWVjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zZHtetFVDOwxFYxug50aRFUKRiEPvU-DikOS2g-4yTw=) Friend, I want to share a little more about _why_ I’m in this fight. You’ve heard what we’re up against: four Republican challengers, new district lines, and national GOP super PACs spending millions to flip CA-45. **But here’s why I won’t back down.** I grew up working behind the counter at my family’s corner store in Orange County. My parents came to this country as refugees after the fall of Saigon, hoping to give their kids a shot at something better. They relied on programs like Medicaid and food assistance just to get by -- programs that made it possible for us to stay on our feet. After serving in the Army, I opened a small business and saw up close how hard people work -- and how often the system leaves them behind. I didn’t plan to run for office. But I got tired of watching politicians vote to protect the powerful while communities like ours were left behind. So I stepped up, **and we pulled off one of the biggest upsets in the country, flipping CA-45 by just 653 votes.** Now, the GOP wants this seat back. They think they can drown us out with attack ads and outside money. But they’re wrong. **[This district belongs to working people, immigrants, and families who just want a fair shot, and I’m here to fight for them. If you’re with me, can you chip in $3 before our mid-quarter deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119409912/582962309/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.16.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmYTVkOWYtMWVjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zZHtetFVDOwxFYxug50aRFUKRiEPvU-DikOS2g-4yTw=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119409914/582962311/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.16.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmYTVkOWYtMWVjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zZHtetFVDOwxFYxug50aRFUKRiEPvU-DikOS2g-4yTw=)

clean_body: | = = Friend, I want to share a little more about why I’m in this fight. You’ve heard what we’re up against: four Republican challengers, new district lines, and national GOP super PACs spending millions to flip CA-45. But here’s why I won’t back down. I grew up working behind the counter at my family’s corner store in Orange County. My parents came to this country as refugees after the fall of Saigon, hoping to give their kids a shot at something better. They relied on programs like Medicaid and food assistance just to get by -- programs that made it possible for us to stay on our feet. After serving in the Army, I opened a small business and saw up close how hard people work -- and how often the system leaves them behind. I didn’t plan to run for office. But I got tired of watching politicians vote to protect the powerful while communities like ours were left behind. So I stepped up, and we pulled off one of the biggest upsets in the country, flipping CA-45 by just 653 votes. Now, the GOP wants this seat back. They think they can drown us out with attack ads and outside money. But they’re wrong. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for standing with me, -Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. body:

Before the year comes to a close, make sure that you have plans to use your Political Tax Credit! You can give $50 or $100 to the OLCV PAC [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2] and get it back on your taxes, if you're eligible. body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Hey there,

We wanted to reach out and make sure you don't miss your chance to take Jason's survey.

Congressional Republicans just pushed through a budget “deal” that fails to lower costs for working people’s healthcare. Instead, it just kicks the can down the road with a “promise” to address healthcare down the line.

Jason knows better than to take promises from Donald Trump and congressional Republicans. He’s fighting for working people’s best interests NOW, not later.

But to do that, he needs to hear from you:

Will you take our November survey today? It’ll only take a few minutes. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/112025-survey]

Peter,
---
This just hit my desk...

...And I’ll come right out and say it: _we’ve got a five-alarm fire on our hands._
