Listen, we know Donald Trump is unhinged, but just look at exactly what he’s done in his first ten months as President:

1\. Threatened to jail or deport Democratic governors and mayors.

2\. Tried to silence journalists who criticize him.

3\. Sent military and National Guard units into U.S. cities under “training” pretexts.

4\. Ignored court rulings and used food assistance as political leverage.

5\. Accepted questionable gifts and favors from authoritarian leaders.

6\. **AND NOW:** Trump is even more compromised by his past ties to Jeffrey Epstein, who reportedly told Russian contacts he could help them “understand Trump.”

[Trump’s careless antics are absolutely destroying America’s reputation, which could have material and economic impacts that would be devastating for everyday Americans!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70054?t=8&akid=23622%2E4449941%2Eo-8Ib6)

Hi there, My name is Fred Wellman. I served in the Army for 22 years and am now the host of the _On Democracy_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network. I'm excited to share some big news: **I 'm the Democrat running for Congress in one of the most competitive swing districts in the nation. ** This isn't the email I thought I'd be sending you today. But with the government shutdown and Ann Wagner doing nothing to fix it, we need leaders who will stand up and do whatever it takes to fix it. I'm done waiting. [**If you 're ready to join my campaign, can you split a donation of amount today between Shawn Harris****and me to become one of our first 5,000 Founding Donors? A Missouri native, I graduated from Kirkwood High School and then attended West Point. In the Army, I served as an aviator and later as a public affairs officer. For much of my career I led soldiers in combat, flew helicopters in Desert Storm and Iraq, and served as a spokesman for generals leading America's toughest and most important fights. After retiring from the Army, I kept looking for ways to serve, founding a public affairs firm to advocate for veterans and military families, volunteering at a field hospital in New York at the height of COVID, and working with the Lincoln Project in 2020 to help beat Trump. My oath to serve our country and uphold our Constitution is sacred and endures for life. I returned home to Missouri four years ago and once again rolled up my sleeves to help organize the thousands of donations for refugees coming to St. Louis from Afghanistan as Kabul fell. Now, I host the _On Democracy with FPWellman_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network, having key conversations about how to address rising authoritarianism, inequality, and Trump's assault on our democracy.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/iZMK1lWkQn-CGzwwF8HsGg~~/AAPPABA~/7_yYvhZata61fQbuL7SQsgK5xvtp66kTKrjAUsJtl8JVuoItha7PwMULRj2HSAoRdYKHMvUUzeWhZe4cU66ROv5TMLNIj-5_daZ8KK-9UZ6Ljk4NwdX-EgQ3VFqsmp8LihtoVZCGfXRdJpcoJyovMzYUWJ0a2PqIunAE7xzmxqbfoHZEg04M9BETWncN_T8H4eaYWrAlVLyzIHUSUDAm_wrCvQT86Am4QOW1CGFCrd_8SWbp0a4eAOAjqbJGFOJAzKypm6XhFVPVqXUrWFFsC3g1n00VnF3QRbmNO3hwexF-r9DZZHdLkVv7zxxDCslx)
---
**Meanwhile, my MAGA Congresswoman --Ann Wagner--is content to let Trump rule as a dictator. She has spent her entire career selling us out, ignoring her constituents, and getting richer. She hasn't even bothered holding an open town hall in thirteen years. ** **In one of the most critical swing districts in the country, here in my home state of Missouri, this cannot continue.** That's why I'm running. **Because working Americans are getting priced out of the American Dream. ** **Because our kids deserve the same rights, freedoms, and opportunities we had. ** **Because the time for sitting on the sidelines is over. ** After two decades in uniform, I know what it looks like to fight for this country. I watched brave men and women give everything to defend our freedoms, including two of my own soldiers in Desert Storm. Their sacrifice reminds me every day that democracy is worth fighting for. Now Trump wants to crown himself America's first king and Ann Wagner is helping him get there. They have taken healthcare away from millions, destroyed the economy, gutted the VA, politicized our national defense, and are ripping apart our democratic institutions piece by piece. **I won 't stand by while they sell out working families. I'm a fighter - and I'm ready to take this fight to Washington. I know you are ready to fight too. ** **That 's why I'll ask one more time, can you split a donation between Shawn Harris ****and me to become one of the first 5,000 Founding Donors of our campaign? ** I've got one tattoo. It says "I'm not done yet." It was the theme of my Army retirement speech. Whenever I hit hard times and thought I was all but finished I remembered that line. I dusted myself off and got back in the fight. I'm not done yet. You're not done yet. Missouri is not done yet. America is not done yet. Join me. --Fred Wellman Democratic Candidate for MO-2
---

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Corporate money and smear campaigns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1302%2E251025%2EQ_v9RM ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1302%2E251025%2EQ_v9RM ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

The forces who don’t want to see us win — be they old guard Republicans or
Democrats, or a group like AIPAC — are starting to dump opposition
research on us.

If you’re not familiar, opposition research is created when political
operatives dig through your record looking for anything they can twist
into an attack.

It’s a sign they’re worried because they know our campaign is a real
threat to win.

Being targeted by the forces who broke our political system means we’re
doing something right, but we can’t let them define us.

But unlike campaigns bankrolled by corporate PACs who tell them what to do
and say, we’re on the ground every day — organizing in our communities,
listening to people, and fighting for the change they deserve.

The question now is whether we’ll have the resources to respond.

Every dollar you give helps us stay on the campaign trail so Michiganders
hear our message before our opponents can drown it out with corporate
money and smear campaigns.

So, I’m asking: [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251116-1-ak.q8re62&amount=10&refcode=em20251116-1288&t=1004&akid=1302%2E251025%2EQ_v9RM ]Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can
today to help us tell our story before they try to rewrite it for us?

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: A quick note of thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend -

Mid-November is a perfect time to pause and say thank you. Amidst all the noise in Washington, I'm thinking about how truly thankful I am for supporters like you.

Every day, we see extremists working overtime to gut our nation's security, hold essential programs hostage, and undermine the democratic process. I know these challenges can make things feel bleak.

But you are the reason I am grounded in this fight every day. Your dedication and willingness to speak up proves that hope is more powerful than their attempts to silence us . We've seen that momentum is building with voters in key elections across the country, bringing us one step closer to taking our country back.

We are in this together, and every day I am grateful for your voice.

Thank you for standing with me.

- Eric

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Re: Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?

_Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files?_

Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons.

We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people.

But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes.

You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge.

***

I know it can feel like the Republic is falling apart. But what I need you to hear is that the only way out of this spiral is to win in the midterm elections.

That’s the whole ballgame.

_2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule._

And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won.

I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.

_There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority five years ago._

[**_If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of power — and if you are determined to WIN — please chip in to my campaign and Maggie Hassan today. This is the most important Senate race in the country, and I can’t win without you._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119411693/582969011/32293070?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.16_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2YwNzI4NC0yN2MzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtPqSWHAkVyxiTFhkhvgRecPyFbK7puKkUryxC1p_zQ=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119411694/582969012/32293070?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.16_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2YwNzI4NC0yN2MzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtPqSWHAkVyxiTFhkhvgRecPyFbK7puKkUryxC1p_zQ=)

clean_body: Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files? Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files? Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons. We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people. But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes. You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge. * I know it can feel like the Republic is falling apart. But what I need you to hear is that the only way out of this spiral is to win in the midterm elections. That’s the whole ballgame. 2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule. And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won. I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority five years ago. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining. And come next November, we will raise it higher. In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption. Thank you for your support. \- Jon | = If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment.
[I’d like to tell you a quick story.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4bf67cdeaee640de969f5c72d04659d9&_e=vYtYdfY0MXRP7BMY7-eOZbiRp0s_zJ8X08ZY3_AuaWYxAn5tF6IDw-dXrjAhfnRrfNCLH49yDRqwgiGi7VZkUhY0lny68qIrK0O6aUglDIpgUZRbXnqIzadfuj6sGE19I7kOIZUSLet959MnUkpGD83PO7nw8J03KTla-uscopTcdqSTbuRUof0SzyM1F6Xyv6-0x3bnp15AbLVx0db1agoZjHoypdU7mlFkaP2JJs8wA94cvG2GQePT66oTRvhlqNKb_wsRYZA0T522M80fi9NXJCkAL8Eg0ia6aifHHshmsJatuUI2ZZFPwhNRu2dOXXQHnHMZsjJbr5qI3ojbd0l3KVD_ymtywWK2ybm5c9RLPFSoopDQfARB69_vyd0zlMKBheWXaN6atwS7GQCBkjWbghZUa4OH38vxVVis6M0AaiV8gGH6DuSLnrwc4OKLr8NxI478SH-rv1eHmFBewrLTqkYnpTVLPM1VQkWlEKwJ8CF2av1m1zpBTrJuNw_lVh1GEdQklhBw0K4tF3lpT19yCbEXc1nQ9KiV3pCTfrEK-gL9Ur3SUv_tT3NdEkT5pGMxEnHnS35srsUMB0XcqjhigZ8cSlUcxDvGgDHzUlk3uQxa5sJW8bgd2XbEJZmeD3ZA4WLc5BuOtRjYSGUy28RaS2TwwyiQIvm_PR0njRxMoWuwGXNAr8B8WiC95VVOjbvB1y4TGPXssZoBrv9Sc1NleM5sv1aZk9AYHldlzJtK3HJZuUUeLmFoXTgN1DjK_fvM7P4rulhyxFcfwTHN3IHqALAiNccQR8h3BFLnUYy4gbwj4Da_1KqcS3EHJ0GWL3tHBPp5qJ16MNQyD_J7kA4dFHVdKJeHSIVAS1EntELArkDXvTVplYGlA2IY6RXsiUoO6wY99_lZq0Ru6gLJrGM-m5qHOQxNd4pdMq9eikI%3D)
I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice.[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4bf67cdeaee640de969f5c72d04659d9&_e=vYtYdfY0MXRP7BMY7-eOZbiRp0s_zJ8X08ZY3_AuaWYxAn5tF6IDw-dXrjAhfnRrfNCLH49yDRqwgiGi7VZkUhY0lny68qIrK0O6aUglDIpgUZRbXnqIzadfuj6sGE19I7kOIZUSLet959MnUkpGD83PO7nw8J03KTla-uscopTcdqSTbuRUof0SzyM1F6Xyv6-0x3bnp15AbLVx0db1agoZjHoypdU7mlFkaP2JJs8wA94cvG2GQePT66oTRvhlqNKb_wsRYZA0T522M80fi9NXJCkAL8Eg0ia6aifHHshmsJatuUI2ZZFPwhNRu2dOXXQHnHMZsjJbr5qI3ojbd0l3KVD_ymtywWK2ybm5c9RtlfSQZEUup7PEzXVewXNcAgT_iqC6_bg3g4xSiZyLzncTscluPhddIe0FluEqXaO2V4SuEdyL3J1yKlCo0EfjuUTvS9aEfl3GeOcXe0WqyKPwGfyqh8FOPwerFfdtKzUUFXxo7K7OtTPOg5QY6Vwt0l-1y620tgeoJlKysrTrtEMkfTdoq3TCow5_ClpRdm3ZMquJyu15nI16GqP4YaU-63yMf5aihEmeS3vnVcJc_pt_5nb3HRF6VLIreBzaWpuRLjntKAOXMsYGO52SvI6atqL3CQVu9Q_BP5n7eiw5t9yUTpVflsMMiYLUKL_aoEvAPaKV2rJvIZis8iXjp3imRoIaR87wHDmZ9I1amiOKnZUy3GUAT5DKKfOQwnrJF_EIJEbrhUG2Kw_f2GfaR2mVwsLmqhwk8EduUqRArD7tbbmuy5i7mJSwOvMw0lFsmYCY76TVMOwqlpQ2ZtTJcbN0M11UDbB9vCZBO9I0WuSqoeKBplt7oVm_bf_g7YYoLSvdUoTxISyYqvB1jf2w0EJt3gezeo5bgKs81Lg6mlZfccT5KIbkywhHhnG2j1brW-I%3D)That's why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." **
**It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. **
**So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: **
**[THANK YOU, Fellow American!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4bf67cdeaee640de969f5c72d04659d9&_e=vYtYdfY0MXRP7BMY7-eOZbiRp0s_zJ8X08ZY3_AuaWYxAn5tF6IDw-dXrjAhfnRrfNCLH49yDRqwgiGi7VZkUhY0lny68qIrK0O6aUglDIpgUZRbXnqIzadfuj6sGE19I7kOIZUSLet959MnUkpGD83PO7nw8J03KTla-uscopTcdqSTbuRUof0SzyM1F6Xyv6-0x3bnp15AbLVx0db1agoZjHoypdU7mlFkaP2JJs8wA94cvG2GQePT66oTRvhlqNKb_wsRYZA0T522M80fi9NXJCkAL8Eg0ia6aifHHshmsJatuUI2ZZFPwhNRu2dOXXQHnHMZsjJbr5qI3ojbd0l3KVD_ymtywWK2ybm5c9RxWTlF-BRA1VrHKG5fG3VNY_kUAeXDy9WKwPaGNR33X0QEpqcSZuXBen5j8G7sly_WZ9OYv5jOAirJYBZeLv1l4K3ieTiI1QSwuVCPbzfEDnYzZ4ugCrRx5Mq9P5uFj2tqzFGH47TP3sJGP-YdVb87FR63SvLKIL15d9lX4_7bln4eoelS4BCJFR2k22Y0duix_w4k6KseHAFOetIMN3IxQoQm8_RrmtEYGu8n51cS2POrLV0SyyHaB4HoBD5hUIPz0tLoZjLJCitYIoQXSBqQa34aQ0SiGM4MtW2dLBcTGfo7TKIn3OdqDjK4-IGjS56KSHEhrSiGMfBiO8vi-mhuxf6IqI7c4Gwp0KtntO4IXHW2saGs5PzFQtbnTRXBxwN7QpKky_9haaecZE9TGqw8DvC-eQSysV7KcCjxnzwlaudrUXwmh-wMhljlxO-dLwYd81jXzykzMLK8amvhdQ4YyhYS1kyr9CDWZ6PRtVds1hB7f_TqPIwJM7F5iz0hJwTS9wqE6l0OaI4XdUj7Bx4MLSfxm__05QbRjNfHdNRw9wDVR2SGY_8sYMWnQ-HKF5M%3D)**
**We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country.**
**I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were[ ONE ELECTION AWAY](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4bf67cdeaee640de969f5c72d04659d9&_e=vYtYdfY0MXRP7BMY7-eOZbiRp0s_zJ8X08ZY3_AuaWYxAn5tF6IDw-dXrjAhfnRrfNCLH49yDRqwgiGi7VZkUhY0lny68qIrK0O6aUglDIpgUZRbXnqIzadfuj6sGE19I7kOIZUSLet959MnUkpGD83PO7nw8J03KTla-uscopTcdqSTbuRUof0SzyM1F6Xyv6-0x3bnp15AbLVx0db1agoZjHoypdU7mlFkaP2JJs8wA94cvG2GQePT66oTRvhlqNKb_wsRYZA0T522M80fi9NXJCkAL8Eg0ia6aifHHshmsJatuUI2ZZFPwhNRu2dOXXQHnHMZsjJbr5qI3ojbd0l3KVD_ymtywWK2ybm5c9SsAQBy8EX8qQkVlOwq0hBdpDnbezEojDto8Qm0J1hfvBE_XMa6j2L7nA6LuizHSbXpBiX58FgpJ7G9bfkDWH-2vwIDg9WpoqyE6R3sNrORyvGhuWbrn3_vNlwSB3bz8CRbLybRGIzr6OqvKex1uYcpRi14YdrEbtdT2bF3CcCWIQO8dp3ttWKfjniZl9U-NeM4fWrSBPYuXepJFP_ALAcXOF7cnEo7TBeX0jvpjzeVadSuH7OeYdi0ZyLvn_PDvzCcg8WK84FwIu-Lpdra7N1ij1wOSAeMdPii-jZY52TFT57igGtKJudIFfLisNIekt54cmCgfaat9pM2ES7SzlMIQhXA-Ld1G5g4UF9wzCoqZ0hRU1bwWnUFI8K3y_aZg1Vyd9xl3EzT5PUWDlQq8rl2WDFMhw9U-WjKZTpiyiQqpSJEC3aetph3N9nJIbJGEjIQ8sepo2ifmIjGIdYCh7xnTXaNDguN3tSrGLEV1AjbwFD8c5waWSoS3tIh4KPgjCUXdq9PxK8euvrlyclMTb-SAICr9k-_dbkjNPEwrKsHu0ZCImv6NGNXrVzTbX023do%3D) from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore.**
**President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. **
**That 's why this race means so much. **
**So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. **

clean_body: I will never take your sacrifice for granted. today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That 's why this race means so much. So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven 't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. Should you wish to stop receiving emails from us, you can unsubscribe at any time by . This editorial email containing advertisements was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you have shown an interest in Financial Education topics. To ensure our emails continue reaching your inbox, please add our email address to your address book. Stark Media LLC appreciates your feedback and inquiries. However, please note that by law we are unable to provide individualized advice. | Unauthorized replication Stark Media LLC, duplication, or dissemination of our content, either entirely or partially, is strictly prohibited without prior written consent from Stark Media LLC. We appreciate your adherence to our intellectual property rights. If you require assistance, you can reach us via email at mailto:support@yourcapitalminds.com "support@yourcapitalminds.com". name: Powered by People
subject: We can flip this Texas seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

One of the biggest stories from the November elections is happening right
here in Texas’ 9th Senate District. Democrat Taylor Rehmet didn’t just
compete in a Republican district—he came in first and is heading to a
runoff.

Taylor finished with 48% of the vote—within inches of winning outright. To
put that in perspective, Trump won this district by more than 17 points
last year. That kind of jump doesn’t happen by accident.

It happens because Texans showed up. It happens because organizations like
ours have been doing the work in red counties that most people write off.
And now? That work is paying off.

We proved two things this election:

1. We can flip seats across Texas.
2. Voters respond when Democrats talk about what’s actually happening in
their lives.

We showed up, knocked doors, had real conversations, and helped turn out
the voters who pushed Taylor into first place. And he can absolutely win
this runoff election—but only if we double down right now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251116-split.cdtSkE&refcode=ema20251116-240465&t=1002&akid=240465%2E444211%2EgN1En_ ]But that won’t be easy. Taylor already overcame big money and special
interests, getting outspent by a combined $5 million to his $150,000.
Let’s give his campaign a surge of grassroots support to help flip this
seat from red to blue. Can you split a donation between Taylor’s campaign
and Powered by People today?

Thank you,

Powered by People

name: James Carville
subject: Kentucky’s got a fighter worth betting on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
I'm putting my money on Dale Romans
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T577515b7-9d75-403e-9203-5ec014fcbc47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e580746-fd72-4516-8d72-ace48f68fa54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, James Carville here. I’m not gonna waste your time with political mumbo-jumbo. But let me tell you something: Kentucky’s about to surprise the hell out of our country now that we’ve got a Democrat who can actually win. His name’s Dale Romans, and if you haven’t heard of him yet, you will soon. He’s not some slick-talking career politician; He’s a horse trainer who’s won the Preakness, the Travers — hell, he’s won more races than most folks have even entered for crying out loud!! Now, Dale’s running his biggest race yet, for the U.S. Senate. I haven’t been this excited in YEARS! He’s an independent Democrat who’s not looking to make headlines. He’s looking to shovel up the bulls**t and actually fix what’s broken. That’s a rare breed these days, and if you’ve got any sense of how politics works like I do, you’d know this is the guy who can actually win in Kentucky. [That’s why I’m asking you to invest RIGHT NOW in his campaign so we can make history and win in Kentucky →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cb4ed88-c64f-47f3-aaf6-bf4a0b8408e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ve seen a lot of races in my time – different types of races than Dale, but I’m telling you: this one’s winnable if we help him get out of the gate strong. Dale’s got deep Kentucky roots, a working-class story, and he’s talking straight to folks who’ve felt ignored by both parties. I know the goods when I see them, and he’s got ‘em. But here’s the deal: the other side’s gonna have more money than a Vegas casino on fight night. Every fat cat, dark money PAC, and out-of-state lobbyist is gonna pile in. They’ll hurl everything they’ve got at Dale — kitchen sink, refrigerator, and maybe the plumbing, too — trying to make him into something he’s not. We can’t let that nonsense stick. [So, let’s give Dale the fuel he needs to show the country that Democrats can still win where folks (not me!) said we couldn’t. Split a donation of $10, $25, $50, or whatever you’ve got between Dale and Blue Amp Action, and let’s make some history in Kentucky.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba9d297b-99a2-4a44-bf9d-2222d7390b21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: The Left has painted a target on my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You’re my only hope of defending myself...
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2074345b6aa344ebb1a2245463bb302d&_e=vRiAsCOMn7VsbaRqgEw1dg9rZKvrNqF_ovMBU4MOgIcS-sR6TvkIKRvS3stkxaVukeonYnwav7kGia4jc3sN7rq1P27u13fFb30dSg01Q_EP7rXwnuBsYo3ANW2K3_zyROqzM_yJDJjZJnCLW-p6ufgS7bxb4tTqrwG4u03dzSPdEPvRoV72ofoCGzW35_FE0Yg0y-xdn9yUePUjPWJlQRp5fNZ_jdct7yMR0uon6WC7m26ODa8BpFQnMEoHsD5WAy4-wJLThWi8LBKxJJVtDPpa5Qrl-zOxOof923F3WElIi5vAd2Ezm6w-IFDvYbixUIpNTKV7iB-WUN1OrauUf1LAk6P4sP4JZgCeNzul1yZuyAtFszhRsVot_3O1xdavVet89Rmc2EmseEk5e6vHPIGnNL7Vu_SVDC2gs_dyT_aSbbUNEUrZzUDwL50zZGD5wM-Nx_X4gcsh4isCFUme2SKUI8VeImpRAlHwghi2uaEgQdsJ3Eaq4bY68tE9RGWgLoNfK5E8YcLieuo2kKZcW2MEg3e0sQA8N9xWwbLxJ6bYN6AOSROSXR4xeS4Kkf-dnyqn2OhOWxIMRtwmvIkwJ0tRGthp4LcAL1fR_O1uJ3QxOjkoJUpR56v_h8t3J3uxrCqPDzAq6AkMLA-GYbr1Kw%3D%3D)
---
**__An Urgent Note from Elise Stefanik__**
---
Peter,

clean_body: | = Team, I'm emailing to respectfully ask if you can = to my grassroots re-election effort in CA-30. Let me explain why: It's no secret that campaigns are expensive. It's not uncommon to see colleagues spending as much time on the phone hunting donors as they do focusing on legislating, just to keep up. I'm doing things a bit differently. I was elected to serve, and I'm not slowing down on my work in Washington. Issues like building more affordable housing, protecting consumers from being gouged, and yes, protecting our democracy are all too important. That makes your support around these deadlines SO critical. A single donation of $3 might sound like a drop in the bucket compared to millions from a super PAC. But when you chip in, someone else reading this email might decide to as well. Fellow Conservative,

Imagine, for a moment, **switching shoes with an active-duty Navy SEAL.**

The satellite phone rang at 3:00 a.m. local time.

You’re in a 20-foot shipping container turned command post, somewhere in the Horn of Africa you never see on a map.

_**No staff. No teleprompter. No second chances.**_

One of our teams was pinned down.

Bad guys closing in.

Decision time: **extract now and risk the helo, or hold and risk the men.**

You make the call. You get every American home.

_**That’s what a real 3 A.M. decision feels like.**_

_[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=afae074ed31047e89863a04a9b4bddec&_e=LV2eXsE7GvSDlQ9TUJhFLdVHa8jraLilGcmB0i6uYaZFFkrychQgOx0xnzALBo8mKDQNiyULz31GShk4OCiY7grar6Tj2LqP-IGG_zCV1ZgMe8FgTEaWT-iFw8EjOsHHf1C8czxc50YqsK4bgSvUvJhPbAhpGxC39wzxwjwY62g5yCv8Ior0tY2bOE61uFrO-N5P6Rst4N_yKRTRSp5N8WcHk-3B6dLE-VGTDWGVgS3HYnvlXfSjG9MiKDJzfNsLTKvF1wF5-c06Ar_tqBIuNF28550_e3-n4-VngCVVrLjZLGyTw3_C7zau14nntqDXvlr2iX9UDjuWdEEM6vQm4Xt9LKvBCPHJ56DwL_tQtB3dFwxfynZblPS2V5CV2Uwb2sspPWvrWUAsZ30abZVkP2i2pxyrodbUHfNq8xt9OE16ihyCoJMnf48_FSwit_DRHKSHxyhnctm_G5vhSO8VbDKjt00eKGf_ZnB_DrRy5o7X_-vSHP13El6uKJGvrbUFFh8pyYkqarSFcovHa7ldy4wEX47QgSUgOczzs4DyRsVK8PGmaJc2ywbEwzc4Ypfyy-I3cs86b13Q8BYw4apVcvHiuyf2G_5aYr6VJqoJqieEuPod6W0b225n6y6n9JYtfyIfpGHdSs3sPIOmms915Et8BcBJYX3ZkZqOZ5rigyx5DTwEuTbUaKiZp1fBgtnD36gbp52Y9OghJep1Zf8ecldezhb61kl_5BsSUudFVH0%3D)_
Now, Minnesota faces its own 3 A.M. moments—only the phone is ringing in **Minneapolis, St. Cloud, Duluth.**

1. **_A 74% spike in carjackings since 2020._**

2. **_Illegals with criminal records released into our neighborhoods because Walz-Flanagan sued to defund ICE detention._**

3. **_Small-town hospitals are closing because state mandates crushed rural budgets._**

But this isn’t just happening in Minnesota - it’s happening all across the country. In big cities, small towns, and in state capitals, with out-of-touch career politicians leading the charge.

_**That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - because Americans need a battle-tested former Navy SEAL, like me, ready to take the tough 3:00 a.m. calls that are commonplace at the highest levels of government. **_

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=afae074ed31047e89863a04a9b4bddec&_e=LV2eXsE7GvSDlQ9TUJhFLdVHa8jraLilGcmB0i6uYaZFFkrychQgOx0xnzALBo8mKDQNiyULz31GShk4OCiY7grar6Tj2LqP-IGG_zCV1ZgMe8FgTEaWT-iFw8EjOsHHf1C8czxc50YqsK4bgSvUvJhPbAhpGxC39wzxwjwY62g5yCv8Ior0tY2bOE61uFrO-N5P6Rst4N_yKRTRSp5N8WcHk-3B6dLE-VGTDWGVgS3HYnvlXfSjG9MiKDJzfNsLqYKcUBblBvDb1pX_0M1m_BG5BnZJ8ASHMeraKre4pTpdq8DLkLyE4gCQQytJ51ZDkwdUMc5NB2M4UM6avnxiLeyIYqzmyYqiiBBFmyEgVN56YDZGd6zzRYlqEl2_8KJAkGpQq-GwXbEVzZuDzFeJugjO0kqnp7GRf6KXTxSaD0lL4EJP1al9FaBKXEvV3R2ko7UAsgQ4mFPHPKQ6ivRkybkyk76eHH2ACoF2nEXkE2FYIxqgtqFlf4lCxXk0bH6C3J5jkns68n47HYZqEOwyBT6O2A9OsAYa7fpOZDZxr6erLM1JZ8dDz0l5qxyKOLlkERB15jFuK3hcidiQjqZDn9QyQHXEfTM4SePjJZZ1tNDdl0C6UlqXIkLVRAz6UpKiNLG8g-PbPvBGjAFviDV8ibMsCx9f06fnT8CXpy59dScTbOLOY8iykmKPwOC9kQ_AjLA0pqwjEengw-YOYOe3jAFd4W0DROcjkmaJcublmf4%3D)

My opponent?

She’s never taken a 3 A.M. call that didn’t come with a donor list attached.

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan. I’ve done **nine combat deployments** across **70 countries**. I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds.

Minnesota doesn’t need another career politician who reads a poll at 3:00 A.M.

America needs another Senator who has _****already answered the 3 A.M. call****_ —and brought everyone home.

The left’s most recent internal poll shows a _** **generic Republican within 2 points**. That means **this seat is flippable****_—but only with the help of grassroots conservatives like yourself. You must step up now if we’re to have any chance of flipping this seat for the first time since 2008.

Could you **[please consider contributing $5, $10, or even $25 to our campaign today?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=afae074ed31047e89863a04a9b4bddec&_e=LV2eXsE7GvSDlQ9TUJhFLdVHa8jraLilGcmB0i6uYaZFFkrychQgOx0xnzALBo8mKDQNiyULz31GShk4OCiY7grar6Tj2LqP-IGG_zCV1ZgMe8FgTEaWT-iFw8EjOsHHf1C8czxc50YqsK4bgSvUvJhPbAhpGxC39wzxwjwY62g5yCv8Ior0tY2bOE61uFrO-N5P6Rst4N_yKRTRSp5N8WcHk-3B6dLE-VGTDWGVgS3HYnvlXfSjG9MiKDJzfNsLwERDcJkNwCMPMlWhPPkJaxQ_Kd7e6njS3WQxMZ0-Unf5ss7pnELbKjugYMfAC6iHq7eEW8v2rWJApQ-Sk1yvRvC2UWPY6tAUk7xkrRkWkVfE3kSQ674LR7RTGrc7Uv1ajxa0OpVauUGlVVQD05B9aU0ACjVC92ren0-FQI985E21gJ26FTXJTcmsEdonfhr0F7TKVm8mMMb6hx7OJX1kl6sC4WrcZhYGyiwXinAZwo51FFPmxqFm2og1_e_DJTyvv1PVoNgARNj8BjVMZa41cqR7u_3fO4niQrAz05H9hCCRluMsWSZUGoHwnUp_FRMlZOwFQXPmzyzWcMiSJoPokaZTjXQTgkNvHts7Fh-Awz9nqMLfrwT3f7OgZbqg3TBMXffZVKXyWl6Z7TQoS7UyZqww1P7uJHMx4vlO71fZHiLp27whBqv-eP0mwcnNrux9WM-FgACEIqi8cbOWR-zfpO5oE8y8Nbi43KEaauqll90%3D)** I have a story to tell and a lot of fight in me, but the one thing we don’t have is money.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=afae074ed31047e89863a04a9b4bddec&_e=LV2eXsE7GvSDlQ9TUJhFLdVHa8jraLilGcmB0i6uYaZFFkrychQgOx0xnzALBo8mKDQNiyULz31GShk4OCiY7grar6Tj2LqP-IGG_zCV1ZgMe8FgTEaWT-iFw8EjOsHHf1C8czxc50YqsK4bgSvUvJhPbAhpGxC39wzxwjwY62g5yCv8Ior0tY2bOE61uFrO-N5P6Rst4N_yKRTRSp5N8WcHk-3B6dLE-VGTDWGVgS3HYnvlXfSjG9MiKDJzfNsLyzf-N6eDqp_gg33lIGkgiFmSIHEwPSGFDFDuiFcdL2EdT6MsP4073KckAN0ariQoqBLiHCmD_I6y4BTgu2lYREfYSlALJiaFsWrPRWupjmEeP3rfn0WRjX_MViLmmgVYtZYL6nhvJaDR2RQfEM20ezIRxtb1Fl96I5LpAQkAyvAR4CwOGwFmIOVt8l0ZL2W53eFpM-e-EV4c7EWrqeQUFAPkBASac7v0QExwZBKyfC7w5msUKJhakabdVcNDe7ifsEmSb3HAdkOadMkkkErMKjwnE5nRoLpriJjjVqPlWZDl7Sln4LxLL3gRxTunqoKqNNLFayckWesqNwBb0YanufQK-BBas0ECLWGeWmogSmu4GfwxDBSxb75aSWgSUWIcD14Y9mQ4pckn3_28AK5wUC-UcORBqWGfQNznLCl4cSCW8XicqJgP2kHRHESwme9FFBFPflGWTeK3qiR4r88CSWboUolbX8NzEHrE5Hpm0Fs%3D)

I’m not backed by Hollywood or D.C. consultants. **I’m backed by conservatives like _you._******

Every dollar received by my campaign sends a message to the national GOP:_****Minnesota is in play. ****_ Because when the next 3 A.M. crisis hits—whether it’s a border surge, a riot, or a cyberattack— The American people deserve a U.S. Senator who’s **already been there**.

For a better tomorrow,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

clean_body: I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. | Fellow Conservative, Imagine, for a moment, switching shoes with an active-duty Navy SEAL. The satellite phone rang at 3:00 a.m. local time. You’re in a 20-foot shipping container turned command post, somewhere in the Horn of Africa you never see on a map. No staff. No teleprompter. No second chances. One of our teams was pinned down. Bad guys closing in. Decision time: extract now and risk the helo, or hold and risk the men. You make the call. You get every American home. That’s what a real 3 A.M. decision feels like. Now, Minnesota faces its own 3 A.M. moments—only the phone is ringing in Minneapolis, St. Cloud, Duluth. 1. A 74% spike in carjackings since 2020. 2. Illegals with criminal records released into our neighborhoods because Walz-Flanagan sued to defund ICE detention. 3. Small-town hospitals are closing because state mandates crushed rural budgets. But this isn’t just happening in Minnesota - it’s happening all across the country. In big cities, small towns, and in state capitals, with out-of-touch career politicians leading the charge. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - because Americans need a battle-tested former Navy SEAL, like me, ready to take the tough 3:00 a.m. calls that are commonplace at the highest levels of government. My opponent? She’s never taken a 3 A.M. call that didn’t come with a donor list attached. I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan. I’ve done nine combat deployments across 70 countries. I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. Minnesota doesn’t need another career politician who reads a poll at 3:00 A.M. America needs another Senator who has **already answered the 3 A.M. call —and brought everyone home. The left’s most recent internal poll shows a generic Republican within 2 points. That means this seat is flippable—but only with the help of grassroots conservatives like yourself. You must step up now if we’re to have any chance of flipping this seat for the first time since 2008. Could you I have a story to tell and a lot of fight in me, but the one thing we don’t have is money. I’m not backed by Hollywood or D.C. consultants. I’m backed by conservatives like you.**** Every dollar received by my campaign sends a message to the national GOP:Minnesota is in play. Because when the next 3 A.M. crisis hits—whether it’s a border surge, a riot, or a cyberattack— The American people deserve a U.S. Senator who’s already been there. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: There's no limit to what Trump will do to get rich. The corruption is breathtaking.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9191%2E5257348%2E0P6Xu5)
Derek,
I just introduced the _No Torts for Trump Act_ , legislation to block Trump — and any future sitting president — from paying himself with Department of Justice funds, which also happen to be taxpayer dollars, for having to defend himself against valid charges of serious lawbreaking.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202511-torts.J2HhWt&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251116_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=9191%2E5257348%2E0P6Xu5)
Let me explain: Trump is trying to get a $230 million payout (yes, MILLION) as a settlement from the DOJ, which would essentially be cutting himself a check with taxpayer dollars. As a penalty for the legitimate criminal investigations he faced, which he claims were an unfair “tort” against him. And the kicker, the ones who would approve of this payout are his former criminal defense lawyers whom he appointed to run the Justice Department.
_That’s corruption, plain and simple._
Derek, this is not the first time Trump has tried to make a profit off the Oval Office.
Remember his meme coin? Or his countless official visits to Trump-branded golf courses? Or the vast Trump Family crypto ventures? Or the real estate deals with Gulf countries that want changes in U.S. policy in the region?
_The core feature of Donald Trump’s presidency is corruption._
His latest get-rich-quick scheme, to have the Justice Department — run by his own former criminal defense lawyers — pay him hundreds of millions of taxpayer dollars for an imaginary claim — is just another part of his playbook.
**We can’t let that happen. My new bill will ensure taxpayers are not ripped off for the president’s benefit.**
That _should be_ common sense, but in this day and age, that common sense can be hard to come by.
**[If you support this legislation, add your name here. We need to keep taxpayer dollars out of Trump’s greedy hands.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202511-torts.J2HhWt&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251116_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=9191%2E5257348%2E0P6Xu5)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202511-torts.J2HhWt&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251116_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=6&akid=9191%2E5257348%2E0P6Xu5)
---
We cannot let this president get richer off the backs of taxpayers. Thanks for taking action.
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251116_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=9191%2E5257348%2E0P6Xu5)

name: Michigan Politics Update
subject: Michigan could decide control of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
We can protect our progress by supporting organizations like the Michigan Democratic Party. |
#
---
Team, Once again, Michigan will be at the top of everyone’s list as the most important state to watch on Election Day. In 2026, Michigan will be the battleground that decides the direction of our country. We have five (!) competitive U.S. House races and an open U.S. Senate seat already rated as one of the closest, and most expensive, in the nation. **What happens in Michigan could quite literally determine who controls Congress.** And outside the D.C. bubble, in Lansing, Democrats hold a one-seat majority in the State Senate. We’re also just four seats away from flipping the State House. If we can flip these seats and elect a Democratic governor, we’ll secure a full Democratic trifecta in Michigan. **This will be no easy feat.** And while Fight Like Hell PAC is recruiting, training, and supporting candidates nationwide who fight for working people, the Michigan Democratic Party is leading the charge to win up and down the ballot. **[They’re already organizing for 2026, but they need our help now to build the field operation, voter outreach, and momentum it’ll take to win. clean_body: We can protect our progress by supporting organizations like the Michigan Democratic Party. | Team, Once again, Michigan will be at the top of everyone’s list as the most important state to watch on Election Day. In 2026, Michigan will be the battleground that decides the direction of our country. We have five (!) competitive U.S. House races and an open U.S. Senate seat already rated as one of the closest, and most expensive, in the nation. What happens in Michigan could quite literally determine who controls Congress. And outside the D.C. bubble, in Lansing, Democrats hold a one-seat majority in the State Senate. We’re also just four seats away from flipping the State House. If we can flip these seats and elect a Democratic governor, we’ll secure a full Democratic trifecta in Michigan. This will be no easy feat. And while Fight Like Hell PAC is recruiting, training, and supporting candidates nationwide who fight for working people, the Michigan Democratic Party is leading the charge to win up and down the ballot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Fight Like Hell PAC and the Michigan Democratic Party will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Every dollar directly translates to securing our Democratic trifecta in Michigan, building the bench of new leaders who fight like hell for our values, and keeping progress moving forward. We’re grateful for your support. — Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. name: White flag
subject: The rot that’s poisoned the Democratic Party
body:
It’s the kind of cowardice that has become synonymous with modern Democrats.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M-dVtXR-_SuXehU7vGyh_c9YGQpZZa9RbFcAsCF1rDwdk20I7uaam9vc4-_ZCs8tKspcevOx7r8WnjV8Q8H7UUJwsWo7rN9QzyGaqVP9paEHX26kCD-y5nrMADD7YbDzIfHUjWVkGuoaoTIgm2RsLOdtvkwY9XuDg-R9-kC-weFmVDt4MTu-R0kuWKXnfx2e6oph0ioIWLYh2w7wp1WVZjhoECisIrJC&c=kf9BqCqc9azY-yfntg8pCw-ctyk1NJHewci57QcDETtmrcJK1PBu9Q==&ch=0YkBYcWAp_VseEumjqSfV7mtdSWgGSaG6MFe3XA3rCmg-BFFQqG22A==)
---
|
Peter,
For 40 days Democrats held strong, refusing to compromise with MAGA to reopen the government unless ACA subsidies were extended to prevent healthcare premiums from skyrocketing for millions of Americans.
Momentum was on our side. Trump and MAGA were getting hammered for the shutdown. The American people rewarded Democrats for fighting for their healthcare with landslide victories across the country on Nov. 4th.
And then, 8 Democrats surrendered and cut a horrendous deal with MAGA: John Fetterman, Dick Durbin, Maggie Hassan, Tim Kaine, Angus King, Catherine Cortez Masto, Jackie Rosen, Jeanne Shaheen.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M-dVtXR-_SuXehU7vGyh_c9YGQpZZa9RbFcAsCF1rDwdk20I7uaam9vc4-_ZCs8tKspcevOx7r8WnjV8Q8H7UUJwsWo7rN9QzyGaqVP9paEHX26kCD-y5nrMADD7YbDzIfHUjWVkGuoaoTIgm2RsLOdtvkwY9XuDg-R9-kC-weFmVDt4MTu-R0kuWKXnfx2e6oph0ioIWLampZUoIZoHya9DzmA3XRh1&c=kf9BqCqc9azY-yfntg8pCw-ctyk1NJHewci57QcDETtmrcJK1PBu9Q==&ch=0YkBYcWAp_VseEumjqSfV7mtdSWgGSaG6MFe3XA3rCmg-BFFQqG22A==)
---
|
The deal is a joke--reopening the government in exchange for a pinky promise by MAGA to vote on whether to extend ACA subsidies in December. That's right, they cut a deal that hinges on a "trust me bro" from some of the biggest liars in the world.
This is a betrayal to the American people and Democrats everywhere.
It's the kind of cowardice that has become synonymous with modern Democrats. And it's how MAGA keeps winning -- not just through fear and hate, but through the corruption and cowardice infecting our own party. We've watched it for years: Democrats who talk tough, who promise to fight for working people, then fold the second the pressure hits.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M-dVtXR-_SuXehU7vGyh_c9YGQpZZa9RbFcAsCF1rDwdk20I7uaam9vc4-_ZCs8tKspcevOx7r8WnjV8Q8H7UUJwsWo7rN9QzyGaqVP9paEHX26kCD-y5nrMADD7YbDzIfHUjWVkGuoaoTIgm2RsLOdtvkwY9XuDg-R9-kC-weFmVDt4MTu-R0kuWKXnfx2e6oph0ioIWLaGXrAxgLz-UThl2LjMeE0e&c=kf9BqCqc9azY-yfntg8pCw-ctyk1NJHewci57QcDETtmrcJK1PBu9Q==&ch=0YkBYcWAp_VseEumjqSfV7mtdSWgGSaG6MFe3XA3rCmg-BFFQqG22A==)
---
|
And this is exactly why we call out the MAGA and AIPAC operatives who are funneling money into my opponent's campaign. Because MAGA-funded Democrats aren't being bankrolled to be strong Democrats in Congress -- they're being paid to fold to Trump and billionaire interests when commanded.
This is the rot that's poisoned our party: billionaire and corporate money, cowardice, and leaders who have no convictions to fight for. It's not just weakness -- it's corruption. And it's killing our country.
When I get to Congress, I won't flinch in the face of MAGA. I won't cut deals with extremists or take marching orders from billionaires. I'll fight them tooth and nail because I'm accountable only to the ordinary people who have built this campaign.
If you're done watching Democrats surrender while our country burns, then stand with me. Let's take our party and our democracy back.
[Can I count on you to rush $50, $25 or whatever is meaningful to you to help send a strong Democrat to Congress who won't fold like a chair in the face of Trump's fascism?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M-dVtXR-_SuXehU7vGyh_c9YGQpZZa9RbFcAsCF1rDwdk20I7uaam9vc4-_ZCs8taBeXjD-DUw3JFFi_eTlJPtBs7UySBJWF91rYJJCEJSCNlFyoIRtyTHVMwGWlTt7Ab-KvZUF_PHleP1BGYIvoUZjenISyHbZ9r-Y5YnZjbI1pd0CjGMkzqj7xv-qNyEhrJ9Wd5ZA5S2COuH5k4bR43W-92YVk7Gmwyyc1HsggYwc=&c=kf9BqCqc9azY-yfntg8pCw-ctyk1NJHewci57QcDETtmrcJK1PBu9Q==&ch=0YkBYcWAp_VseEumjqSfV7mtdSWgGSaG6MFe3XA3rCmg-BFFQqG22A==)

* * *
When it comes to grift, Trump didn’t just write the book, he bottled it. His latest stunt? Selling Trump wine at Coast Guard Exchanges. That’s right, and it’s _illegal._ Federal law prohibits using one's government position, i _ncluding the presidency,_ for private gain or endorsing products for personal benefit. This isn’t just a glass half full of bad behavior; it’s a RED WINE flag of corruption. **Cedar Key Progress is taking a stand. name: Ro Khanna
subject: It’s time to abolish the presidential pardon power. Here’s how.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
It’s time for a historic Constitutional Amendment to abolish the presidential pardon power – a relic of monarchy that presidents of both parties have repeatedly abused to protect the powerful and undermine justice.
Before I explain, will you add your name to our petition calling on Congress to end the presidential pardon power once and for all? [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abolish-presidential-pardon]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abolish-presidential-pardon]
For years, presidents of both parties have used pardons not as acts of mercy, but as tools of corruption and cronyism:
* Trump pardoned Binance founder Changpeng Zhao after his conviction for bribery and political corruption and freed January 6th rioters who attacked police and tried to overturn the election.
* Biden pardoned his family and commuted the sentence of Judge Michael Conahan , the “kids-for-cash” judge whose crimes devastated families.
These aren’t isolated cases; they show a pattern of presidents using the pardon power to protect the well-connected and undermine justice.
TAKE ACTION: Add your name to abolish the presidential pardon power and restore equality under the law. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abolish-presidential-pardon]
TAKE ACTION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abolish-presidential-pardon]
No one – not even the president – should be above the law.
Thank you for standing with me in defense of democracy and the rule of law.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: Trump can’t have our voter registration data
body:
Private data belongs to Oregonians, not Donald Trump. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119412308/582970875/-569431239?refcode=251116em-collab-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzcwZjhmNS0yZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PY6WTcsmDh1znvm0k92ScuAfEbAL544TnIEv5fe9Y4=)
---
| | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
When President Trump’s Department of Justice demanded Oregon’s complete voter-registration data, including driver’s license numbers and parts of Social Security numbers. **I had one response:****No way! **
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119412309/582970876/-1348697765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzcwZjhmNS0yZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PY6WTcsmDh1znvm0k92ScuAfEbAL544TnIEv5fe9Y4=&emci=14788b7f-25c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f370f8f5-2dc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=30662126)
---
Oregon already provides the public voter information that’s required by law. **But private data belongs to Oregonians, not President Trump. Not to any President! ** My job is to protect both your right to vote and your right to privacy. So for me, this isn’t about politics — _it’s about principle. _ If we allow sensitive voter information to be handed over once, we open the door to misuse and distrust in our elections. **That’s not how Oregon does things.** **[Now I need to know where you stand: Do you support Oregon’s decision to protect voter privacy and reject federal overreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119412310/582970877/-1348697765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzcwZjhmNS0yZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PY6WTcsmDh1znvm0k92ScuAfEbAL544TnIEv5fe9Y4=&emci=14788b7f-25c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f370f8f5-2dc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=30662126)**
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, If you just opened this email, I hope you read this message very carefully. This is Representative Bill Huizenga. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) is launching an all-out FUNDRAISING BLITZ against my campaign, flooding my district with MILLIONS of dollars in a desperate attempt to buy this seat and silence YOUR voice. Why would they target me in Michigan? Because they know that if Republicans like you and me LOSE this battleground seat in battleground Michigan ... Our Republican majority in the House will CRUMBLE – and with it CRASHES DOWN President Trump’s entire America First agenda. Peter , we already know the Democrats will do anything to SEIZE ABSOLUTE POWER and OBLITERATE your voice in Congress... The Democrat lobbyists would love nothing more than to INSTALL another puppet politician. The Far-Left Extremists would love to take us back to the Pelosi-Biden years of OPEN BORDERS , DEVASTATING CRIME , and SKYROCKETING PRICES. That’s why the DCCC is spending MILLIONS to attack my character, my voting record, and the conservative values you and I stand for. Yes, they’ve got the entire D.C. fundraising machine behind them. Yes, they have an entire army of lawyers and campaign consultants on speed dial... But what they do NOT have is the support of real American voters. And that’s what matters most. I’m counting on YOU to help defend my critical battleground seat by rushing over $5. Seriously, just $5. Your support doesn’t go unnoticed. Thank you, Rep. Bill Huizenga | | PAID FOR BY HUIZENGA FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 245 Zeeland, MI, 49464

name: David Hogg
subject: Do these emails annoy you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’ll stop sending these emails when we win the power to not need them anymore.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251116-1-a&t=1&akid=2843%2E587540%2ExE9tv1)
Hey Peter, David here.
Yes. This is _another_ political fundraising email.
And no, I’m not sitting here thinking, _“Yay! We get to send Peter another email!”_
I know these can feel overwhelming. So the fact that you actually open these emails, read them, and when you’re able to, you even chip in a few dollars? That means the world to me.
Because right now, **emails like these are one of the only real tools we have to start building the next generation of progressive leadership.**
We don't have corporate PACs. We don’t have lobbyists. We don’t have the Democratic Party machine backing us.
But we have _you._ We have _people._ And sometimes that means we show up in your inbox more than either of us would prefer.
But I promise you this, Peter:
**The day young progressive leaders finally have a real seat at the table, these emails _stop._** The day we aren’t fighting uphill for representation and change? I will _gladly_ stop emailing you. Honestly, my hope is that one day our candidates reform the campaign finance system enough that elections are won by who the best organizer is, not who can raise the most money.
But we’re not there yet. And until we are, we have work to do — and we simply can’t do it without grassroots support from people like you, Peter.
We’re solving the chicken-and egg-problem that keeps our political system so broken. The problem being that if we are going to change laws, we need morally just leaders who don’t take corporate money. The other problem, though, is that it’s very hard to build power without taking money from special interests like private utilities or big pharma. That’s where you come in. We need thousands of small-dollar donors to help grow the power of our candidates so they can take on those special interests without taking money from them.
We’re up against entrenched, powerful interests designed to keep things exactly as they are. Electing bold, young progressives who want to _actually change things?_ That makes a lot of powerful people _really_ uncomfortable. And that’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists and why we’re so powerful.
And your support fuels this fight. And yes, sometimes that means more emails than you might like. But it’s not because we expect you to give every time, but because when you can, it matters. The ripple effect is real. **A thousand small actions add up to generational change.**
So, Peter if you’re in a position to do so today, we’d be grateful.
**[Chip in $5 to help us build the future we deserve.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251116_1_email.HZGu3K&refcode=em20251116-2843-a&amount=5&t=3&akid=2843%2E587540%2ExE9tv1)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251116_1_email.HZGu3K&amount=5&refcode=em20251116-2843-a&t=22&akid=2843%2E587540%2ExE9tv1)**
One day, when we win the power we’re building towards, your inbox will be _a lot_ quieter.
And our future will be _a lot_ better.
Thank you for your support.
— David Hogg

clean_body: I’ll stop sending these emails when we win the power to not need them anymore. Hey Peter, David here. Yes. This is another political fundraising email. And no, I’m not sitting here thinking, “Yay! We get to send Peter another email!” I know these can feel overwhelming. So the fact that you actually open these emails, read them, and when you’re able to, you even chip in a few dollars? That means the world to me. Because right now, emails like these are one of the only real tools we have to start building the next generation of progressive leadership. We don't have corporate PACs. We don’t have lobbyists. We don’t have the Democratic Party machine backing us. But we have you. We have people. And sometimes that means we show up in your inbox more than either of us would prefer. But I promise you this, Peter: The day young progressive leaders finally have a real seat at the table, these emails stop. The day we aren’t fighting uphill for representation and change? I will gladly stop emailing you. Honestly, my hope is that one day our candidates reform the campaign finance system enough that elections are won by who the best organizer is, not who can raise the most money. But we’re not there yet. And until we are, we have work to do — and we simply can’t do it without grassroots support from people like you, Peter. We’re solving the chicken-and egg-problem that keeps our political system so broken. The problem being that if we are going to change laws, we need morally just leaders who don’t take corporate money. The other problem, though, is that it’s very hard to build power without taking money from special interests like private utilities or big pharma. That’s where you come in. We need thousands of small-dollar donors to help grow the power of our candidates so they can take on those special interests without taking money from them. We’re up against entrenched, powerful interests designed to keep things exactly as they are. Electing bold, young progressives who want to actually change things? That makes a lot of powerful people really uncomfortable. And that’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists and why we’re so powerful. And your support fuels this fight. And yes, sometimes that means more emails than you might like. But it’s not because we expect you to give every time, but because when you can, it matters. The ripple effect is real. A thousand small actions add up to generational change. So, Peter if you’re in a position to do so today, we’d be grateful. One day, when we win the power we’re building towards, your inbox will be a lot quieter. And our future will be a lot better. Thank you for your support. — David Hogg

Friends, it’s Robert Garcia.
California just stepped up to stop the GOP’s attempt to rig the Congressional map in order to secure another term in power.
_We rejected the old playbook that lets billionaires and power brokers dictate everything — including congressional maps and election rules — to benefit themselves._
And now, with the election year just around the corner, the fight is on. This new landscape is our chance to show what democracy should actually look like. **But it also means I’m running in an entirely new and more competitive district and launching a brand new campaign.**
[**That’s why I’m asking you to spare just 30 seconds to watch my launch video below — and then chip in $5, $10, or more to help our campaign hit the ground running and raise the resources we need to keep fighting for Californians in Congress. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119412907/582972947/789508428?refcode=251116_RG_camapaign-launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk3ZjM1OS0yZmMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpO5jdFcgmib0H7ssohETffUHtfir7DB_4dImqMt5v0=)

[WATCH NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119412909/582972949/-309737922?refcode=251116_RG_camapaign-launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk3ZjM1OS0yZmMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpO5jdFcgmib0H7ssohETffUHtfir7DB_4dImqMt5v0=)
I’m running for Congress because I’ve lived the dream this country promises.
My mom brought me here, took every risk so I could succeed, and I saw firsthand how hard work and hope should matter more than who you know or how much money you have in the bank.
This race is about more than one seat. It’s about saying loud and clear that working people should come first, not billionaires who already own the game or lobbyists writing laws behind closed doors.
**And in the face of intense change, in this competitive new district, we aren’t shrinking. We’re showing up. We’re organizing. And we’re winning.**
[**But we can’t do it without you. Your support today means we can build the campaign that matches the moment. If you believe in a district where your vote counts and your voice matters, then stand with me by chipping in $5, $10, or more right away. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119412910/582972950/789508428?refcode=251116_RG_camapaign-launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk3ZjM1OS0yZmMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpO5jdFcgmib0H7ssohETffUHtfir7DB_4dImqMt5v0=)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: While I served as the Secretary of State under President Trump…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I saw a lot.
Peter,

As the 70th Secretary of State, I had the privilege of serving our great nation and worked tirelessly to secure peace and stability around the world. It was a tremendous honor to represent the United States on the global stage and to play a role in shaping international policy.
But my work didn't end when I left the office. As a proud Conservative and Patriot, I am committed to ensuring that our country remains a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come.
[Now, I'm asking for your help in keeping the peace and promoting American values at home and abroad.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/m1e1lYuyrgbjGKLbDWJ9lTQT4MYKMaHa9NJKdaq3WYmutIHSvmXrAuhLzObbxMRpq7N4_1xOx9sWUkvF4Lu0BOZw2NpT6YKn0SRO_-x1Jchy8A4JPn5hM146KBNyA2JVEV1_OEOw_Whu2yef2JtCi-zgyJRw1mthoWCcwKKIm1f7d_IDD8X1RwrQ3h0uQYCS2rgjabLzx_xbCr_k8-tMQkkQBie6daeIpi6DRhtbwtgeFrdUwuPzMTNr3a1WFcMGwOuHWrtOhbZ1kaZSugj8bYJOzOZNMKufEegYT2YwJVs-cE0R4M9bn_tOLwVwdf6b8PT2YCeqMDj_Df5IqpPVKLOOrDRzWZsnL6_x3Wc9y5Zz5rY07EXoadXjkO2Sm4RfbrndBSXD10fRExz9BPp2gsk9fYCToI8DLevx07cxgQ2fas54pax-e9BgMrDfKvXuD_v65m9m0aIp0e0-rnDxRw1Xcb5wndCcR55KV06_-2eJljDgm-t0lU-Ptn3X2O9wojwbw4RnBsdv_vZ4mf1k6SNTtOugZ9JvDU1S14C9iQZO7BSS7pJf-3NwLUgX2a41mBsysLzgTIbxoi5A0i7ibuQr2aGdKhv8BiPYwFP9vhAGP8oEK22jNM89w3971vIIMWKjFthIHOfZ6dKA0zudkSJ8XRE2RzFYq9v0Am8-Pn-MmKOlMhMI2jCW1wyegUa6Q8fzH1oVy5Jd87N6L5a1AHNr1sbZ4DWswuLCaXcvqypGo1KfYKB3bwBBRcp8erQvPfSeCRG8ng/pt8Vvl7I7gjqbv8eJJkqyc8hYWdk59kT/14)
As a loyal supporter of our America First movement, I know I can count on you to stand with me in this effort. Together, we can make a real difference and ensure that our nation remains strong, safe, and prosperous.
Wondering what you can do to help? It's simple: just click below to give some input and help us keep the peace: [HELP US KEEP THE PEACE
](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/9xXpwuddvc8R---9tJSCVZRPiqWni1u4QzlJj_RB1jjJZwUlbspDQTJ174gWcxAn_zQr_BJW1EtzJ73NmpfsRRweTb2D_nmzfDXpIJ-dOIPwEkruD10XtaLb8j_bPCnR9GioXXHVVVM88uJWvrcTqw5UD1nxi2f667mGOTTjdCB43GjGj3XwgmTHAziUfeoNaMfHhsZcQkLbtKjFvFjA0vhoQ8jCXbWKHLJX5vpopVgdWfc6D60VXHkyVIH075hiePj_mlF3hGYyRbK_gm-CyGb_yp7Br_iIuTVYfrKeoqHx-l1YntiRIlSgQK6QX4omTxfQT0AfHpJdBv4n0wteqHQLcIOmmXazbmiBbNnolpl8ejaTvjNhGMb0b9B7fJq3jc1UX8OKIjpDL1Nw05ZNmip1jT7EyJl6Bj2uCcO155x5UGtoZBFXOgNrSijUl-YdA9VwCcueiuCiDd3TcKa1gGI-fJvFSKSrlhTDmSa1NW3S5O8fVY56vPkAl-GTKrziHiQbmtD6FoWOoQ64I05F83_Yh8Bk85menfOIgVZyRuxmYEMOBAf6mYK_uS63dhBs1NnsBoIKGCjnANHysbHtNnq6ZAvceCLdZjd-KQ1m8hxBxDWujcayIdYriQE2R2NS40q6eApt-ytlXAEOErAAPZhRQQgDHZyuVuoRL5cCBMWD9MxV4HBHTDKbTo7SH-BiTcAl7egDD1lcnEANOOi5wtXGl5y-UjH1sWrbMSevCwdBFyngcUxLU1Nj4hjA27qjcwcMnau56g/nWzp_HxEEmAuiFgxb9sx8ghQ2S0QzbvT/14)Thank you for your support and for being a part of this important mission. I'm honored to have you by my side as we work together to build a brighter future for our nation.
Sincerely,Mike Pompeo I saw a lot.| | |

| **Are you still with me, Peter?** I’m checking in because I know that a _lot_ has happened this year. I know that people are seeing their healthcare, retirement security, and job protections get stripped away to make room for billionaire tax breaks. I know that this administration's mass deportation plan is disrupting communities and turning neighbors against each other. And I know that fascists in D.C. are pushing the limits of their power, and will _keep_ pushing until people either accept their extremism or give up. **But Peter, I want YOU to know that I’m standing ten toes down against this cruelty. And I need you to stand with me.** **The beginning of a new month is our chance to show the world that one election didn’t defeat our movement, and _every_ donation powers our comeback.** [**_So Peter, if you’re still with me, will you please donate whatever you can by midnight to send a message that our movement is still strong?
